dataSource.note: Community-sourced (APK bundles encrypted; see tools/extract/ENCRYPTION-FINDINGS.md). Held-item values span grades 1–40 (in-game max 40). Percentages stored as decimals.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing damage to enemies and lowering their Defense by 15% for 2s when it hits. If this boosted attack hits only a single target, it deals increased damage.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, and decreasing their Defense by 15% for 2s when the attack hits. If this boosted attack hits only a single target, it deals bonus damage.

moves.name: Feint
moves.description: Dash in an arc, attacking enemies that come in contact with Absol. This move ignores the defense stat and shield effects of enemies.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user dashes in an arc forward, damaging Pokémon in the path and increasing the user's basic attack speed by 60% for 0.5s when this move hits. This move ignores the Defense and shield effects of Pokémon hit.

Each use alternates between a rightward and leftward arc.

moves.name: Night Slash
moves.description:
Dash in an outward arc, dealing damage to enemies. If this first attack hits, a second attack can also be performed. The second attack has the user dash straight ahead, dealing damage to enemies and increasing the user's critical-hit rate. The lower the enemies HP, the more the user's critical-hit rate is increased.

Upgrade (Level 11): Using this move again will restore the user's HP.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user dashes in a leftward arc forward, damaging non-allied Pokémon in its path and increasing the user's basic attack speed by 60% for 0.5s when this dash hits. If this dash hits, the move can be used again within 6s. This second use has the user dash straight ahead, repeating the effects of the first dash when it hits. The critical-hit rate of this move is increased by 0.8% for every 1% missing HP of opposing Pokémon hit, up to 30% increased critical-hit rate at 38% missing HP or more.

The first use is a rightward arc forward from the perspective of the orange team (right-side team, which has the map flipped horizontally when in battle).

Upgrade (Level 11): Restores the user's HP for 50% of damage dealt with the second dash hit.

moves.name: Pursuit
moves.description:
Dash to the designated location and quickly charge an enemy with the next basic attack. (Basic attack range is doubled while this effect is active). If the basic attack lands from behind, its damage is increased and this move's cooldown is reduced.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increased movement speed.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user dashes forward, empowering the next auto attack for 3s. With this empowered attack, the user leaps to a non-allied Pokémon and attacks. This damage is increased against targets hit in the back. If this empowered attack hits any target in the back, this move's cooldown is reduced by 70%.

When the user has an empowered attack readied, nearby non-allied Pokémon have their backs highlighted.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increases the user's movement speed by 35% for 2s after using this move and before using the empowered attack.

moves.name: Slash
moves.description: Slash with sharp claws in front of the user, increasing this move's critical-hit rate.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user slashes in the designated direction, damaging opposing Pokémon hit.

This move's critical-hit rate is increased by 15%.

moves.name: Psycho Cut
moves.description:
Attack with blades formed by psychic power that decrease the movement speed of enemies for a short time when this move hits. Also increases basic attack damage dealt to the affected enemy for up to 3 attacks after this move hits.

Upgrade (Level 13): Also increases movement speed for a short time when the user gets close to the enemy that this move hit.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user throws a psychic slash in the designated direction, damaging opposing Pokémon hit and decreasing their movement speed by 90% for 2s (decaying by 25% every 0.5s). 3 marks are applied to opposing Pokémon hit by the psychic slash for 5s. When the user deals damage to a marked target, 1 mark is consumed, dealing additional damage. The third mark deals increased damage when consumed.

The critical-hit rate of the psychic slash and consumed marks is increased by 15%. The marks can be cleansed.

Upgrade (Level 13): Increases the user's movement speed by 20% when an opposing Pokémon is marked by this move.

moves.name: Sucker Punch
moves.description:
Look for an opening to attack an enemy, decreasing the movement speed of the user and the target enemy for the duration. After a short time, charge forward to attack the enemy. However, if the user receives damage or gets attacked before it charges, attack immediately and shove the enemy.

Upgrade (Level 13): Increases basic attack speed for a short time when this move hits.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user becomes unstoppable and targets an opposing Pokémon and enters a counter stance for 1s, decreasing the movement speed of the user and the target by 50% for the duration. After 1s, the user leaves the counter stance to counterattack, charging behind the target and damaging the target and other opposing Pokémon. If the user is attacked or the target attacks during the counter stance, however, the user dodges the damage and effects of the first hit and immediately counterattacks, shoving the target and dealing increased damage to the target and other opposing Pokémon.

Upgrade (Level 13): Increases the user's basic attack speed by 40% for 3s after using this move.

moves.name: Midnight Slash
moves.description: Unleashes a flurry of slashes in front of the user. This move ends by unleashing powerful blades of energy, dealing increased damage to enemies and shoves them.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user briefly becomes unstoppable before becoming untargetable and invulnerable for 1.15s while unleashing a flurry of 5 slashes in front of themself in the designated area, damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of effect. The user then becomes unstoppable again and unleashes a final slash in front of them with 3 blades of energy, shoving opposing Pokémon and dealing damage, up to 4 times at close range and down to 1 time at maximum range.

30% of the full damage.

The damage of the flurry of 5 slashes is divided by the number of targets hit. The first hit from the final slash deals full damage to each target hit; subsequent hits deal 30% of the full damage to the same target.

passiveAbility.name: Super Luck
passiveAbility.description: Increased Critical-Hit rate by 15%.
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced: This Pokémon's critical-hit rate is increased by an additional 15%.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Slash at enemies in front of Aegislash, dealing damage to them. If the boost count is one or more, basic attacks become a boosted attack. When in Blade Stance: pierce through enemies, dealing damage. When in Shield Stance: ram enemies, dealing damage and leaving them unable to act for a short time, restore HP, and reduce the cooldown of Sacred Sword and Shadow Claw when this attack hits. Every boosted attack consumes one boost count. Up to 4 boosted boosted attacks can be stored.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
When in Sword Forme: slashes at opposing Pokémon, damaging those hit. When in Shield Forme: rams at opposing Pokémon, damaging those hit. Becomes a boosted attack if the boost count is at 1 or more, consuming 1 boost count; the boosted attack changes based on the current Forme. The boost count caps at 4, and boosted attacks remain readied until used.

As a boosted attack in Sword Forme: pierces through the target, damaging opposing Pokémon hit. As a boosted attack in Shield Forme: slams into the target, damaging opposing Pokémon hit and stunning them for 0.1s; restores HP, and reduces the cooldown of Sacred Sword or Shadow Claw by 1s when it hits.

moves.name: Shadow Sneak
moves.description: Cast a shadow in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies hit. After the shadow hits an enemy or travels its maximum distance, Aegislash warps to the shadow’s location, dealing damage to nearby enemies and increase boost count by 1.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Casts a shadow toward the designated location, damaging opposing Pokémon hit. After hitting an opposing Pokémon or traveling maximum distance; warps to the shadow’s location, damaging opposing Pokémon at the location.

Increases the boost count by 1 if the warp hits an opposing Pokémon.

moves.name: Sacred Sword
moves.description:
Aegislash thrusts its blade into the ground, creating a triangular zone. This zone erupts with a hidden power, dealing damage to enemies in the area and throws them. Also increases boost count by 1 for each enemy hit (capped at 2 for wilds, 4 for players). At the same time as the eruption, Aegislash slashes forward, dealing additional damage to enemies hit. For a short time after this slash hits, damage dealt by Aegislash partially ignores the Defense of all enemies.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increase Attack for a short time after hitting enemies with this move.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Thrusts their blade into the ground and creates a triangular zone that erupts with a hidden power, damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of effect and throwing them for 0.6s. At the same time as the eruption, slashes forward, dealing more damage to opposing Pokémon hit; and increasing Defense penetration by 25% for 3s if the slash hits.

Increases the boost count by 1 for each target hit by the triangular zone erupting (up to 2 from hitting wild Pokémon).

Upgrade (Level 11): Increases Attack by 50 for 3s after the triangular zone hits.

moves.name: Shadow Claw
moves.description:
Aegislash slashes with its blade twice in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies hit. Follow up with a final rising slash that deals damage to enemies hit and throw them. Boost count increases by 1 when at least one of the three slashes hits.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increases Critical-Hit Rate with all attacks and moves except for Coup de Grace for a short time.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Slashes forward with their blade twice, damaging opposing Pokémon with each attack, then follows up with a final rising slash, damaging opposing Pokémon and throwing them for 0.75s when the rising slash hits.

Increases the boost count by 1 if this move hits.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increases critical-hit rate by 20% for 1s after the final slash.

moves.name: Iron Defense
moves.description: Envelops Aegislash in a powerful protective force for 1s. The protection disappears after blocking one attack or after 1s and then increases boost count by 1.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Envelops the user in a powerful protective force for up to 3s, blocking the next attack.

Increases the boost count by 1 when this move blocks an attack.

moves.name: Wide Guard
moves.description:
Focus in place for a short time to create a great shield on Aegislash. When this shield appears, boost count increases by 1, granting a shield to Aegislash and shoves enemies in front. While this shield is active, enemy player attacks increase boost count by 1 for each different enemy player (capping at 4). When this move ends, shove enemies in front of Aegislash once again.

Upgrade (Level 13): Cooldown reduced by 1s.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Focuses in place, becomes unstoppable and grants a shield effect for up to 1.2s; and shoves opposing Pokémon in front for 0.6s. This move can be used again to end the move early. When the shield effect is depleted or the move ends; shoves opposing Pokémon in front for 0.6s and decreases their movement speed by 45% for 2s.

8.5% max HP

Increases the boost count by 1 unconditionally when granting the shield effect. Increases the boost count by 1 more for each instance of damage received by the shield effect (up to 2 times). Increases boost count by 1 more if an opposing Pokémon is shoved at the end or unconditionally when the shield effect is depleted before it can end normally.

Upgrade (Level 13): Reduces this move's cooldown by 1s.

moves.name: Iron Head
moves.description:
Dash in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies hit. Also increases boost count by 1, and protects Aegislash with a special shield for a short time afterward. This shield doesn’t protect from hindrances, but it can nullify damage. When the shield blocks an attack, it disappears and boost count is increased by 1.

Upgrade (Level 13): Increase Attack for a short time after blocking an attack.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Dashes barreling forward, damaging opposing Pokémon hit. Protects the user with a special shield for 1s afterward; this shield blocks the damage of the next attack then disappears; reducing this move's cooldown by 3s after a successful block.

Increases the boost count by 1 unconditionally after barreling forward. Increases the boost count by 1 more if the shield blocks an attack.

Upgrade (Level 13): Increases Attack by 10% for 3s when the special shield blocks an attack.

moves.name: Coup de Grace
moves.description: Unleash a ground-splitting slash in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies hit. The lower their remaining HP, the more damage this move deals. If this slash knocks out an enemy, boost count increases by 1.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Becomes unstoppable and unleashes a ground-splitting slash in the designated direction, damaging opposing Pokémon in the line area of effect, dealing additional missing HP damage to those hit.

12% missing HP as damage.

Increases the boost count by 2 if this Unite Move knocks out an opposing Pokémon.

passiveAbility.name: No Guard
passiveAbility.description: Honedge and Doublade do not gain the stat benefits of Stance Change. However, their boosted attack functions like Aegislash's Sword Stance boosted attack.
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced: Honedge and Doublade do not gain the stat benefits of Stance Change; their auto attacks act like Aegislash's Sword Forme auto attacks.

moves.name: Attack
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Attacks by throwing whip cream.

Milcery and Alcremie do not have a boosted attack.

moves.name: Helping Hand
moves.description: Has the user grant a designated ally Pokémon a shield and increase that Pokémon's Attack and Sp. Atk for a short time.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Grant a designated ally Pokémon or yourself a shield for 3s, in addition to increasing the recipients Attack by 40 and Special Attack by 25 for 3s

moves.name: Decorate
moves.description: Has the user grant a designated ally Pokémon a shield. Each time the shielded ally Pokémon attacks with a basic attack, it deals additional damage. When the user's sweet gauge becomes full, the additional damage this move grants the shielded ally Pokémon is even greater. When used on an ally, the user also gains a shield that does not deal additional damage.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Grant a designated ally Pokémon or yourself a shield for 4s. If the shield is granted to an ally Pokémon, Alcremie receives an extra shield of the same value. Basic and boosted attacks by the shielded Pokémon will deal additional damage and increase Alcremie's Sweet Gauge by 1 for 6s. The extra shield Alcremie receives when using Decorate on an ally does not apply additional damage to Alcremie's attacks. Alcremie's basic attacks will also increase the Sweet Gauge by 1. When empowered by a full Sweet Gauge, the attacks deal even more additional damage.

The additional damage depends on the shielded Pokémon's level. Only one main Decorate shield can be active at a time.

Upgrade (Level 10): Increases the strength of the shield.

moves.name: Recover
moves.description: Has the user place a dollop of whipped cream at the designated location. The dollop stays at that location for a short time. When an ally Pokémon picks up the dollop, their HP is restored, their movement speed increases and the user's sweet gauge increases. When the user's sweet gauge si full, the next dollop becomes sweeter, restoring more HP and increasing movement speed even more.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Place a dollop of whipped cream at a designated location for up to 20s. When an ally Pokémon picks up the whipped cream, their HP is restored and their movement speed is increased by 15% for 2s. When whipped cream is consumed by ally Pokémon, the Sweet Gauge is also increased by 3. When the Sweet Gauge is full, the next dollop becomes sweeter, restoring more HP and increasing their movement speed by 40% for 2s instead and increases the Sweet Gauge by 5. Two dollops may be kept in reserve.

An ally Snorlax will heal additional HP from the dollops.

Upgrade (Level 10): The maximum number of uses that can be kept in reserve is increased to 3.

moves.name: Charm
moves.description: Has the user send its cute voice in the designated direction, applying a slowing effect on opposing Pokémon it hits, dercreasing their Attack and Sp. At and increasing the user's sweet gauge.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Charm a target Pokémon with your cute voice, dealing damage to the first Pokémon hit. Pokémon hit by the charm have their Attack reduced by 30 and Special Attack reduced by 20 and movement speed reduced by 30% for 2s. Additionally, increases the sweet gauge by 2.

moves.name: Dazzling Gleam
moves.description: Has the user release a ray of light in the designated direction, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits, leaving them unable to act, and increasing the user's sweet gauge. If an ally Pokémon has a shield granted by Decorate, that Pokémon releases a ray of light as well.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Release a conal ray of light in a designated direction, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon, stunning them for 0.4s and increasing the Sweet Gauge by 4 for every opposing Pokémon hit. If an ally Pokémon has been affected by Decorate, the decorated Pokémon will also release a conal ray of light.

Alcremie can move around while casting this move, but is slowed by 20%.

Upgrade (Level 12): Increases the damage of this move.

moves.name: Sweet Scent
moves.description: Has the user launch a sweet scent at a designated location, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon. A circle of scent remains for a short time, dealing damage, applying a slowing effect to opposing Pokémon that touch it, and increasing the user's sweet gauge.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Launch a sweet scent at a designated location, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon in the area and lowering their movement speed by 30%, decaying by 10% every 0.5s. The outer ring of the scent remains for 3s, dealing damage, applying a 100% slow lasting 0.5s to oppposing Pokémon who touch the ring. Both the intial area and outer ring can hit at the same time. Increases the Sweet Gauge by 2 for every hit.

Upgrade (Level 12): Increases the duration of the outer ring slow to 1.5s.

moves.name: Fluffy Cream Supreme
moves.description: Has the user create a giant cake and stand on it, granting the user a shield. The user then sends whipped cream to nearby ally Pokémon. Ally Pokémon who receive whipped cream have their HP restored and their max HP increased for a short time. The Unite Move ends when the user loses its shield.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Create a giant cake and stand atop it becoming unstoppable and gaining a shield for 6s. Then throw whipped cream at allies. Allies who receive whipped cream are healed and have their maximum HP buffed for 8s. This move ends early if this move's shield is lost, Alcremie becomes bound, or if the move is manually cancelled.

The shield is 60% of Alcremie's max HP

passiveAbility.name: Aroma Veil
passiveAbility.description: When an ally is under the effect of one of Alcremie's shields or buffs, remove any hindrances that are applied or are currently affecting that ally. This ability will go on cooldown for 10s after removing a hindrance. This ability can also work on Alcremie as well.
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced:
When an ally is under the effect of one of Alcremie's shields or buffs, remove any hindrances that are applied or are currently affecting that ally. This ability will go on cooldown for 10s after removing a hindrance. This ability can also work on Alcremie as well.

When Milcery evolves into Alcremie, gain a Sweet Gauge. When the Sweet Gauge is filled at 15 stacks, the cooldown of one charge of Recover and Decorate will be reset. These moves will also be empowered.

moves.name: Attack - Charcadet
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage.

moves.name: Incinerate
moves.description: Has the user attack the designated opposing Pokémon with a flame, setting it ablaze and dealing damage over time for a short time. When a Pokémon on the opposing team that's ablaze picks up a berry, the berry's effects are halved.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Has the user attack the designated opposing Pokémon with a flame, setting them ablaze and dealing damage over time for 4s. When a Pokémon on the opposing team that's ablaze picks up a Berry, the Berry's effects are halved.

moves.name: Fire Spin
moves.description: Has the user generate a fierce vortex of fire around itself, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits and increasing the user's movement speed. When the user is moving toward Pokémon on the opposing team, its movement speed is further increased. Whenever the user deals damage, it receives a shield effect. This effect can stack up to 6 times.If the user hits opposing Pokémon with a basic attack, the duration of the vortex is increased.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Has the user generate a fierce vortex of fire around themself, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon hit every 0.5s. Each time Armarouge deals damage while Fire Spin is active, gain a shield. This shield can stack up to six times.

Gain 20% movement speed while the vortex is active. The vortex lasts 3s, and its duration is increased by 1s if the user hits opposing Pokémon with an auto attack. This extended duration can stack up to 3 times, to a total vortex duration of 6s. Moving towards an enemy will additionally increase movement speed by 10%.

Upgrade (Level 11): Upon using Fire Spin+, gain 3 stacks of shields.

moves.name: Armor Cannon
moves.description: Has the user combine its shoulder armor and charge power, then fire a blazing ball of flame. The user releases a shock wave in front of itself when firing, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon. The fired ball of flame explodes when it hits an opposing Pokémon or after it travels a set distance, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon and leaving them unable to act. The user's Def and Sp. Def are decreased for a short time after using this move.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Has the user combine their shoulder armor and start charging power. When charged past a minimum duration, the user then fires a blazing ball of flame. The user releases a shock wave in front of themself when firing, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon in close range.

The fired ball of flame explodes when it hits an opposing Pokémon or after it travels a set distance, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon and leaving them unable to act for 0.45s. The user's Defense and Sp. Def are decreased by 5% while this move is on cooldown.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increases the range of this move and auto attacks.

moves.name: Will-o-Wisp
moves.description: Has the user shoot a flame in the designated direction, dealing damage and applying a slowing effect to opposing Pokémon it hits and leaving hem burned for a short time. After using this move, the user's next basic attack becomes a boosted attack.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Has the user shoot a flame in the designated direction, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon hit, leaving them burned and decreasing their movement speed by 20% for 2s. After using this move, the user's next auto attack becomes a boosted attack.

moves.name: Flame Charge
moves.description: Has the user cloak itself in flame and charge in the designated direction, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits and shoving them. When this move hits an opposing Pokémon, the user is granted a shield and this move's cooldown is reduced. For a short time after using this move, the cannon gauge becomes full and will not decrease after boosted attacks are used.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Has the user cloak themself in flame and charge in the designated direction, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon the user hits and shoving them for 0.45s. When this move hits an opposing Pokémon, the user is granted a shield for 3s and this move's cooldown is reduced by 20%.

For 3s after using this move, the cannon gauge becomes full and will not decrease after boosted attacks are used.

Upgrade (Level 13): Reduces the damage the user receives by 20% for 3s after this move hits an opposing Pokémon.

moves.name: Psyshock
moves.description: Has the user materialize odd psychic waves to attack in three areas of effect in front of itself, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits while partially ignoring their Sp. Def and applying a slowing effect. The 3rd attack throws opposing Pokémon it hits. For a short time after using this move, the cannon gauge becomes full and will not decrease after boosted attacks are used.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Has the user materialize odd psychic waves to attack in three areas of effect in front of themself, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon hit while ignoring 35% of their Sp. Def. The third attack throws opposing Pokémon hit for 0.7s. Multiple of the areas of effect can hit the same opposing Pokémon but the second damage instance will be reduced by 25% and the third by 50%.

For 3s after using this move, the cannon gauge becomes full and will not decrease after boosted attacks are used.

Upgrade (Level 13): Increases this move's area of effect for the third area blast.

moves.name: Psykaboom
moves.description: Has the user jump up and charge psychic power, then create an area that leaves opposing Pokémon unable to move. While the user is charging psychic power, the position of the area can be adjusted. The user then fires a ball of flame toward the center of the area, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon and throwing them outside of the area.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Has the user jump up, becoming unstoppable for 1.85s, and charge psychic power for 1s, then create an area that leaves opposing Pokémon unable to act. While the user is charging psychic power, the Unite Move can be used again to adjust the position of the area. The user then fires a ball of flame towards the center of the area, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon and throwing them away from the center of the area.

passiveAbility.name: Flash Fire
passiveAbility.description: When this Pokémon takes Sp. Atk-based damage from opposing Pokémon, the damage this Pokémon takes is reduced by 20% for 3s, and their next auto attack deals additional damage. This Ability goes on a 10s cooldown after it ends.
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced: When this Pokémon takes Sp. Atk-based damage from opposing Pokémon, the damage this Pokémon takes is reduced by 20% for 3s, and their next auto attack deals additional damage. This Ability goes on a 10s cooldown after it ends.

moves.name: Attack
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user hurls a shard of ice at the designated target, applying a 30% slow for 0.3s.

Articuno has no boosted attack.

moves.name: Icy Wind
moves.description: Has the user blast a gust of chilled air in the designated direction, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon and causing snow to fall, freezing the ground for a short time.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user blasts a gust of chilled air in a cone, in the designated direction dealing damage and freezing the ground for a short while.

Opposing Pokémon standing on the frozen ground will have their freeze counter increased over time.

moves.name: Blizzard
moves.description: Has the user summon a howling blizzard centered on itself, applying a freeze counter and dealing damage to opposing Pokémon. If an opposing Pokémon’s freeze counter reaches 5, that Pokémon becomes frozen.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user summons a howling blizzard dealing damage and increasing the freeze counter on enemies hit.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increases the amount of hits to 8.

moves.name: Ice Shard
moves.description: Has the user hurl a chunk of ice in the designated direction, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits. If this move hits an opposing Pokémon that has a freeze counter, that Pokémon becomes instantly frozen. If this move hits an opposing Pokémon that is frozen, the ice shatters to deal additional damage.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user hurls a chunk of ice in the designated direction, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon hit and slowing them by 40% for 2.5s.

If the target has at least 1 stack of the freeze counter, they will become frozen consuming the counter. If the target is already frozen the move instead deals increased damage.

moves.name: Ice Beam
moves.description: Has the user shoot out a beam of icy-cold energy in the designated direction, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon. If this move hits an opposing Pokémon that has a freeze counter, that Pokémon becomes frozen. If this move hits an opposing Pokémon that is frozen, the ice shatters to deal additional damage.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user fires a slow traveling beam of icy cold energy in the designated direction, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon and slowing them by 30% for 2.5s.

If the target has at least 1 stack of the freeze counter, they will become frozen consuming the counter. If the target is already frozen the move instead deals increased damage.

Upgrade (Level 13): Increases the freeze duration to 2s when opponents are frozen by the move.

moves.name: Ice Wing Whiteout
moves.description: Increases the duration this move leaves opposing Pokémon frozen.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user becomes Unstoppable and immobile, summoning a raging blizzard centered on themself, dealing damage in 5 waves. The second wave deals 5% more damage, third 10%, fourth 15%, and the fifth deals 100% more damage.

9000 HP, 0 Def and SpDef. Unaffected by some status effects and damage over time.

If the move hits an ally goal zone, a chunk of ice forms on the zone, blocking movement and scoring. The goal zone still provides healing and shielding by standing at the edge of it. This chunk of ice will remain until it is destroyed.

passiveAbility.name: Snow Cloak
passiveAbility.description: After Ice Shard or Ice Beam is used, the user gains 10% damage resistance for 4s; after Icy Wind, Blizzard, or Unite Move is used the user gains 20% damage resistance for 5s. If move 1 or Unite Move is used after move 2 activated the ability, then the effect is dynamically upgraded to the improved version. Afterwards the ability goes on cooldown for 10s.
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced:
After Ice Shard or Ice Beam is used, the user gains 10% damage resistance for 4s; after Icy Wind, Blizzard, or Unite Move is used the user gains 20% damage resistance for 5s. If move 1 or Unite Move is used after move 2 activated the ability, then the effect is dynamically upgraded to the improved version. Afterwards the ability goes on cooldown for 10s.

Icy Wind, Blizzard, and Ice Wing Whiteout apply a freeze counter on opposing Pokémon when they hit. This freeze counter goes up to 5 stacks, lasts for 3s and refreshes when another stack is applied, and applies a stacking 12% slow based on the amount of stacks of the freeze counter. Once the freeze counter reaches 5 stacks, that Pokémon gets frozen for 1.1s.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage to enemies within a cone area of effect in front of this Pokémon.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage to enemies within a cone area of effect in front of this Pokémon.

moves.name: Tackle
moves.description: Charge forward, dealing damage to any enemy hit and leave them unable to act for a short time.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Charge forward; dealing damage to any enemy hit and leave them unable to act for 0.5s.

moves.name: Play Rough
moves.description:
Increases movement speed for a short time and changes the next basic attack. When Azumarill performs their next basic attack, lunge at one enemy in range and deliver repeated blows; dealing damage to that target and leave it unable to act for a short time.

Upgrade (Level 12): Further increases movement speed when this move is used, and also reduces this move’s cooldown.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Increase movement speed by 30% for 4s and change the next auto attack. When performing the next auto attack, lunge at one enemy in range and deliver repeated blows dealing damage to that target and leave it unable to act for .75s.

Using Play Rough will overwrite any active Aqua Tail attack change. Play Rough attacks count as auto attacks for the purpose of items, lifesteal and other benefits.

Upgrade (Level 12): Further increases movement speed to 35% when this move is used, and also reduces this move’s cooldown by 1s.

moves.name: Water Pulse
moves.description:
Shoot a pulsing blast of water in front of Azumarill. When the blast of water hits an enemy, decrease that Pokémon’s movement speed and deal damage to all enemies in an area of effect around the initial target hit. The blast of water then automatically bounces to another target if one is available. Including the first target, the blast of water can bounce between up to 3 targets consecutively, and each hit behaves in the same way as the first. While the blast of water is traveling, Azumarill can perform a short rolling dash in a designated direction.

Upgrade (Level 12): Increase the maximum number of targets that the blast of water can bounce between by 2.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Shoot a pulsing blast of water in front of Azumarill. When shooting the blast, Azumarill may perform a short rolling dash in a designated direction. When the blast of water hits an enemy, decrease their movement speed by 40% for 2s and deal damage to all enemies in an area of effect around the initial target. The blast of water then automatically bounces to another target if one is available. Including the first target, the blast of water can bounce between up to three targets consecutively, and each hit behaves in the same way as the first.

moves.name: Bubble
moves.description: Spray bubbles in a cone; dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and decrease their movement speed for a short time. This move can be used while moving.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Spray bubbles in a cone dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and decreasing their movement speed by 30% for 2s. This move can be used while moving.

Subsequent hits on the same target deal 25% damage.

moves.name: Whirlpool
moves.description:
For a short time, four small whirlpools appear that swirl around Azumarill as they move. If a whirlpool hits an enemy, the whirlpool deals damage and restores Azumarill's HP. If a whirlpool hits an enemy player, an increased amount of HP is restored.

Upgrade (Level 10): Reduce this move’s cooldown and increases the amount of HP it restored.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
For 5s, four small whirlpools appear that swirl around Azumarill as it moves. If a whirlpool hits a wild Pokémon, the whirlpool deals damage to them and restores Azumarill's HP. If a whirlpool hits an enemy player, an increased amount of HP is restored.

Moving clockwise against your target will grant more hits against that target, and counter-clockwise will reduce the number of hits.

Upgrade (Level 10): Reduces this move’s cooldown by 2s and increases the amount of HP restored.

moves.name: Aqua Tail
moves.description:
Increases the speed and area of effect of Azumarill's next 3 basic attacks. If these basic attacks hit from a distance, they also deal increased damage, restore Azumarill's HP, and can ignore the Defense stat and shield effects of enemies hit.

Upgrade (Level 10): After activating this move, Azumarill's next 3 basic attacks will also reduce the cooldown of all moves when they hit an enemy from a distance.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Increase area-of-effect and attack speed for the next three auto attacks by 20% for 6s. If these auto attacks hit from a distance, they also deal increased damage and restore HP. Using Aqua Tail will overwrite any active Play Rough attack change.

Aqua Tail attacks count as auto attacks for the purpose of items, lifesteal and other benefits.

Upgrade (Level 10): Aqua Tail attacks that hit from a distance reduce the cooldown of all moves by 0.8s.

moves.name: Belly Bash
moves.description: Azumarill pounds their belly 3 times, granting a shield. With each pound, Azumarill loses HP in exchange for increased Attack. Azumarill can move while pounding their belly. Afterward, target an enemy and then charge at the target; dealing damage to them and throwing all enemies hit while charging.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Azumarill targets an enemy player and then pounds their belly three times; losing 5% remaining HP with each pound in exchange for a 6.5% max HP shield that stacks with each pound and lasts 6s. Azumarill gains increased attack for 8s and can move while pounding their belly. Azumarill then charges at the target damaging and throwing all Pokémon hit while charging and Pokémon within the area effect around the target. Azumarill is unstoppable during this move.

passiveAbility.name: Huge Power
passiveAbility.description: When this Pokémon hits only a single enemy with a basic attack, a move, or their Unite Move, the hit is always a critical hit. However, when hitting two or more enemies at once with a basic attack, a move, or its Unite Move, the hits are never critical hits.
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced:
When this Pokémon hits only a single enemy with an auto attack, a move, or their Unite Move, the hit is always a critical hit. However, when hitting two or more enemies at once with an auto attack, a move, or its Unite Move, the hits are never critical hits.

Critical hits deal 170% rather than 200%.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Blastoise’s third auto attack is empowered - dealing 3 instances of damage, slowing enemies hit and reducing Blastoise’s move cooldowns by 1 second each.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, reducing the cooldowns of the user's moves by 1s; damaging opposing Pokémon 3 times over 0.2s, and decreasing their movement speed by 50% for 1s when hit.

When evolving into Blastoise, basic attacks hit once, but deals damage as 2 instances of 50% Attack.

Boosted attacks used during Rapid Spin hit 3 times over 0.5s, do not reduce the cooldowns of the user's moves, nor decrease the movement speed of opposing Pokémon hit.

moves.name: Water Gun
moves.description: Attacks with a shot of water, shoving enemies and decreasing their movement speed for a short time.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Shoots a jet of water in the designated direction after 0.2s, damaging opposing Pokémon hit, shoving them for 0.6s and decreasing their movement speed by 30% for 1s when hit. Opposing Pokémon hit before the jet of water reaches halfway are shoved the full distance; those hit beyond halfway are shoved a short distance instead.

moves.name: Hydro Pump
moves.description:
Has the user attack by blasing out a huge volume of water, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon and shoving them when it hits.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increases damage dealt by this move.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Blasts out a huge amount of water in the designated direction, damaging opposing Pokémon hit 3 times in 0.1s, shoving them and stunning them for 0.6s when hit. Opposing Pokémon hit before the blast of water reaches halfway are shoved the full distance; those hit beyond halfway are shoved a short distance instead.

When used during Rapid Spin: Blastoise unleashes a large burst of water in a radius around themself, damaging enemies, knocking them back and stunning those hit for 0.75s. Blastoise also gains a 30% movement speed bonus for the duration of this move.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increased move damage.

moves.name: Water Spout
moves.description:
Spouts water toward the designated location, decreasing the movement speed of opposing Pokémon in the area of effect for a short time.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increases damage dealt by this move.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Casts down a barrage of water at the designated area, damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of effect every 0.5s over 3s (up to 6 times) and decreasing their movement speed by 20% for 2s when hit.

When used during Rapid Spin: increases movement speed by 30%, and rapidly spouts bursts of water in different directions around themself, damaging opposing over time when held for the duration of Rapid Spin (up to a possible 17 times). The first hit of Water Spout during Rapid Spin on an opposing Pokémon decreases the target's movement speed; subsequent hits will not.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increased move damage.

moves.name: Skull Bash
moves.description: Fiercely rams an opposing Pokémon and leaves it unable to act.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Tucks in their head then dashes forward after 0.5s, damaging opposing Pokémon in the path and stunning them for 0.5s when it hits.

moves.name: Surf
moves.description:
Has the user charge forward on a wave, shoving enemies and leaving them unable to act. The user becomes immune to hindrances while using this move and can jump in a designated direction once this move ends.

Upgrade (Level 13): Also grants a shield when this move hits.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Blastoise rides a wave of water, becoming Unstoppable for 1.6s. Blastoise can then jump off the wave in the designated direction, while the wave continues to travel. Blastoise gains a shield if the wave damages a Pokemon. Enemy Pokemon that make contact with the wave take damage and are stunned and shoved for 1.6s. The wave can be stopped by walls, and will deal no damage once Blastoise has jumped off.

Upgrade (Level 13): Increases the strength of the shield.

moves.name: Rapid Spin
moves.description:
Has the user spin rapidly, changing the mechanics of its basic attacks as well as its Hydro Pump and Water Spout moves.

Upgrade (Level 13): Also reduces the damage the user receives while using this move.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Withdraws into their shell, resetting the cooldown of Hydro Pump or Water Spout and gaining hindrance resistance for the duration of this move; then starts rapidly spinning while moving freely for up to 5s or when used again to stop spinning and end this move. Damages opposing Pokémon in contact with the user every 0.5s while spinning (up to 10 times).

While spinning: changes the mechanics of auto attacks and Hydro Pump or Water Spout. When this move ends: comes out of their shell and readies a boosted attack. The user cannot perform any actions for 0.45s while withdrawing or coming out of their shell.

Upgrade (Level 13): Increases Defense and Sp. Def while using this move.

moves.name: Hydro Typhoon
moves.description: Has the user spout water to attack while spinning, throwing enemies in a large area. This also grants the user a shield.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Becomes unstoppable for 2s and gains a shield for 4s; shoots immense jets of water in a large circle around themself after 1.1s, damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of effect and throwing them for 1.5s when it hits.

passiveAbility.name: Torrent
passiveAbility.description: When the Pokémon is at half HP or less, its Attack and Sp. Attack are increased.
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced: While at 50% max HP or below: increases Attack and Sp. Atk by 20%.

moves.name: Attack
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Deals damage to nearby enemies. While in Kick Style, basic attacks have a higher area-of-effect and reach. While in Punch Style, attack speed is increased by 40%.

For the purpose of auto attacks, Torchic is treated as punch style while Combusken is treated as kick style. Once Blaziken has access to their Unite move, they can swap between styles.

moves.name: Aerial Ace
moves.description: Has the user dash in the designated direction, slashing in front of itself and dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits.When the user hits an opposing Pokémon with this move, for a short time, this move can be used again once only.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Dash in a designated direction, dealing damage to enemies that come in contact with the dash. If this move hits an enemy, this move may be used again once within 4 seconds before being put on cooldown.

moves.name: Fire Punch
moves.description: Has the user unleash a flaming punch in the designated direction, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits.The designated direction can be changed during the move.When the user hits an opposing Pokémon with this move, for a short time, this move can be used again once only.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Unleash 2 flaming punches in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies hit. The designated direction can be changed during this move. When the user hits an enemy with this move, for a short time, this move can be used once more.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increases damage dealt.

moves.name: Overheat
moves.description: Has the user start charging power in place. If this move is used again after the user has started charging, the user unleashes a flaming kick in the designated direction, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits.The longer power is charged, the more damage this move deals. If the user charges a set amount of power or more, this move also shoves opposing Pokémon it hits.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Become Hindrance Resistant, reduce incoming damage by 25%, and charge power in place in a designated direction. If used again, unleash a flaming kick in the designed direction, dealing damage to enemies hit. The longer the duration the charge is held for, the more damage this move deals. If the user charges a certain amount of power (when the gauge reaches the line indicator), this move also shoves enemies hit.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increases damage dealt.

moves.name: Ember
moves.description: Has the user release a small ball of fire in the designated direction, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits and decreasing their movement speed.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Release a small ball of fire in the designated direction, dealing damage in a small area around the first enemy hit and decreases their movement speed by 50% for 1s.

moves.name: Focus Blast
moves.description: Has the user fire a ball of focused energy in the designated direction.The ball of focused energy explodes upon hitting an opposing Pokémon or after traveling a set distance, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon in the explosion's area of effect and decreasing their movement speed.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Fire a ball of focused energy in the designated direction. The ball of focused energy explodes upon hitting an enemy or after traveling a set distance, dealing damage to enemies  in the explosion's area-of-effect and decreasing their movement speed by 35% for 2s.

Upgrade (Level 13): Increases the movement speed decrease to 60%.

moves.name: Blaze Kick
moves.description: Has the user unleash a kick while leaping toward the designated location, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits and shoving them. The shoved opposing Pokémon will have their movement speed decreased for a short time.If the shoved opposing Pokémon come in contact with a wall, they will be left unable to act instead of having their movement speed decreased.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Jump backwards then kick while leaping towards a designated location, becoming Unstoppable during the jump and kick animation. Deal damage to enemies hit by the kick and shove them. The shoved enemies will have their movement speed decreased by 30% for 2s. If the shoved enemies come in contact with a wall, they will be stunned instead for 1s. Blaze Kick cannot go over walls.

Upgrade (Level 13): Increases the movement speed decrease to 50%. Increases the stun duration to 1.5s if hitting a wall.

moves.name: Spinning Flame Fist
moves.description: Has the user do a flaming punch around itself, dealing damage to nearby opposing Pokémon it hits and increasing the user's movement speed for a short time. After using this move, the user switches to fist style.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Perform a flaming punch around itself, dealing damage to nearby enemies hit and increase the user's movement speed by 20% for 4s. After using this move, the user switches to Punch Style and all Punch Style cooldowns are reset.

moves.name: Spinning Flame Kick
moves.description: Has the user do a flaming kick around itself, dealing damage to nearby opposing Pokémon it hits and increasing the user's Attack for a short time. After using this move, the user switches to kick style.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Perform a flaming kick around itself, dealing damage to nearby enemies hit and increase the user's Attack stat by 30% for a 4s. After using this move, the user switches to Kick Style and all Kick Style cooldowns are reset.

passiveAbility.name: Blaze
passiveAbility.description: When this Pokémon hits an enemy with an auto attack or move, that enemy receives a fire fragment for 4s and the duration of all other fire fragments on that enemy are refreshed. When an enemy has 5 fire fragments, all 5 are consumed to deal additional damage to the enemy and restore the user's HP. When this Pokémon's HP is at half or lower, more HP is restored.
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced:
When this Pokémon hits an enemy with an auto attack or move, that enemy receives a fire fragment for 4s and the duration of all other fire fragments on that enemy are refreshed. When an enemy has 5 fire fragments, all 5 are consumed to deal additional damage to the enemy and restore the user's HP. When this Pokémon's HP is at half or lower, more HP is restored.

10% Max HP

15% Max HP

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack after a set amount of time passes, dealing increased damage.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Becomes a boosted attack after 6s, dealing increased damage. This boosted attack remains readied until used.

moves.name: Pound
moves.description: Has the user attack by pounding in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and decreasing their movement speed for a short time when it hits.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: The user pounds in the designated direction, damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of effect and decreasing their movement speed by 40% for 2s.

moves.name: Egg Bomb
moves.description:
Hurls an egg at the designated location. The egg then explodes, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and throwing them.

Upgrade (Level 12): Also decreases the movement speed of enemies for a short time when they are thrown by this move.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user hurls an egg at the designated location that explodes, damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of effect and throwing them away from the center of impact for 0.8s. A maximum of 2 uses can be kept in reserve for this move, and there is a 2s cooldown between uses.

If the user learns both Soft-Boiled and Egg Bomb, the uses kept in reserve for Egg Bomb is added to Soft-Boiled's reserve pool; this reserve pool is shared between both moves. The base cooldown for both moves becomes 5s. The cooldown between using the same move remains at 2s.

Upgrade (Level 12): Decreases the movement speed of opposing Pokémon hit by 40% for 2s.

moves.name: Helping Hand
moves.description:
For a short time, greatly increases the user's and nearby allies movement speed and basic attack speed. While this move's effects last, all of the user's basic attacks become boosted attacks.

Upgrade (Level 12): Increases the damage of basic attacks while this move's effects last.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user increases the movement speed and basic attack speed of themself and nearby teammates by 30% for 4s. When buffed, the user's auto attacks also become boosted attacks.

Upgrade (Level 12): Increases the auto attack damage of all teammates buffed by this move by 15% for 4s.

moves.name: Heal Pulse
moves.description: Continually restores the user's and designated ally HP for a short time.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: The user restores the HP of themself and a designated teammate every 0.5s over 2s.

moves.name: Soft-Boiled
moves.description:
Throws an egg to an ally, restoring its HP as well as the user's HP. A maximum of 3 uses can be kept in reserve for this move and cannot be used more than once every 2s.

Upgrade (Level 10): Increases the maximum number of uses that can be kept in reserve.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user throws an egg to a designated teammate, restoring the HP of themself and the designated teammate. The user and the designated teammate restore HP over time every 1s over 2s afterward. Subsequent uses of this move overwrites any HP over time the user and the designated teammate is yet to restore from previous uses. A maximum of 2 uses can be kept in reserve for this move, and there is a 2s cooldown between uses.

Upgrade (Level 10): Gains 1 additional use kept in reserve.

moves.name: Safeguard
moves.description:
Blissey grants both the targeted ally and themself a shield, purging hindrances and making both immune to hindrances as long as the shield lasts.

Upgrade (Level 10): Shield value increased.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user cleanses themself and a designated teammate, and grants the user and the teammate a shield that makes them unstoppable for 4s.

Upgrade (Level 10): Strengthens the value of the shield effect.

moves.name: Bliss Assistance
moves.description: Has the user dash to the designated ally to give it an egg, granting that ally a shield and increasing its Attack and Sp. Attack for a short time. The user also intercepts a portion of the damage received by that ally for a short time. While dashing, the user throws nearby enemies and those it comes in contact with.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: The user becomes unstoppable and dashes to the designated ally Pokémon to give it an egg, granting that ally a shield and increasing their Attack and Sp. Atk by 20% for 6s. The user also intercepts 50% of the post-mitigation damage received by that ally as unmitigated damage for 6s. While dashing, opposing Pokémon hit are damaged and thrown into the air for 0.8s. When reaching the target ally, nearby opposing Pokémon are damaged again.

passiveAbility.name: Natural Cure
passiveAbility.description: Removes all status condition from the Pokémon. This ability goes on cooldown after it's triggered.
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced: Automatically cleanses this Pokémon every 6s, even if there are no effects to cleanse.

moves.name: Attack
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Each time a basic attack hits an enemy, increase muscle gauge by 1 increment. Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, throwing two consecutive punches while restoring Buzzwole's HP and increasing muscle gauge by 1 increment for each hit.

moves.name: Mega Punch
moves.description: Has the user move in the designated direction before slamming the ground with a powerful punch. The shock from the punch deals damage to opposing Pokémon in the area of effect. If this move hits Pokémon from the opposing team, the user's muscle gauge increases by 1 increment for each one that was hit.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Jump in the designated direction before slamming the ground with a powerful punch. The shock from the punch deals damage to enemies in the area. Muscle gauge increases by 1 increment for each target hit.

moves.name: Lunge
moves.description: Has the user lunge in the designated direction, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon and decreasing their Attack for a short time. If this move hits Pokémon from the opposing team, the user's muscle gauge increases by 1 increment for each one that was hit. After this move is used, the user's basic attack speed increases for a short time. A maximum of 2 uses can be kept in reserve for this move.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Lunge in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies, decreasing their Attack by 30% for 2.5s and slowing them by 30% for 1s. If this move deals damage, muscle gauge increases by 1 increment for each enemy hit. After this move is used, Buzzwole's basic attack speed is increased by 30% for 2s. Holds 2 uses in reserve and cannot be used more than once every 1s.

Upgrade (Level 13): Whenever this move hits enemy players, Buzzwole's Attack increases by 10% for 2s for each player hit (up to a max of 5 stacks).

moves.name: Smack Down
moves.description: Has the user deliver an uppercut punch to an opposing Pokémon in the designated direction, dealing damage to it and throwing it into the air. While the thrown Pokémon is airborne, the user can use this move again to perform a follow-up attack that smacks that Pokémon down to the ground, dealing damage to all opposing Pokémon in an area of effect centered on the smacked-down Pokémon. If the user does not follow up on the initial uppercut attack, the opposing Pokémon will fall to the ground on its own. If this occurs, damage is still dealt to all opposing Pokémon in an area of effect centered on the point of impact. If this move deals damage to Pokémon on the opposing team, the user's muscle gauge increases by 1 increment for each one that was hit.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Deliver an uppercut punch in the designated direction. The first Pokémon hit takes damage and is thrown into the air, ending with a slam on the ground that deals damage to all enemies in an area centered on the previously airborne enemy. Muscle gauge increases by 1 increment for each enemy damaged by the initial hit and slam.

For a time after the initial hit, buzzwole can activate this move again to teleport to the target and slam them into the ground at their current position, ending the airborne travel instantly.

Upgrade (Level 13): Widens the area-of-effect in which damage is dealt when the grappled enemy slams the ground. Additionally, muscle gauge will now increase by 2 increments for each enemy player hit from the slam.

moves.name: Fell Stinger
moves.description: Consumes the entire muscle gauge and has the user deal damage to an opposing Pokémon in the designated direction. This move deals more damage the more muscle gauge increments are consumed. If this move knocks out an opposing Pokémon, the user recovers HP.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Consumes the entire muscle gauge and has the user deal damage to an enemy in the designated direction, briefly shoving and stunning them for .2s. The damage dealt by this move increases for each muscle gauge increment consumed at a rate of 12.5% per increment. If this move knocks out any Pokémon, the user recovers 10% of maximum HP.

10% of Max HP

moves.name: Leech Life
moves.description: Has the user grab and restrain an opposing Pokémon in the designated direction, dealing damage over time while restoring the user's HP. When this move is used, it consumes the user's entire muscle gauge. The number of hits and the amount of damage dealt per hit increases the more muscle gauge increments are consumed. This move ends if the user becomes unable to act for any reason or if the restrained Pokémon escapes by using an Eject Button or through some other means.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Grab and restrain an enemy in the designated direction, becoming unstoppable and dealing damage-over-time while restoring Buzzwole's HP. When this move is used, consume the user's entire muscle gauge. The number of hits and the amount of damage dealt per hit increases for each muscle gauge increment consumed. Number of hits starts at 4 and increases by 1 per 2 increments of muscle gauge consumed. Initial damage increases by 1.5% per muscle gauge increment. This move ends if Buzzwole becomes unable to act for any reason or if the restrained enemy escapes by using an Eject Button or through some other means.

1.5% x Muscle Gauge

Against Unstoppable Targets: Only 1 instance of increased damage and healing will occur.

Upgrade (Level 11): Also causes each instance of damage dealt by this move to be stronger than the last by 5% additively.

moves.name: Superpower
moves.description: Consumes the entire muscle gauge and has the user run in the designated direction and grab an opposing Pokémon. The user then slams the opposing Pokémon down on the ground at full strength, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon in the area of effect. The damage dealt by this move and the shield effect it grants increases the more muscle gauge increments are consumed.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Consumes the entire muscle gauge and has the user run in the designated direction and grab an enemy. The user then slams the target down on the ground at full strength, dealing damage to all enemies in the area. If Buzzwole is successful in grabbing a target, Buzzwole receives a shield that lasts for 2s. Buzzwole is unstoppable during this move.

20% Max HP + 2% Max HP * Muscle Gauge

The damage dealt by this move is increased at a rate of 12.5% per muscle gauge increment.

Upgrade (Level 11): Reduces the cooldown of this move by 3s when the user's muscle gauge reaches maximum.

moves.name: Ultra Swole Slam
moves.description: Has the user fly at high speed, dealing damage to all opposing Pokémon in the area of effect. Afterward, the user targets the opposing Pokémon with the lowest percentage of HP among those hit and charges down at it from the sky, dealing damage once again to that Pokémon.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Buzzwole flies at high speed, dealing damage to enemies in the area-of-effect. Afterward, the user targets the enemy with the lowest percentage of HP remaining among those hit and charges down at them from the sky, dealing area damage once again and additional damage to the targeted enemy based on their missing HP. Buzzwole is Unstoppable during this move.

50% of enemy missing HP

Against Wild Pokemon: Missing HP damage is not dealt.

passiveAbility.name: Beast Boost
passiveAbility.description: When Buzzwole knocks out an enemy player, movement speed is increased by 100% and basic attack speed increased by 50% for 3s. When Buzzwole assists in knocking out an enemy player, movement speed is increased by 50% and basic attack speed increased by 25% for 3s. Each time Buzzwole hits an enemy with basic attacks, Mega Punch, Lunge, or Smack Down - muscle gauge increases. Conversely, when Buzzwole has been out of combat for 10s, muscle gauge depletes by 1 increment every 5s. Up to 6 muscle gauge increments can be stored.
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced: When Buzzwole knocks out an enemy player, movement speed is increased by 100% and basic attack speed increased by 50% for 3s. When Buzzwole assists in knocking out an enemy player, movement speed is increased by 50% and basic attack speed increased by 25% for 3s. Each time Buzzwole hits an enemy with basic attacks, Mega Punch, Lunge, or Smack Down - muscle gauge increases. Conversely, when Buzzwole has been out of combat for 10s, muscle gauge depletes by 1 increment every 5s. Up to 6 muscle gauge increments can be stored.

moves.name: Attack - Charcadet
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage.

moves.name: Lava Plume
moves.description: Has the user torch the area around itself with an inferno of scarlet flames, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits. The user's next basic attack on opposing Pokémon hit by this move deals increased damage.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Torch the area around the user with an inferno of scarlet flames, dealing damage to enemies hit. The user's next basic attack deals 15% increased damage.

moves.name: Bitter Blade
moves.description: Has the user focus its bitter feelings toward the world of the living into a slashing attack. The user recovers HP based on the amount of damage this move deals. Any HP recovered that exceeds the user's max HP is converted into a shield.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Ceruledge focuses bitter feelings towards the world of the living into a slashing attack. The user recovers HP equals to 50% of the damage dealt with this move. Damage dealt to wild Pokémon only heals for half of the normal amount. Any leftover healing from the move that exceeds the user's max HP is converted into a shield (effects that alter healing directly are ignored). The shield lasts 2s, the duration is refreshed with each application, and can stack up to 10x. The maximum capacity of the shield is determined by the life steal amount.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increases the amount of HP recovered to 70% of damage dealt.

moves.name: Psycho Cut
moves.description: Has the user launch a blade formed by psychic power in the designated direction, dealing damage and applying a slowing effect to opposing Pokémon it hits. Opposing Pokémon hit by this move have their Defense decreased for a short time. If the user hits opposing Pokémon with a basic attack, this move's cooldown is reduced.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Ceruledge launches a blade formed by psychic power in the designated direction, dealing damage and slowing enemies hit by 30% for 3s, and reducing their Defense for 4s. If Ceruledge hits enemies with a basic attack, this move's cooldown is reduced by 0.5s.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increases the Defense reduction of enemies hit by this move.

moves.name: Take Down
moves.description: Has the user charge recklessly in the designated direction, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits. The user's basic attack speed is increased for a short time.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Has the user charge recklessly in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies hit. The user's basic attack speed is increased by 20% for 3s.

moves.name: Phantom Force
moves.description: Has the user dash and disappear into darkness, where it hides for a short time. While it is hiding, it cannot move. When this move is used again, the user appears in the designated direction while slashing around itself, dealing damage that ignores Defense and shields to opposing Pokémon it hits and applying a slowing effect to them. If this move hits opposing Pokémon, its cooldown is reduced.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Dash and disappear into darkness, where Ceruledge hides for 1s. While hiding, Ceruledge cannot move. When this move is used again or after 1s has passed, the user appears in the designated direction while slashing around themself, dealing damage that ignores Defense and shields of enemies and applies a 60% slow for 1s to them. If this move hits an enemy, this move's cooldown is reduced by 40% of the max cooldown.

Upgrade (Level 13): Reduces this move's cooldown by 1s.

moves.name: Flame Charge
moves.description: Has the user cloak itself in flame and charge in the designated direction, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits. The user's basic attack speed is increased for a short time after using this move. A maximum of 2 use(s) can be kept in reserve for this move.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Ceruledge cloaks themself in flame and charges in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies hit. Ceruledge's basic attack speed is increased by 30% for 3s after using this move. A maximum of 2 uses can be kept in reserve for this move.

There is a 1 second cooldown between each use, which is reduced with cooldown reduction.

Upgrade (Level 13): Ceruledge's basic attack speed is instead increased for 5s after using this move.

moves.name: Revenant Rend
moves.description: Has the user ready both of its arm blades before slashing through to the designated location faster than the eye can track. The user leaves opposing Pokémon it hits unable to act before striking them with three slashing blows.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Ceruledge charges both of their arm blades gaining unstoppable and 70% Damage reduction for 0.5s before slashing through to the designated location, leaving Ceruledge unable to act for 0.7s. Ceruledge also leaves enemies hit unable to act for 0.7s and applies a mark to them. After 0.7s, marked enemies are dealt damage with three slashing blows.

The mark can be cleansed, preventing the damage.

passiveAbility.name: Flame Body
passiveAbility.description: When Charcadet hits an enemy with an auto attack, Charcadet deals damage around themself with flames. This ability goes on a 4s cd after it's triggered.
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced: When Charcadet hits an enemy with an auto attack, Charcadet deals damage around themself with flames. This ability goes on a 4s cd after it's triggered.

moves.name: Attack
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Gains a Boosted Attack every 5s, dealing increased damage, slowing enemies by 30% for 2s and burning enemies hit for 2.5s.

moves.name: Ember
moves.description: Has the user shoot out a small flame, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits, decreasing their movement speed, and leaving them burned. For a short time after this move is used, it can be used again.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Shoot out a small flame, dealing damage to Pokémon it hits, slowing them by 30% for 2s and leaving them burned for 2.5s. After the first cast, this move may be used again within 5s before going on full cooldown.

Burns tick every 0.5s for 5 damage ticks.

moves.name: Flamethrower
moves.description: Has the user shoot an intense blast of fire in the designated direction, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits and leaving them burned. The end of the blast explodes, dealing increased damage. If this explosion hits an opposing Pokémon, this move's cooldown is reduced.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Shoot an intense blast of fire in the designated direction, dealing damage to Pokémon and leaving them burned for 2.5s. The end of the blast explodes, dealing increased damage. If the explosion hits a Pokémon, this move's cooldown is reduced by 65% of its current cooldown.

Burns tick every 0.5s for 5 damage ticks.

Upgrade (Level 11): If the explosion hits a Pokémon, Chandelure deals 20% increased damage for 3s. This effect also applies to the triggering explosion itself.

moves.name: Overheat
moves.description: Has the user throw consecutive flames in an arc into the designated area up to 3 times, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon they hit and leaving them burned. When a flame hits an opposing Pokémon, the user gains one heat energy. If this move is used again, the user shoots out an exploding flame, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits based on the user's amount of heat energy and leaving them burned. After using the follow-up attack, the user cannot use basic attacks for a short time.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Throws consecutive flames in an arc into designated areas up to 3 times by holding the move input down. Pokémon in the area are hit and are left burned. The area may be aimed and changed during the use of this move. When one of the flames hits a Pokémon, the user gains one heat energy. If this move is used again, an exploding flame is shot out, dealing damage to Pokémon based on the heat energy and leaves them burned. The exploding flame hitting with 0, 1 or 2 heat energy reduces the cooldown of this move by 75%, 50% or 30% respectively. After the follow-up attack, the user cannot use basic attacks for a short time.

Burns tick every 0.5s for 5 damage ticks.

Upgrade (Level 11): This move's cooldown is reduced by 1s.

moves.name: Night Shade
moves.description: Makes opposing Pokémon in the area of effect see a frightening mirage, dealing damage to them and marking them. When the user deals damage again to marked opposing Pokémon, those Pokémon are left unable to act for a short time.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Makes Pokémon in the area of effect see a frightening mirage, dealing damage to them and marking them. When Chandelure deals damage again to the marked Pokémon, the marked Pokémon are stunned for 1s.

moves.name: Poltergeist
moves.description: Has the user create a zone of mysterious power, as well as mirages of floating furniture-such as tables and chairs-inside it. Any opposing Pokémon that comes in contact with a mirage takes damage and has its movement speed decreased. Opposing Pokémon that step on the zone's border will also have their movement speed decreased.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Create a zone of mysterious power and mirages of floating furniture.  Pokémon that come in contact with a mirage take damage.  Pokémon that come in contact with a mirage or the edge of the zone are slowed by 65% decaying to a 40% slow over 1s. Then the 40% slow lingers for an additional second.

Upgrade (Level 13): Increases the slow to 80% for 1s decaying to 50% for 1s.

moves.name: Imprison
moves.description: Has the user create a zone in front of itself. The first opposing Pokémon caught in it will become unable to move, and all opposing Pokémon in or that enter the zone become imprisoned and cannot use moves.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Creates a zone in front of itself lasting 4s. The first enemy caught in the zone will be immobilized for 0.7s. Furthermore, all enemy Pokémon in the zone or enter the zone become imprisoned and cannot use Moves.

Upgrade (Level 13): Changes the Imprison to briefly immobilize all Pokémon caught in the zone on creation.

moves.name: Ignite Midnight
moves.description: The user seals the area around itself in darkness and obscures opposing Pokémon's vision for a short time. If this Unite Move is used again, the user continuously fires a beam of fire in a designated direction, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits. The beam can be directed while fired, and its final blast deals increased damage.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Reduce the vision of enemies around itself by 30% for 3s. If this Unite Move is used again, Chandelure continuously fires a beam of fire in a designated direction, dealing damage to Pokémon it hits. The beam may be redirected while firing and its final blast deals increased damage. Ignite Midnight can be cancelled early.

passiveAbility.name: Infiltrator
passiveAbility.description: When this Pokémon deals damage, receive a stacking buff that makes Special damage dealt by this Pokémon ignore 5% of Special Defense per stack. This buff lasts 4s, can stack up to 6 times, and the duration refreshes when gaining a new stack.
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced: When this Pokémon deals damage, receive a stacking buff that makes Special damage dealt by this Pokémon ignore 5% of Special Defense per stack. This buff lasts 4s, can stack up to 6 times, and the duration refreshes when gaining a new stack.

moves.name: Attack
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Breathes fire at opposing Pokémon, dealing damage 4 times per basic attack. Charizard may move while attacking but is slowed by 5% while breathing fire. Charizard deals additional damage to opposing Pokémon that have been burned by the user's moves. This additional damage cannot land critical hits; additional damage benefits from regular lifesteal. Basic attacks gain increased range upon evolving into Charmeleon and into Charizard.

Against wild Pokémon: total damage is capped at 250 per hit. CHARIZARD'S BASIC ATTACKS ARE A SET ANIMATION LENGTH. ATTACK SPEED HAS NO EFFECT ON THIS POKÉMON. DO NOT USE RAPID FIRE SCARF ON CHARIZARD.

moves.name: Flame Burst
moves.description: Attack with a bursting flame. When this move hits, it leaves enemies burned and increases the user's movement speed for a short time.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user attacks with a flame in the designated direction which bursts on the first opposing Pokémon hit or after traveling max distance, damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of effect and burning them for 4s (dealing damage 5 times). When this move hits, the user's movement speed is increased by 20% for 3s.

The Attack of opposing Pokémon burned by this move is decreased by 5%.

moves.name: Flamethrower
moves.description:
Attack with an intense blast of fire. When this move hits, it leaves enemies burned and increases the user's movement speed for a short time.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increased damage and the damage caused by burning.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user attacks with a blast of fire in the designated direction, damaging opposing Pokémon in a line and burning them for 4s (dealing damage 5 times). When this move hits, the user's movement speed is increased by 40% for 3s. The user is able to move freely when using this move.

The Attack of opposing Pokémon burned by this move is decreased by 5%.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increases the damage of this move and its burns.

moves.name: Fire Punch
moves.description:
Punch with a fiery fist, dealing damage and shoving enemies when it hits. Also leaves the enemies it shoves burned.

Upgrade (Level 11): Reduced cooldown every time a basic attack hits.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user dashes with a fiery fist forward, damaging opposing Pokémon hit and shoving them, and burning the first opposing Pokémon hit for 4s (dealing damage 5 times).

The Attack of the target burned by this move is decreased by 5%.

Upgrade (Level 11): Reduces this move's cooldown by 0.4s per target hit every time the user's basic attack hits an opposing Pokémon. (1.6s total for an entire basic attack animation on a single target).

moves.name: Fire Spin
moves.description: Encircles enemies in the area of effect in a vortex of fire. After this move hits, it deals damage over time and decreases the movement speed of enemies for a short time.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: The user shoots fire in the designated direction which bursts into a vortex of fire on the first opposing Pokémon hit or after traveling max distance, damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of effect. The vortex of fire remains for 5s, dealing damage over time to opposing Pokémon in the area of effect every 0.5s (up to 10 times) and decreasing their movement speed by 25% for 1s when hit.

moves.name: Fire Blast
moves.description:
Blasts intense, all-consuming fire, dealing damage over time to enemies while the flames continue to burn on the ground and decreasing the movement speed of enemies for a short time.

Upgrade (Level 13): Increased damage.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user shoots an intense blast of fire in the designated direction which explodes on the first opposing Pokémon hit or after traveling max distance, damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of effect. The blast of all-consuming fire remains on the ground for 5s, dealing damage over time to opposing Pokémon in the area of effect every 0.5s (up to 10 times) and decreasing their movement speed by 30% for 1s when hit. The user is able to move freely when using this move.

Upgrade (Level 13): Increases the damage of this move and the damage over time.

moves.name: Flare Blitz
moves.description:
Charge forward cloaked in fire, granting the user a shield and throwing enemies hit.

Upgrade (Level 13): Decreases movement speed of enemies for a short time when they are thrown.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user charges at the designated opposing Pokémon cloaked in fire, damaging opposing Pokémon, throwing the target, and granting the user a shield for 5s when this move hits.

Upgrade (Level 13): Decreases the movement speed of the target by 40% for 3s when this move hits.

moves.name: Seismic Slam
moves.description: Fly up into the air, allowing the user to move freely over obstacles. While this move is being used, basic attacks deal increased damage and leave enemies burned.
