In addition, when dealing damage to an enemy, recover HP. Using this move again on an enemy will grab it and slam it onto the ground.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user briefly becomes unstoppable and grabs the designated Pokémon from the opposing team. The target is bound, and the user and the target become invincible as the user flies up then slams them onto the ground, damaging the target and nearby opposing Pokémon, dealing an additional 8% max HP damage to each opposing Pokémon hit. The user gains hindrance resistance the moment they slam into the ground and fly up into the air for 10s. While flying in the air, the user is able to use basic attacks and move freely over obstacles. Unite Move basic attacks burn opposing Pokémon for 1s (dealing damage 2 times). The user restores HP for 60% of the damage dealt with Unite Move basic attacks (excluding burns or additional damage). Damage dealt by burns from Unite Move basic attacks also benefit from regular lifesteal.

Additional 8% of enemy max HP.

The Attack of opposing Pokémon burned by Unite Move basic attacks is decreased by 5%.

passiveAbility.name: Blaze
passiveAbility.description: While at half HP or less, critical-hit rate is increased.
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced: While at 50% max HP or below, this Pokémon's critical-hit rate is increased by 30%.

Charizard deals additional damage to opposing Pokémon that have been burned by the user's moves. This additional damage cannot land critical hits; additional damage benefits from regular lifesteal. Basic attacks gain increased range upon evolving into Charmeleon and into Charizard. When mega evolving into Mega Charizard X, basic attack range is decreased but width is increased.

The Attack of the target burned by this move is decreased by 5%. When the user is mega evolved, instead burns all opposing Pokémon hit.

moves.name: Seismic Slam
moves.description: Has the user grab a Pokémon from the opposing team and slam it onto the ground from the air. After using this Unite Move, the user Mega Evolves.

The user briefly becomes unstoppable and grabs the designated Pokémon from the opposing team. The target is bound, and the user and the target become invincible as the user flies up then slams them onto the ground, damaging the target and nearby opposing Pokémon, dealing an additional 8% max HP damage to each opposing Pokémon hit. The user then mega evolves into Mega Charizard X for 20 seconds. During Mega evolution, Mega Charizard X receives 50% movement speed increase.

8% of enemy max HP.

passiveAbility.name: Solar Power
passiveAbility.description: When the user uses a move, it deals additional damage but loses 5% of its current HP. This Ability's effect does not trigger when the user is in tall grass. When the user deals damage with a basic attack to opposing Pokémon that have been burned by its moves, the user restores 2% of its missing HP.
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced: When the user uses a move, it deals additional damage but loses 5% of its current HP. This Ability's effect does not trigger when the user is in tall grass. When the user deals damage with a basic attack to opposing Pokémon that have been burned by its moves, the user restores 2% of its missing HP.

The vortex of fire remains for 5s, dealing damage over time to opposing Pokémon in the area of effect every 0.5s (up to 10 times) and decreasing their movement speed by 25% for 1s when hit.

The user shoots an intense blast of fire in the designated direction which explodes on the first opposing Pokémon hit or after traveling max distance, damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of effect. The blast of all-consuming fire remains on the ground for 5s, dealing damage over time to opposing Pokémon in the area of effect every 0.5s (up to 10 times) and decreasing their movement speed by 30% for 1s when hit. The user is able to move freely when using this move. If the user is mega evolved, the area of effect of this move increases.

Upgrade (Level 13): Increases the damage of this move and the damage over time.

After using this Unite Move, the user Mega Evolves and, for aa set time, can move freely over obstacles. When the user Mega Evolves, its moves and basic attacks are boosted. When the user is Mega Evolved, its basic attacks deal increased damage, can leave opposing Pokémon burned, and restore the user's HP when they hit an opposing Pokémon.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user briefly becomes unstoppable and grabs the designated Pokémon from the opposing team. The target is bound, and the user and the target become invincible as the user flies up then slams them onto the ground, damaging the target and nearby opposing Pokémon, dealing an additional 8% max HP damage to each opposing Pokémon hit. The user gains hindrance resistance and mega evolves into Mega Charizard Y the moment they slam into the ground and fly up into the air for 15s. While flying in the air, the user is able to use basic attacks as well as moves and is able to move freely over obstacles. Unite Move basic attacks burn opposing Pokémon for 1s (dealing damage 2 times). The user restores HP for 60% of the damage dealt with Unite Move basic attacks (excluding burns or additional damage). Damage dealt by burns from Unite Move basic attacks also benefit from regular lifesteal.

Additional 8% of enemy max HP.

The Attack of opposing Pokémon burned by this move is decreased by 5%.

passiveAbility.name: Blaze
passiveAbility.description: Increases Attack by 8% for 5 seconds after Charizard gets hit.
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced: Increases Attack by 8% for 5 seconds after Charizard gets hit.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage when it hits.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack or after using a move, dealing increased damage. Boosted attacks remain readied until used.

Against wild Pokémon: basic attack damage is capped at 1000; boosted attack damage is capped at 1300.

moves.name: Ember
moves.description: Shoot out a small flame, dealing damage to enemies, leaving them burned and decreasing their Attack for a short time.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Shoots a small flame at the designated opposing Pokémon, damaging the target and burning them for 3s (dealing damage 3 times).

The Attack and Sp. Atk of the burned target are decreased by 5% for 2s.

moves.name: Pyro Ball
moves.description:
Kick a ball of flame in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies and leaving them burned for a short time when this move hits.

Upgrade (Level 11): Reduces the cooldown of Flame Charge or Feint when this move hits.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Kicks up a stone and ignites it, then kicks the ball of flame in the designated direction, damaging opposing Pokémon hit and burning them for 3s (dealing damage 3 times).

The Attack and Sp. Atk of burned opposing Pokémon are decreased by 5% for 2s.

Upgrade (Level 11): Reduces the cooldown of Flame Charge or Feint by 4s when this move hits.

moves.name: Blaze Kick
moves.description:
Perform a fiery flying kick. This move is always a critical hit, and it shoves enemies and leaves them burned for a short time. In addition, become immune to hindrances while using this move.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increases basic attack speed for a short time when this move hits.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Becomes unstoppable and performs a fiery flying kick dashing toward the designated opposing Pokémon, damaging the target with a guaranteed critical hit, shoving them for 0.5s, and burning them for 3s (dealing damage 3 times); then jumps back a set distance from the target or in the direction of movement and becomes vulnerable to hindrances when they land.

The Attack and Sp. Atk of the burned target are decreased by 5% for 2s.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increases basic attack speed by 45% for 3s when this move hits.

moves.name: Low Sweep
moves.description: Make a swift low sweep in the designated direction, dealing damage to any enemy it hits.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Dashes forward with a low sweep, damaging opposing Pokémon in their path.

moves.name: Flame Charge
moves.description:
Charge forward cloaked in flame, dealing damage to any enemy hit.

Upgrade (Level 13): The next boosted attack after this move ends also decreases the movement speed of enemies hit for a short time.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Dashes forward cloaked in flame, damaging opposing Pokémon in their path.

Upgrade (Level 13): The next boosted attack after this move ends decreases the movement speed of the opposing Pokémon hit by 30% for 2s.

moves.name: Feint
moves.description:
Increases movement speed for a short time and become invincible.

Upgrade (Level 13): After this move is used, basic attacks that hit enemies restore HP (up to 3 times).
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Becomes invincible for 0.73s while dodging, cleansing any slows, and increasing movement speed by 40% for 2s.

Upgrade (Level 13): The next 3 auto attacks after dodging restore HP for 30% of damage dealt. These 3 auto attacks cannot critically hit.

moves.name: Blazing Bicycle Kick
moves.description: Create a giant ball of flame and kick it toward the designated location. The ball releases a fierce shock wave that deals damage to enemies in the area of effect. Also increases movement speed by 10% (stacks with the Unite Buffs) for 5s when it hits.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Becomes unstoppable and kicks up a giant ball of flame, then kicks it toward the location of the designated opposing Pokémon. The ball releases a fierce shock wave upon impact, damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of effect, dealing additional missing HP damage to those hit; and increasing movement speed by 10% for 5s when this Unite Move hits.

14% of enemy missing HP.

passiveAbility.name: Blaze
passiveAbility.description: When using a move, the next basic attack becomes a boosted attack. When hitting an enemy with a basic attack or move, a cinder is placed on that enemy. Attacking a cindered enemy a certain number of times will cause the cinder to flare, dealing damage to the enemy. When at half HP or less, critical-hit rate is increased by 10% and basic attack speed is increased by 20% for a short time.
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced:
When at 50% max HP or below, increases critical-hit rate by 10% and auto attack speed by 20% for 5s (30s CD).

90% Atk + 0.7% Enemy Max HP x (Level - 1) + 25

When hitting an opposing Pokémon with an auto attack or move, places a cinder on the target for 5s; applies 2 cinders with boosted attacks and moves. When placing a 5th cinder on a target, consumes the cinders, dealing additional damage to the target.

moves.name: Attack
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage.

moves.name: Heal Pulse
moves.description: Has the user immediately restore HP to itself and nearby allies.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Immediately restores HP to itself and nearby allies.

moves.name: Moonlight
moves.description:
Clefable continually restores HP to themself and nearby allies for a short time. Clefable's movement speed is increased while this move is active.

Upgrade (Level 10): Widens this move's area-of-effect and increases the duration of its effects.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Continually restores HP to Clefable and nearby allies for 3s at one tick per half second excluding activation at 0s. Clefable’s movement speed is increased by 20% while this move is active.

Upgrade (Level 10): Widens this move’s area-of-effect and increases the duration of its effects by 1s.

moves.name: Draining Kiss
moves.description: Clefable attacks nearby enemies with an energy-draining kiss. Each enemy hit by the kiss receives damage and releases an air kiss. These air kisses will travel to a nearby ally with the lowest HP and restore their HP. If no allies are nearby, the air kisses will return to the user and restore Clefable's HP instead.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Attacks nearby enemies with an energy-draining kiss. Each enemy hit by the kiss receives damage and releases an air kiss. These air kisses will travel to a nearby ally with the lowest HP and restore their HP. If no allies are near, the air kisses will return to Clefable and restore its HP for 180% of the damage dealt.

Upgrade (Level 10): Widens this move’s area-of-effect and increases the amount of HP restored to 200% of the damage dealt.

moves.name: Disarming Voice
moves.description: Has the user let out a charming cry, dealing damage to nearby enemies and decreasing their movement speed for a short time.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Let out a charming cry, dealing damage to nearby enemies and decreasing their movement speed by 40% for 2s.

moves.name: Gravity
moves.description:
Has the user create a gravity zone centered on itself that persists for a set amount of time. Inside the gravity zone, Clefable's auto attacks change and deal increased damage. Enemies in the zone have their movement speed decreased which becomes stronger whenever a set amount of time passes. These enemies are also unable to use dash moves. If an enemy attempts to enter the zone with a dash move, the dash move is stopped and that enemy is left unable to act for a short time.

Upgrade (Level 12): Widens the area-of-effect and increases the duration of its effects.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Create a gravity zone centered on Clefable that persists for 3s. Inside the gravity zone, auto attacks change and deal increased damage. Enemies in the gravity zone have their movement speed decreased by 15% stacking up to 3 times gaining a stack whenever a set amount of time passes. These enemies are also unable to use Dash moves. If an enemy attempts to enter the gravity zone with a dash move, the dash move is stopped and that enemy is left unable to act for 1s.

Upgrade (Level 12): Widens this move’s area-of-effect and increases the duration of its effects to 4s.

moves.name: Follow Me
moves.description: Has the user move to the designated location while waving its finger, drawing the attention of opposing Pokémon it touches and opposing Pokémon near the designated location. Affected opposing Pokémon are forced to approach the user for a short time and attack it with their basic attacks.When this move is used, the user receives a shield effect.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Clefable moves to the designated location while waving its finger receiving a 3s shield. Attention of enemies hit and enemies near the designated location are drawn. These drawn enemies are forced to approach the user and attack Clefable with their auto attacks for 2s.

Upgrade (Level 12): Increases Clefable's Defense by 150 for 3s and Sp. Def by 100 for 3s when this move is used.

moves.name: Wonder Wish
moves.description: Has the user waggle its finger, restoring HP to ally Pokémon in the area of effect. The lower an ally Pokémon's HP is, the more HP this move restores to that ally.Afterward, the user gets a random move that it can perform by using its Unite Move again within a set amount of time. Note: Some random moves will activate immediately.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Clefable waggles their finger, restoring HP to allies in the area-of-effect. The lower an ally's HP is, the more HP this move restores to that ally. Afterward, Clefable gets a random move that can be performed by using the Unite Move again within 10s.

30% missing HP

Note: Some random moves will activate immediately.

passiveAbility.name: Magic Guard
passiveAbility.description: This Pokémon receives a shield when restoring an ally Pokémon's HP. The strength of this shield is proportional to the amount of HP restored.
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced: This Pokémon receives a shield for 3s when restoring an ally Pokémon's HP. The strength of this shield is proportional to 50% of the amount of HP restored.

moves.name: Attack
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage and gaining 2 flowers when it hits.

moves.name: Synthesis
moves.description: When the user is not attached to an ally Pokémon, it attaches itself to the designated ally Pokémon and grants it a shield. When the user is attached to an ally Pokémon, it restores that ally Pokémon's HP. The more flowers that are consumed, the more HP that is restored. If the user releases, it will stop being attached and move in the designated direction.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
If detached attaches to the designated ally Pokémon and grants them a Triage shield effect.

If attached to an ally Pokémon: restores the HP of the ally. Restores additional HP with for each flower that is consumed (up to 8 flowers).

moves.name: Floral Healing
moves.description: When the user is not attached to an ally Pokémon, it attaches itself to the designated ally Pokémon and grants it a shield. When the user is attached to an ally Pokémon, it restores that ally Pokémon's HP. The more flowers that are consumed, the more HP that is restored. Any HP restored in excess of the ally Pokémon's maximum is converted into a shield. If the user releases, it will stop being attached and move in the designated direction.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
If detached: attaches to the designated ally Pokémon and grants them a Triage shield effect.

If attached to an ally Pokémon: restores the HP of the ally; restores additional HP for each flower that is consumed (up to 8 flowers). Converts any HP restored in excess of the ally Pokémon’s max HP into an overheal shield effect for 5s when this move is used (up to 4 times, refreshing duration with additional uses); adds additional value to the overheal shield effect for each additional flower that is consumed.

Upgrade (Level 10): While attached: increases the movement speed of the ally Pokémon by 30% for 2s.

moves.name: Sweet Kiss
moves.description: When the user is not attached to an ally Pokémon, it attaches itself to the designated ally Pokémon and grants it a shield. When the user is attached to an ally Pokémon, it charges power before making opposing Pokémon in the area of effect infatuated. Infatuated Pokémon approach the user against their will. The longer power is charged, the larger the area of effect; and the more flowers that are consumed, the longer Pokémon are infatuated. If the user releases, it will stop being attached and move in the designated direction.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
If detached: attaches to the designated ally Pokémon and grants them a Triage shield effect; adds additional shield value to the Triage shield effect with Sweet Kiss.

0.6s + 0.1s per flower

If attached to an ally Pokémon: charges power for up to 2.5s, reaching maximum charge after 1.5s; then infatuates opposing Pokémon in the area of effect when released for a minimum of 0.6s. Increases the range of this move with charging. Infatuated Pokémon are unable to act and approach the user against their will. Infatuates opposing Pokémon hit for an additional 0.1s for each flower that is consumed (up to an additional 0.8s with 8 flowers; maximum 1.4s). (Note: it is impossible to use Sweet Kiss with fewer than 2 flowers due to the rate of gaining flowers and the cooldown reduction cap.)

Upgrade (Level 10): While attached: increases the movement speed of the ally Pokémon by 50% for 2s while charging power.

moves.name: Vine Whip
moves.description: Has the user strike out with whiplike vines in front of itself, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon in the area of effect and decreasing their movement speed for a short time.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Strikes out with whiplike vines in the designated direction, damaging opposing Pokémon in the line area of effect and decreasing their movement speed by 40% for 2s when it hits.

While attached to an ally: increases this move's range.

moves.name: Magical Leaf
moves.description: Has the user launch three curious, scattering leaves each second for a set amount of time. The leaves target opposing Pokémon in the area of effect and deal damage when they hit. These leaves can even deal damage to opposing Pokémon hiding in tall grass. If the same opposing Pokémon is damaged six times by these leaves, that Pokémon will be left unable to act. If this move is used when the user is attached to an ally Pokémon, its area of effect is increased.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Launches 3 curious, scattering leaves every 1s for 5s (up to 18 leaves) at random opposing Pokémon in the area of effect (even when in tall grass or in stealth), prioritizing Pokémon from the opposing team; damaging opposing Pokémon and applying a mark to them for 4s when hit by a leaf. When a marked target is damaged by 6 leaves, stuns them for 0.5s.

While attached to an ally: increases this move's range of targeting.

Upgrade (Level 12): Increases the number of leaves launched to 4 leaves every 1s (maximum 24 leaves).

moves.name: Grass Knot
moves.description: Has the user unleash vines in the designated direction, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits and leaving them unable to move. This move can hit up to two opposing Pokémon. If it hits two opposing Pokémon, it pulls the second to the first's location and deals additional damage to both.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Unleashes vines in the designated direction, damaging up to two opposing Pokémon hit and immobilizing them. If this move hits two opposing Pokémon (within 75% of this move's max range from each other), pull the second target to the first target's location and deal additional damage to both.

While attached to an ally: increases this move's range.

Upgrade (Level 12): Increases this move’s area of effect.

moves.name: Flowery Fields Forever
moves.description: Has the user create a large area of tall grass around itself. Pokémon in this tall grass cannot be seen, just as with other tall grass on the map. If ally Pokémon enter this tall grass, they will continually recover HP as long as they're in it. The user gains special flowers from this tall grass. Consuming these special flowers boosts Floral Healing and Sweet Kiss.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Briefly becomes unstoppable and creates a large area of tall grass around their location for 6s. Pokémon in this tall grass cannot be seen, just as with other tall grass on the map. Restores the HP of teammates in this Unite Move's tall grass every 0.5s.

Increases infatuation base duration by 1.3s

Gains special flowers from this tall grass, which grant access to an empowered use of Floral Healing or Sweet Kiss.

passiveAbility.name: Triage
passiveAbility.description: Increases movement speed by 25% when near ally Pokémon at 50% max HP or below. Stores up to 8 flowers; consumes all flowers when using Synthesis, Floral Healing, or Sweet Kiss while attached, boosting their effects. Gains 1 flower every 1.5s. Gains 4 flowers when entering tall grass while detached (5s CD). Attaches to a designated ally Pokémon when using Synthesis, Floral Healing, or Sweet Kiss while detached, granting a Triage shield effect to the ally based on Comfey's max HP.
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced:
Increases movement speed by 25% when near ally Pokémon at 50% max HP or below. Stores up to 8 flowers; consumes all flowers when using Synthesis, Floral Healing, or Sweet Kiss while attached, boosting their effects. Gains 1 flower every 1.5s. Gains 4 flowers when entering tall grass while detached (5s CD). Attaches to a designated ally Pokémon when using Synthesis, Floral Healing, or Sweet Kiss while detached, granting a Triage shield effect to the ally based on Comfey's max HP.

1% Max HP

14% of Comfey's Max HP

20.9% of Comfey's Max HP

While attached: becomes untargetable, restores 1% max HP every 1s; takes Aeos energy gained in excess of the maximum the ally can hold, and scores the same amount of Aeos energy into a goal as the ally if not using a move while the ally channels the score. Detaches from the ally in the designated direction when the button to return to base is used (or a separate detach button on mobile). When detaching: removes the Triage shield effect from the ally; becomes invincible for 0.5s, and readies a boosted attack.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every fourth attack. This boosted attack spits Arrokuda or other Pokémon at the enemy and deals area damage near the target when it hits.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Becomes a boosted attack with every fourth attack, catching some form of prey. This boosted attack spits prey at an opposing Pokémon, damaging them and bouncing to 1 other opposing Pokémon nearby.

moves.name: Whirlpool
moves.description: Creates a whirlpool that deals damage to enemies in the area of effect. The area of effect slowly shrinks, but the damage dealt slowly increases. Just before the whirlpool disappears, it decreases the movement speed of enemies in the area of effect for a short time. The user can also catch Arrokuda or other prey by entering the whirlpool.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user creates a whirlpool at a designated location, damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of effect over 1.8s (up to 10 times). The area of effect shrinks in size over the duration; opposing Pokémon standing at the outer edge of the whirlpool are hit only up to 3 times. The movement speed of opposing Pokémon in the area of effect is decreased by 50% for 0.2s when hit.

The user can enter the whirlpool to catch prey for Gulp Missile (up to 2 times).

moves.name: Surf
moves.description:
Attacks with a wave that deals damage to enemies. Once the wave has traveled its full distance, it returns the way it came, dealing damage to enemies once again and pulling them back with the wave. The user can also catch Arrokuda or other prey by entering the wave.

Upgrade (Level 13): When the first wave hits enemies, it also decreases their movement speed for a short time.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user sends a wave in the designated direction, damaging opposing Pokémon in the wave. The wave reaches its maximum distance after 0.8s, then returns to its starting point at the same speed, damaging opposing Pokémon and pulling them with the returning wave, stunning them for 0.4s during the pull.

The user catches prey with the first wave, and can enter the returning wave to catch more prey for Gulp Missile.

Upgrade (Level 13): The first wave decreases the movement speed of opposing Pokémon hit by 40% for 3s.

moves.name: Dive
moves.description:
Changes the designated area into a puddle and has the user dive to that area, dealing damage to enemies and shoving them when they're hit. The user also catches Arrokuda or other wild Pokémon as they emerge from the puddle. A maximum of 3 uses can be kept in reserve for this move.

Upgrade (Level 13): Increased damage.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user becomes unstoppable for 0.5s as they change the designated location into a puddle then dive to the puddle, damaging opposing Pokémon and shoving them for 0.5s when the user emerges from the puddle. The next boosted attack within 5s deals additional damage; boosted attacks after 5s have passed become regular boosted attacks. A maximum of 3 uses can be kept in reserve for this move, and there is a 2s cooldown between uses.

The user catches prey for Gulp Missile as they emerge from the puddle.

Upgrade (Level 13): Increases the damage of the dive.

moves.name: Feather Dance
moves.description: Decreases the Attack and movement speed of enemies for a short time.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: The user throws a circle of feathers at the designated area, decreasing the Attack of opposing Pokémon in the area of effect by 30% and their movement speed by 20% for 4s.

moves.name: Hurricane
moves.description:
Creates a fierce wind, dealing damage to enemies that get caught in it and throws them.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increases the user's movement speed for a short time.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user creates a fierce wind at the designated location. After 0.5s, a hurricane catches opposing Pokémon in the area of effect, damaging them and throwing them for 1s. Afterwards the user's attack speed increases by 40% for 3s.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increases the user's movement speed by 20% for 3s.

moves.name: Air Slash
moves.description:
Shoot out many blades of air while moving backward to create distance. Deals damage to enemies in the area of effect and reduces this move's cooldown when it hits.

Upgrade (Level 11): Restores the user's HP every time a blade of air hits an enemy.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user shoots out 5 blades of air in a cone in the designated direction, damaging the first opposing Pokémon hit with each blade. The user also hops backward to create distance. This move's cooldown is reduced by 0.8s for each blade that hits (up to 4s).

Upgrade (Level 11): Restores the user's HP for each blade of air that hits an opposing Pokémon.

moves.name: Gatling Gulp Missile
moves.description: Creates a puddle at the user's current location. The user continuously uses its mouth to grab Arrokuda from the puddle and spits them out to attack the nearest enemy. The user cannot move or use other moves while this move is in effect.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user becomes unstoppable for up to 6.5s and catches a series of prey to spit at the nearest Pokémon from the opposing team or wild Pokémon up to 10 times. The user cannot move or use moves while using Gatling Gulp Missile. The user can use this Unite Move again to cancel it early. The prey caught for each Gatling Gulp Missile attack depends on the user's current HP.

If a boosted attack is readied when this Unite Move is used, the user spits this prey out first as a regular boosted attack before catching and spitting out up to 10 Gatling Gulp Missile prey.

passiveAbility.name: Gulp Missile
passiveAbility.description: When Cramorant uses a move, it catches some form of prey in its mouth. Afterward, when Cramorant receives damage, it spits the prey out as a counterattack at an enemy. The type of prey and effect differ based on the user's HP.
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced:
This Pokémon can catch some form of prey in their mouth while moving through Whirlpool, Surf, or Dive. When receiving damage, counterattacks by spitting the prey in their mouth at an opposing Pokémon, damaging them and bouncing to 1 other opposing Pokémon nearby.

When above 50% max HP, catches Arrokuda as prey, which also decrease opposing Pokémon's Defense by 20% and Sp. Def by 5% for 3s. When below 50% max HP, instead catches Pikachu as prey, which decrease opposing Pokémon's movement speed by 50% and attack speed by 10% for 1s.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack. When this boosted attack hits, it deals damage to enemies in the area of effect and decreases their movement speed for a short time.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of effect and decreasing their movement speed by 40% for 2s.

moves.name: Rock Slide
moves.description: Drops large rocks on the designated area. When this move hits, it deals damage to enemies in the area of effect and leaves them unable to act for a short time.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: The user drops large rocks at the designated location, damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of effect and stunning them for 1s.

moves.name: Rock Tomb
moves.description:
Splits open the ground toward the designated area, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and creating a barricade of rock. Activating this move again removes the barricade.

Upgrade (Level 11): Decreases the movement speed of enemies for a short time when this move hits.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user splits open the ground in a line towards the designated location, damaging opposing Pokémon in the path and decreasing their movement speed by 60% for 2s. A curved wall of rock is then created at the designated location that remains for up to 3s. When the wall of rock is created or destroyed, opposing Pokémon near the wall are damaged and their movement speed is decreased by 60% for 2s.

The user can use this move again to destroy the wall of rock early.

Upgrade (Level 11): Strengthens the movement speed decrease from this move to 80%.

moves.name: Shell Smash
moves.description:
Convert a set percentage of Defense and Sp. Defense into Attack and Sp. Attack and increase movement speed for a short time.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increased conversion rate.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user becomes unstoppable as they smash their shell over 0.8s, reducing their base Defense and Sp. Def stats to 0 and converting 40% of the value lost to bonus Attack and Sp. Atk respectively for 4.5s. The user's movement speed is increased by 75% for the duration of the buff (decaying by 5% every 1s; minimum 55% increased movement speed before the buff ends).

All modifiers (except emblem color bonuses) work with 0 base Defense and Sp. Def for the duration of this buff.

Upgrade (Level 11): Strengthens the conversion rate from lost Defense and Sp. Def to bonus Attack and Sp. Atk to 50%.

moves.name: Fury Cutter
moves.description: Slashes enemies with claws, dealing damage to them. Hitting the same enemy multiple times in succession with this move increases the damage dealt.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user slashes once with their claw while dashing slightly in the designated direction, damaging opposing Pokémon hit. Targets hit by Fury Cutter receive a mark for 9s that stacks with subsequent Fury Cutter hits (up to 3 times). Subsequent hits of this move on marked targets have 20% increased damage (maximum 40% increased damage on the third and subsequent hits from this move).

Additional stacking damage from this move is always rounded up.

moves.name: Stealth Rock
moves.description:
Throws many small rocks. When a rock hits an enemy or when the rocks have flown their full distance, a zone of many levitating rocks is created dealing slowly-increasing damage over time to enemies in the area of effect.

Upgrade (Level 13): Increases the duration of this move's effects and decreases the movement speed of enemies for a short time when this move hits.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user launches a cluster of rocks in the designated direction which expands into a trap of levitating rocks on the first opposing Pokémon or wall hit, or after traveling their max distance. This trap deals damage to opposing Pokémon in the area of effect every 0.5s over 4s (up to 8 times). Subsequent hits on targets hit by the trap within 1.5s have 15% increased damage; this damage increase stacks with subsequent hits from that trap (maximum 105% increased damage on the eighth hit).

Additional stacking damage from subsequent hits for each trap is always rounded up.

Upgrade (Level 13): The trap of levitating rocks remains for 1s longer; this move can hit up to 10 times (maximum 135% increased damage on the tenth hit). Also decreases the movement speed of opposing Pokémon hit by 35% for 1s.

moves.name: X-Scissor
moves.description:
Dash forward with crossed claws, dealing damage to enemies multiple times and shoving them. Leaves enemies unable to act if they hit an object when shoved.

Upgrade (Level 13): Reduced cooldown.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user dashes and attacks with crossed claws three times in the designated direction, damaging opposing Pokémon and shoving them for 0.2s with each attack. The third hit stuns opposing Pokémon for 1.5s if they are shoved into a wall.

Upgrade (Level 13): Reduces this move's cooldown by 1s.

moves.name: Rubble Rouser
moves.description: Gain a shield for a short time and leave nearby enemies unable to act, dealing damage over time to them. If the user receives damage while this move is in effect, the move deals additional hits to nearby enemies.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user becomes unstoppable as they summon a whirlwind of rocks around them, gaining a shield, and stunning nearby enemies for 1s. For 10s after, the whirlwind of rocks damage nearby opposing Pokémon every 1s. If the user receives damage during Rubble Rouser, the user deals additional revenge damage to nearby opposing Pokémon (2s CD).

The value of the shield gained from Rubble Rouser is equal to 40% max HP + 600.

passiveAbility.name: Sturdy
passiveAbility.description: Gains a stacking Def/SpDef buff for every 7% HP missing. Stacks up to 10 times.
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced: For every 7% missing HP, this Pokémon's Defense and Sp. Def are increased (up to 10 times; maximum at 70% missing HP or more).

moves.name: Attack
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Basic attacks made against sleeping enemies will become boosted attacks with greatly increased range. Boosted attacks deal damage to enemies with an attack from a void and restore Darkrai's HP. Darkrai does not require vision to perform a boosted attack against a sleeping target.

moves.name: Hypnosis
moves.description: Has the user employ hypnotic suggestion in the designated direction, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits and making them fall asleep after a short time.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Send a hypnotic suggestion in the designated direction, dealing damage to the first enemy it hits. After 1s, the enemy will fall asleep for 2s.

moves.name: Dark Void
moves.description: Has the user fire balls of darkness at opposing Pokémon in the area of effect, dealing damage and marking them. When the user deals damage to marked opposing Pokémon, the marks are removed and the opposing Pokémon falls asleep.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Fire a ball of darkness at an enemy. Additional balls of darkness will be thrown at each enemy within in the area of effect. Enemies hit will be dealt damage and marked. The mark lasts 5s. When Darkrai deals damage to marked enemy, the marks are removed and the Enemy falls asleep for 2s.

Upgrade (Level 11): Applies a 40% slow for 3s when applying a mark to an enemy.

moves.name: Shadow Claw
moves.description: Has the user slash in the designated direction with sharp claws made from shadows, dealing damage and marking opposing Pokémon it hits. When the user deals damage to marked opposing Pokémon, the mark is removed and the opposing Pokémon falls asleep. When this move hits, this move can be used agai and the user deals damage in the designated direction with huge claws.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Slash in a designated direction with sharp claws made from shadows, dealing damage in a line, applying a 40% slow for 3s and marking enemies hit. When the user deals damage twice to marked enemies, that marked enemy falls asleep for 2s and has their mark removed. When this move hits, this move can be used again. The second use of this move hits a designated target with huge claws, dealing damage. If there are any opposing Pokémon suffering from Bad Dreams, the second use of this move will deal increased damage.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increases the damage dealt by this move.

moves.name: Calm Mind
moves.description: Has the user quietly focus its mind and calm its spirit to increase its Sp. Atk, Sp. Def and movement speed for a short time.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: The user focuses their mind, increasing their Special Attack and Special Defense by 30% for 3s and Movement Speed by 50% for 3s, decaying by 10% every 0.5 seconds to a minimum of 10%.

moves.name: Nasty Plot
moves.description: Has the user gain 1 Nasty Plot counter while moving in the designated direction. A maximum of 2 Nasty Plot counters can be stored. When the user uses its next basic attack or boosted attack, the user consumes all Nasty Plot counters and deals additional damage based on the number of counters consumed.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Dash a short distance, gaining a Nasty Plot counter for 7s and refreshing the duration of all current counters. Upon using a basic attack, consume all nasty plot counters to deal damage to one of the targets hit. Upon using a boosted attack, turn the boosted and all nasty plot counters into a series of projectiles, hitting every target of Darkrai's boosted.

A maximum of two counters may be held. Nasty Plot has no cooldown between dashes.

Upgrade (Level 13): Gain one charge of this move in reserve when an enemy falls asleep.

moves.name: Dark Pulse
moves.description: Has the user hide in a circle of shadow and creates six additional circles of shadow around itself. While the circles of shadoww are active, the user can move between them freely. When this move is used again, the user appears from the designated circle of shadow and releases a horrible aura imbued with ill intent, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits. While the user is hiding in a circle of shadow, it can use Shadow Claw to attack with claws from that shadow and deal damage to opposing Pokémon it hits.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Hide in a shadow and create additional shadows around the hiding spot. Darkrai may freely move between the shadows. When this move is used again and held, the move ends and Darkrai appears from the shadow it dealt damage from. When this move is used again but is not held or after 4s elapses, Darkrai appears from the shadow they are currently hiding in, deals damage to enemies hit, then returns to the original shadow. Dark Pulse may then be used one more time if the move was only tapped. Darkrai will leave the shadow after 4s, dealing damage to all enemies in the shadow that Darkrai appears from.

While hiding, Shadow Claw may be used to attack from the shadow that is being hidden in. Shadow Claws used this way will not apply the Shadow Claw mark to targets hit and deals reduced damage.

Upgrade (Level 13): Dealing damage with this move causes Darkrai to gain a shield for 2.5 seconds.

moves.name: Worst Nightmare
moves.description: Has the user send the designated opposing Pokémon into a nightmare. The user then suddenly appears in the nightmare. When the user deals damage to the opposing Pokémon isnide the nightmare, damage is also dealt to that same opposing Pokémon outside of the nightmare. When this move is used, all the user's move cooldowns are reset.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user becomes unstoppable and casts a sleeping spell on the designated Pokémon from the opposing team. If the target is successfully put to sleep, the user's moves' cooldowns are reset, the target is marked to receive 3% max HP damage over time every 0.5s over 10s (up to 21 times; maximum 63% max HP damage as Sp. Atk-based damage), and the user sends that target into a nightmare realm centered on their initial location for up to 8s. The user follows the target into the nightmare realm. While inside the nightmare realm, Darkrai and the target are unaffected by goal zones, jump pads, and Berries. Other Pokémon outside of the nightmare realm cannot target Darkrai or their target while they're inside.

3% max HP every 0.5s

If the designated Pokémon from the opposing team cannot be put to sleep, this Unite Move is canceled and 90% of the Unite Move gauge is refunded. This energy regeneration is affected by Energy Amplifier.

passiveAbility.name: Bad Dreams
passiveAbility.description: When an enemy is forcibly put to sleep near Darkrai, Darkrai deals damage to the target and gains a boosted attack. When Darkrai uses this boosted, every enemy that has been marked with bad dreams in the last 2.7s is attacked simultaneously.  Sleeping enemies near Darkrai take damage over time, and Darkrai deals 10% more damage to them while they remain asleep. Damage from this Ability doesn't wake up sleeping enemies.
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced:
When an enemy is forcibly put to sleep near Darkrai, Darkrai deals damage to the target and gains a boosted attack. When Darkrai uses this boosted, every enemy that has been marked with bad dreams in the last 2.7s is attacked simultaneously.  Sleeping enemies near Darkrai take damage over time, and Darkrai deals 10% more damage to them while they remain asleep. Damage from this Ability doesn't wake up sleeping enemies.

2% max HP every 0.5s

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Increases the speed of basic attacks by 3% for a short time after one hits. This effect can stack up to 4 times, and with every third activation of this effect, basic attacks become boosted attacks for a short time. These boosted attacks fire more quills, but the damage dealt by each quill is decreased.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Increases the speed of auto attacks by 3% for 2.5s after one hits. This effect can stack up to 4 times, and with every third activation of this effect, auto attacks become boosted attacks for a short time. These boosted attacks fire more quills, but the damage dealt by each quill is decreased.

moves.name: Leafage
moves.description: Pelts leaves in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies hit. For a short time after using this move, Decidueye’s Attack and basic attack speed are increased.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Pelts leaves in the designated direction, dealing damage in a cone to enemies hit (only hits once). For a short time after using this move, Decidueye’s Attack is increased by 10% (this also affects Leafage) and auto attack speed is increased by 25% for 3s.

moves.name: Razor Leaf
moves.description:
Summons whirling razor leaves. For a short time after using this move, Decidueye’s Attack and basic attack speed are increased, and basic attacks can target multiple enemies for a short time.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increases the basic attack damage the higher the enemies remaining HP is.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Summons whirling razor leaves.  While active, Decidueye's auto attack is replaced by a new auto attack that targets up to 2 additional enemies in range, as well as increasing Attack by 10% and auto attack speed. This buff lasts for 5.5s.

moves.name: Spirit Shackle
moves.description:
Charges power before firing quills in the designated direction. Damage dealt increases the longer power is charged, but movement speed is decreased while charging. If this move hits after power is charged to the maximum, it can stitch enemies to the ground. The affected Pokémon receives damage upon moving a set distance from that location, and their movement speed is decreased for a short time.

Upgrade (Level 11): Deals increased damage to enemies with low remaining HP.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Charges power before firing a large arrow in the designated direction. Damage dealt increases the longer power is charged (with 6 breakpoints and a max-charge at 1.3s), but movement speed is decreased by 25% while charging. If this move hits after power is charged to the maximum, it can stitch enemies to the ground. The affected enemy has their movement speed decreased by 80% for a short time when exiting the area, and receives damage upon leaving the area. A maximum of 3 uses can be kept in reserve for this move. There is a 2s cooldown between uses.

Upgrade (Level 11): Deals 15% increased damage to enemies with less than 50% remaining HP.

moves.name: Astonish
moves.description: Deals damage to enemies and decreases their movement speed for a short time.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Deals damage to enemies and decreases their movement speed by 80% for a short time.

moves.name: Leaf Storm
moves.description:
Creates a tempest of sharp leaves, dealing damage to enemies it hits and decreases their movement speed for a short time. At point-blank range, it also shoves enemies hit.

Upgrade (Level 13): Increases the length of time that the movement speed of enemies is decreased.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Creates a tempest of sharp leaves, dealing damage to enemies it hits and decreases their movement speed by 60% for 2.5s. The slow decays at 10% per 0.5s up to four times. At point-blank range, it also shoves and stuns enemies hit for 1s.

Upgrade (Level 13): Movement speed decrease now lasts 3.5s but still decaying up to four times at 10% per 0.5s.

moves.name: Shadow Sneak
moves.description:
Creates a shadow that takes hold of one enemy in the area of effect, dealing damage and decreasing their movement speed and Defense for a short time. Also increases Decidueye’s movement speed for a short time.

Upgrade (Level 13): Further decreases Defense.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Decidueye creates a shadow that lasts for up to 5s, increasing Decidueye's movement speed by 70% for 2s, decaying by 20% every 0.5s, and reveals all opposing Pokémon in range temporarily. Pokémon that are sneaking remain invisible but can be targeted by the shadow giving away their position if they were within the initial cast range. Afterwards the shadow will automatically target an enemy player that is visible to Decidueye, inflicting damage, lowering their movement speed by 30% for 1s, and decreasing their Defense by 60% for 1.5s. Wild Pokémon that are currently aggressive can also be targeted but are otherwise ignored.

Upgrade (Level 13): Defense reduction of enemies is increased to 80%.

moves.name: Nock Nock
moves.description: Fires quills in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies. The move ends by unleashing a particularly large quill that deals damage to all enemies it hits. This move deals increased damage if the enemies remaining HP is low. While using this move, Decidueye becomes immune to hindrances but is unable to move.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Fires quills in the designated direction for 5s, dealing damage to enemies but does not pierce through them. The move ends by unleashing a large quill that deals damage to all enemies it hits (30% more damage if the target is below 50% HP) but Nock Nock can be cancelled early. While using this move, Decidueye becomes unstoppable but is unable to move.

passiveAbility.name: Long Reach
passiveAbility.description: Deals increased damage to distant enemies.
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced: Increases Decidueye's auto attack and move damage by 20% to distant enemies.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage when it hits.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage when it hits.

moves.name: Ember
moves.description: Shoot a small flame in front of itself, dealing damage to enemies hit.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Shoot a small flame in front of itself, dealing damage to enemies hit.

moves.name: Fire Blast
moves.description:
Launch an intense, all-consuming fire in a forward direction; dealing damage to enemies hit. As the fire travels, it leaves behind a zone of flames in which a delayed explosion will occur, dealing damage to enemies in the area-of-effect.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increased damage.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Delphox launches an intense, all-consuming fire in a forward direction; dealing damage to enemies hit. As the fire travels, it leaves behind a zone of flames in which a delayed explosion will occur; dealing damage to enemies in the area-of-effect.

Upgrade (Level 11): Damage increased.

moves.name: Mystical Fire
moves.description:
Unleash a special, hot ball of fire in a forward direction. If it hits an enemy, the fire will explode; dealing damage to enemies in the area-of-effect.

Upgrade (Level 11): Also reduces cooldowns of all moves if this move hits. If it hits an enemy from the opposing team, cooldowns are reduced even further.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Delphox unleashes a special, hot ball of fire in a forward direction. If it hits an enemy, the fire will explode; dealing damage to enemies in the area-of-effect.

Upgrade (Level 11): Also reduces cooldowns of all moves if this move hits by 1s. If it hits an enemy player, cooldowns are reduced even further (1.5s).

moves.name: Will-o-Wisp
moves.description: Conjure up three sinister flames and launch them toward the designated area. These flames then explode; dealing damage to enemies hit by the explosion and decreasing their movement speed by 30% for 2s.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Conjure up sinister flames and launch them toward the designated area. These flames then explode, dealing damage to enemies hit by the explosion and decreasing their movement speed by 30% for 2s. An enemy will only be counted as being hit by one flame and one explosion, even if all 3 flames visually hit.

moves.name: Fire Spin
moves.description:
Create a vortex of fire in the designated area. The vortex automatically moves toward the nearest enemy, dealing damage-over-time to all enemies caught in the area for a short time and decreasing their movement speed by 30% for 5s. After 4.5s passes or an enemy is caught in the center of the vortex; the flames increase in intensity. This increases the rate at which the flames deal damage and also leaves the enemies unable to act for 1s. This trapped damage ticks four times total. The Fire Spin will otherwise deal damage as it travels. Move placement on top of enemies will apply a "searching" tick and then apply "trapped" damage. A maximum of 9 ticks is possible.

Upgrade (Level 13): Applies a debuff on trap activation that increases all damage dealt by Delphox by 15% while enemies are trapped. Debuff is only cleansable after the first tick of trap damage and does not re-apply the debuff.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Create a vortex of fire in the designated area. The vortex automatically moves toward the nearest enemy, dealing damage-over-time to all enemies caught in the area for a short time and decreasing their movement speed by 30% for 4s. After 3.5s passes or an enemy is caught in the center of the vortex; the flames increase in intensity causing a trap activation. This increases the rate at which the flames deal damage and also leaves the enemies unable to act for 1s. This trapped damage ticks four times total. The Fire Spin will otherwise deal damage as it travels. Move placement on top of enemies will apply a 'searching' tick and then apply 'trapped' damage. A maximum of 9 ticks is possible.

Upgrade (Level 13): Applies a debuff on trap activation that increases all damage dealt by Delphox by 15% for 3s. Debuff is only cleansable after the first tick of trap damage and does not re-apply the debuff.

moves.name: Flame Charge
moves.description:
Charge forward in the designated direction. If there are any enemies in range when the charge ends, summon three flames to attack. The flames deal damage and decrease enemy movement speed for a short time. This move can be used while also using Fire Blast or Mystical Fire.

Upgrade (Level 13): Increases Delphox's movement speed for a short time when this move is used.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Delphox charges forward in the designated direction. If there are any enemies within auto attack range when the charge ends, summon three flames to attack. These flames deal damage and decrease enemy movement speed by 30% for 2s. This move can be used while also using Fire Blast or Mystical Fire. Each subsequent flame that hits deals 70% less.

Upgrade (Level 13): Increases Delphox's movement speed by 30% for 2s when this move is used.

moves.name: Fanciful Fireworks
moves.description: Deals damage-over-time to enemies in the designated area-of-effect. Enemies that are hit have decreased movement speed and weakened HP recovery effects for a short time.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Deals damage-over-time to enemies in the designated area for 8s. Enemies that are hit have 50% decreased movement speed and 50% reduced HP recovery effects for 1.75s. Recovery effects are weakened within the zone and cannot be cleansed while in the zone. Leaving the zone will have the weakened HP recovery effects linger for 1.75s and may be cleansed after leaving the zone. 8s duration (ticks at 0.5s intervals).

passiveAbility.name: Blaze
passiveAbility.description: When using a move while at low remaining HP, deal additional damage with a fireball to enemies. This Ability goes on cooldown after it’s triggered.
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced: When using a move when below 50% max HP, that move deals additional damage with a fireball to enemies (15s CD).

moves.name: Attack
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user attacks by slamming their body.

Dhelmise has no boosted attack.

moves.name: Payback
moves.description: Has the user swing its anchor, dealing damage and applying a slowing effect to opposing Pokémon it hits. The user deals increased damage if opposing Pokémon hit the user with an attack while this move is being used.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Has the user swing their anchor, dealing damage and applying a 30% slow for 2s to opposing Pokémon hit. The user deals increased damage if Dhelmise was hit with an attack while this move is being used.

moves.name: Power Whip
moves.description: Has the user slash its anchor horizontally in front of itself, dealing damage and applying a slowing effect when it hits and granting the user a shield. The edge of the anchor deals additional damage and leaves the opposing Pokémon it hits unable to act.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Has the user slash their anchor horizontally in front of themself, dealing damage, applying a 40% slow for 2s, and granting the user a shield for 3s. The edge of the anchor deals additional damage and leaves the opposing Pokémon it hits unable to act for 0.5s instead of slowing them.

Upgrade (Level 13): Increases the duration opposing Pokémon are left unable to act to 1s.

moves.name: Whirlpool
moves.description: Has the user swing its anchor diagonally, dealing damage and applying a slowing effect to opposing Pokémon. Every third time the move is used, it generates a whirlpool centered on the user, pulling in nearby opposing Pokémon. This move's cooldown is reduced every time the user hits with a basic attack.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Dhelmise swings their anchor diagonally, dealing damage and applying a 40% slow for 2s to opposing Pokémon hit. Every third time this move is used, it generates a whirlpool centered on the user for 2s, continuously pulling in nearby opposing Pokémon every tick. This move's cooldown is reduced by 0.8s every time Dhelmise hits with a basic attack.

Dhelmise can auto attack and cast moves while the whirlpool is active.

Upgrade (Level 13): Further reduces this move's cooldown by 1.5s every time the user hits with a basic attack.

moves.name: Bulldoze
moves.description: Has the user shake the ground by slamming its anchor dealing damage to opposing Pokémon and throwing them.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Has the user shake the ground by slamming their anchor, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon and throwing them for 0.5s.

moves.name: Anchor Shot
moves.description: Has the user throw its anchor in the designated direction and catch an opposing Pokémon with it, dealing damage and leaving it uanble to act. The user then pulls the opposing Pokémon toward itself.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Has the user throw their anchor in a designated direction catching the first opposing Pokémon hit, dealing damage and leaving them unable to act. The user then pulls the target toward Dhelmise.

Stun duration is 0.6s from close range, and 0.8s at max range.

Upgrade (Level 11): Debuffs the targeted opposing Pokémon, increasing the amount of damage they receive from all sources by 50% for 0.8s or for as long as the target is being incapacitated.

moves.name: Heavy Slam
moves.description: Has the user lob its anchor in the designated direction, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon at the point of impact and leaving the munable to act. Opposing Pokémon near the point of impact take damage and have a slowing effect applied to them. The user then slams its heavy body down at the anchor's point of impact, dealing damage and applying a slowing effect to opposing Pokémon it hits.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user lobs their anchor in a designated direction dealing damage to opposing Pokémon at the central point of impact and leaving them unable to act for 0.5s. Opposing Pokémon near the point of impact take damage and are slowed by 40% for 2s. The user then slams their heavy body down at the anchor's point of impact, dealing damage and applying an additional 40% slow for 2s to opposing Pokémon hit.

Upgrade (Level 11): When the user slams their heavy body down, opposing Pokémon at the center of the point of impact are left unable to act for 0.5s.

moves.name: Seaweed Snare
moves.description: Has the user throw its anchor and ensnare a designated Pokémon from the opposing team with its long chain, dealing damage and leaving it unable to act. The user then charges at that Pokémon, dealing damage and leaving it unable to act. If othr Pokémon from the opposing team are hit by the anchor or the charge, they take damage and are shoved. The user converts a portion of the damage dealt while using this Unite Move into HP recovery.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Has the user throw their anchor and ensnare a designated Pokémon from the opposing team, dealing damage and leaving the target unable to act for 0.45s. The user then charges at the target, dealing damage and leaving them unable to act for 0.45s. If other Pokémon from the opposing team are hit by the anchor or the charge, they take damage and are shoved for 0.7s.

150% of DoT damage

Applies a cleansable damage over time effect to Pokémon on the opposing team that deals damage on hit and every 0.5s up to 9 times, healing Dhelmise with each tick based on damage dealt. The duration of the DoT is refreshed with each hit of the Unite Move.

passiveAbility.name: Steelworker
passiveAbility.description: Dhelmise is granted a shield whenever one of the user's moves deals damage to Pokémon from the opposing team (5s cd). Each time this Ability or other effects grant the Pokémon a shield, the Pokémon's next basic attack deals increased damage. This effect can stack up to 3 times. When the shield granted by this ability expires after 3s, HP proportional to the amount of remaining shields is restored.
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced:
Dhelmise is granted a shield whenever one of the user's moves deals damage to Pokémon from the opposing team (5s cd). Each time this Ability or other effects grant the Pokémon a shield, the Pokémon's next basic attack deals increased damage. This effect can stack up to 3 times. When the shield granted by this ability expires after 3s, HP proportional to the amount of remaining shields is restored.

20% of the remaining shield value granted from Steelworker.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing consecutive blows with each of the user's heads. When the sprint gauage is full, basic attacks will cause the Pokémon to charge in the direction they're facing and consume all of the sprint gauge. If this charging attack hits an enemy, all of the user's move cooldowns are reduced.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack. Attacking with a full sprint gauge turns the attack into a charge in the facing direction. If the sprint gauged attack hits an enemy, all cooldowns are reduced by 1s.

moves.name: Peck
moves.description: Move forward while jabbing with beaks. When the sprint gauge is full, instead charge forward while jabbing with beaks. Using this move fully consumes the sprint gauge.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Jabs forward with Doduo's beaks. When using the move, Doduo stops moving and loses sprint gauge due to dropping below the sprint gauge gaining threshold. When the sprint gauge is full, Doduo charges forward to jab the in the facing direction and fully consumes the sprint gauge.

moves.name: Tri Attack
moves.description:
Dodrio attacks with their beaks in a cone in front of themself, dealing damage to enemies and applying one of the following random effects to enemies hit: decrease Attack and deal damage-over-time for a set amount of time, deacrease auto attack speed, or decrease movement speed. When the sprint gauge is full, Dodrio instead shoots out 3 projectiles in a designated direction. If a projectile hits an enemy, the project deals damage and applies one of the aforementioned effects based on its color. After this move is used, Dodrio's next auto attack deals additional damage and restores HP. Holds 2 uses in reserve and cannot be used more than once every 1s.

Upgrade (Level 11): When the sprint gauge is full, this move's cooldown is reduced.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Dodrio attacks with their beaks in a cone in front of themself, dealing damage to enemies and applying one of the following random effects to enemies hit: Burn, Paralyze, or Freeze. When the sprint gauge is full, Dodrio instead shoots out 3 projectiles in the facing direction. If a projectile hits an enemy, the projectile deals damage but only the first projectile of random colour/type applies one of the following enhanced random effects to enemies hit: Burn, Paralyze, or Freeze corresponding to the colour/type. After this move is used, Dodrio's next basic attack deals additional damage and restores HP. Holds 2 uses in reserve and cannot be used more than once every 1s.

Also heals Dodrio for 7% max HP.

Burn: 8% Attack decrease for 2s, 12% Attack decrease if Sprint empowered. Paralyze: 8% Attack Speed decrease and 10% Movement speeed decrease for 2s, 12% Attack Speed decrease and 15% Movement speed decrease if Sprint empowered. Freeze: 20% Movement speed decrease for 2s, 40% if Sprint empowered.

Upgrade (Level 11): The next auto attack gains additional healing by 3% of max HP. When using full sprint gauge attack the charge time for this move is additionally reduced by 1s.

moves.name: Drill Peck
moves.description:
Dodrio moves forward while striking with their sharp beaks multiple times, dealing damage to enemies hit. When the sprint gauge is full, Dodrio instead dashes forward while striking with their sharp beaks multiple times, dealing damage to enemies hit and shoving them. Using this move fully consumes the sprint gauge.

Upgrade (Level 11): Reduces this move's cooldown. Also, when this move hits enemies, restore a portion of Dodrio's HP based on the amount of damage dealt.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Dodrio strikes forward with their sharp beaks multiple times, dealing damage to enemies hit. If used with a full sprint gauge, consume the sprint gauge and dash forward while striking with their sharp beaks multiple times, dealing damage to enemies hit and shoving them. During this dash, Dodrio receives 20% reduced damage.

3% of enemy max HP.

Upgrade (Level 11): Reduces base cd by 2s and restores a portion of Dodrio's HP equal to 30% of damage dealt by the flat damage (percent damage excluded).

moves.name: Quick Attack
moves.description: Dash forward, increasing the user's movement speed for a short time and deal damage to enemies hit. This move's cooldown is reduced if it hits an enemy.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Dash forward, increasing the user's movement speed by 30% for 2s and dealing damage to enemies hit. This move's cooldown is reduced by 1.5s if it hits an enemy.

moves.name: Agility
moves.description:
Become immune to hindrances for a short time and fully charge the sprint gauge. Afterward, movement speed is increased for a short time, and the sprint gauge charges faster.

Upgrade (Level 13): After this move is used, the sprint gauge becomes fully charged.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Become immune to hindrances for 0.5s and adds to the sprint gauge. Afterward, movement speed is increased by 20% for 4s, and the sprint gauge charges faster.

Upgrade (Level 13): Fully charges the sprint gauge on use.

moves.name: Jump Kick
moves.description:
Dodrio leaps forward while kicking. If this move makes contact with an enemy or obstacle, Dodrio leaps over it and stomps the ground when landing, dealing damage to enemies in the area-of-effect and decreases their movement speed for a short time and the sprint gauge charges. If this move makes contact with an enemy, this move's cooldown is reduced.

Upgrade (Level 13): When stomping the ground after leaping, enemies in the area are also left unable to act.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Dodrio leaps forward while kicking. If this move makes contact with an enemy or obstacle, Dodrio leaps over it, stunning enemies by 0.5s, and stomps the ground when landing, dealing damage to enemies in the area-of-effect, slowing by 25% for 2s, and the sprint gauge charges by 75%. If this move makes contact with an enemy, that enemy is stunned briefly from getting kicked in the head and this move's cooldown is reduced by 3s.

Upgrade (Level 13): Enemies in the area of the landing are also stunned for 0.6s.

moves.name: Triple Trample
moves.description: Dodrio runs to a designated location. While running, Dodrio is immune to hindrances. If Dodrio makes contact with an enemy while running, they are dealt damage and thrown into the air. When Dodrio arrives at the designated location, Dodrio gains increased Attack for a short time, is granted a shield, and the sprint gauge charges faster for a short time.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Dodrio runs to a designated location. If Dodrio makes contact with an enemy while running, they are dealt damage and thrown into the air for 1s. When Dodrio arrives at the designated location, Dodrio gains 25% increased Attack and loses 5% Sp. Attack for 3s, is granted a 10% Max HP shield for 3s, and the sprint gauge charges faster for 6s. Damage dealt at the designated location is affected by the Attack bonus. Dodrio is unstoppable during this move.

passiveAbility.name: Run Away
passiveAbility.description: Movement speed is increased when enemies are nearby. While the Pokémon is moving, their sprint gauge charges. While the sprint gauge is full, movement speed is increased. If the Pokémon's movement speed decreases below a set speed, the sprint gauge will rapidly deplete. When this Pokémon scores a goal, the amount of Aeos energy deposited is evenly divided into equal portions for each head the Pokémon has.
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced: This Pokémon receives 10% increased movement speed when within a radius of enemy Pokémon. While moving, the sprint gauge charges from 0 to 10 (2% increased movement speed per increment). At full, Dodrio runs at 20% increased movement speed. If movement speed is decreased below a threshold, the sprint gauge will rapidly deplete. When Doduo scores a goal, it evenly divides its collected Aeos energy into two portions and deposits them into the goal one at a time. As Dodrio, this is split into three portions to deposit in the goal one at a time. Only goals made by a full emptying of the Aeos Ball will count towards stacking items.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Each time damage is dealt to enemies, boosted basic attack gauge increases. When the boosted basic attack gauge is full (after 8 instances of damage), the Pokémon's basic attacks become boosted attacks.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Becomes boosted attacks when the boosted attack gauge is full, dealing increased damage in an area of effect centered on the opposing Pokémon they hit.

Each time the user deals damage to opposing Pokémon, the boosted attack gauge increases by 1, becoming full when the user deals damage 8 times. After not dealing damage for 3s, the boosted attack gauge decreases by 2 every 0.5s.

moves.name: Astonish
moves.description: Lets out a sound blast in a forward direction. The shout explodes when it hits an enemy or after traveling a set distance, dealing damage in the area and decreasing their movement speed for a short time
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Lets out a sound blast in a forward direction. The shout explodes when it hits an enemy or after traveling a set distance, dealing damage in an area and decreasing enemy movement speed by 30% for 2s.

moves.name: Dragon Breath
moves.description:
Exhales a mighty gust in the designated direction, dealing damage to Pokémon in the area of effect and decreasing their movement speed. The gust also leaves the ground burning for a set amount of time. Pokémon in this area of effect take damage over tim and have their movement speed decreased for a short time. If this move is used while the uesr is flying with Dragon Dance, the mighty gust is exhaled along Dragon Dance's flight path, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon in the area of effect and the decreasing their movement speed for a short time.

Upgrade (Level 13): Deals increased damage and further decreases their movement speed
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user exhales a mighty gust in the designated direction, damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of effect and decreasing their movement speed by 30% for 2s. The gust leaves the ground burning for 3s, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon in the area of effect every 0.5s (up to 7 times) and decreasing their movement speed by 30% for 2s.

If this move is used while the user is flying with Dragon Dance, the mighty gust is exhaled along Dragon Dance's flight path instead, with the same effects; the burning ground can hit up to 9 times.

Upgrade (Level 13): Increases the damage of this move and the burning ground; strengthens the movement speed decrease to 45%.

moves.name: Shadow Ball
moves.description:
Hurls a shadowy blob in the designated direction, dealing damage to Pokémon it touches and applying a mark to them. When marked Pokémon are hit by Dragapult, they receive additional damage. The fourth time the marked Pokémon is hit, the mark is removed, but the damage dealt by the attack is further increased and the user recovers HP. After using this move, the user moves a short distance in a designated direction.

Upgrade (Level 13): Increased Damage
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user hurls a shadowy blob in the designated direction, damaging opposing Pokémon hit and applying a marker with 4 parts to them for 5s; then dashes in the chosen direction forward. When the user hits a marked target, one part of the marker is consumed to deal additional damage. The fourth part of the mark deals increased additional damage and removes the mark when consumed, and the user restores 20% max HP.

Upgrade (Level 13): Increases the damage of this move and the additional damage from marks.

moves.name: Quick Attack
moves.description: Dashes in the designated direction, increasing its basic attack speed for a short time
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Dashes in the designated direction, increasing basic attack speed by 40% for 2s.

moves.name: Dragon Dance
moves.description:
Flies in a circular pattern in the designated direction. While flying, it continuously deals damage to nearby enemies with basic attacks that deal less damage but have increased attack speed. If this move is used again while the user is flying, the user stops flying and moves a short distance in the designated direction. If the user knocks out an enemy, this move's cooldown is reset. If the user assists in a knock out, this move's cooldown is reduced by half. When this move is used, Dragon's Breath's cooldown is reset

Upgrade (Level 11): While the user is flying, its attacks also restores HP when they hit
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user prepares a circular flight path in the designated direction, then moves into a direction either side to fly on the path; the flight path takes 3.5s to complete. While flying, the user increases their basic attack speed by 200% and they continuously use auto attacks, dealing 10% reduced damage to opposing Pokémon hit. If this move is used again while the user is flying, the user stops flying, becomes briefly invincible and dashes a short distance forward. If the user knocks out a Pokémon from the opposing team, this move's cooldown is reset. If the user assists in knocking out a Pokémon from the opposing team instead, this move's cooldown is reduced by 50%.

When this move is used, Dragon Breath's cooldown is reset.

Upgrade (Level 11): While the user is flying, auto attacks restore the user's HP for an additional 25% of damage dealt.

moves.name: Phantom Force
moves.description:
For a short time, increases the user's movement speed and enters stealth. While the user is in stealth, the boosted basic attakck gauge increases. When stealth ends, Dragapult's basic attack speed is increased for a short time. After this move is learned, if the user knocks out an enemy, this move's cooldown is reset and Dragapult's Attack is increased by 6 until the end of battle. This Attack increase can stack up to 8 times.

Upgrade (Level 11): Reduces this move's cooldown by 0.5s when the user deals damage to enemies with basic attacks.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user enters stealth for up to 6s or until using an attack, increasing their movement speed by 30% and increasing the boosted basic attack gauge by 1 every 1s. When the user exits stealth, the user's basic attack speed is increased by 85% for 3s.

When this move is learned, if the user knocks out a Pokémon from the opposing team, this move's cooldown is reset and the user's Attack is increased by 8 until the end of the battle (up to 10 times; maximum 80 bonus Attack).

Upgrade (Level 11): Reduces this move's cooldown by 0.5s per opposing Pokémon hit by the user's auto attacks.

moves.name: Dreep and Destroy
moves.description: Launches two Dreepy and each deals damage to different Pokémon in the area of effect. The lower the opposing Pokémon's remaining HP is, the more damage the Dreepy deal. If there is only one target in the area of effect, both Dreepy target that Pokémon and deal damage to it. A maximum of 2 uses can be kept in reserve for this move. Dreepy may be fired once every 2 seconds. Neither Cooldown Reduction nor gaining Aeos Energy reduce the cooldown of Dreep and Destroy.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user launches two Dreepy at up to 2 different opposing Pokémon in range, damaging them and dealing additional missing HP damage to each target. If there is only one target in range, the second Dreepy deals 30% of the full damage to the target. A maximum of 2 uses can be kept in reserve for this Unite Move; there is a 2s cooldown between uses for this move.

30% of Damage

Against wild Pokémon: additional missing HP damage is capped at 1200.

passiveAbility.name: Clear Body
passiveAbility.description: Reduces the duration of debuff effects inflicted on Dragapult by 50%
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced: Reduces the duration of debuffs inflicted on this Pokémon by 50%.

moves.name: Attack - Dratini
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, blasting water in front of Dratini, dealing increased damage, reducing the cooldown of Dratini's moves by 1s, and recover 5% max HP when this hits.

moves.name: Twister
moves.description: Creates a twister and releases it in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies hit and decreases their movement speed for a short time.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Creates a twister and releases it in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies hit and decreases their movement speed by 50% for 1s.

moves.name: Dragon Dance
moves.description: Dash in a designated direction, in one of three cycling patterns. After using this move, grant a buff increasing attack speed, movement speed, Attack by 8% (capping at 24%), as well as increasing the stage of Hyper Beam. This buff stacks up to 3 times, and the duration is reset to full on reuse. All stacks are removed after a few seconds. Basic attacks reduce the cooldown of this ability by 1s.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Dash in a designated direction, alternating each use between a left arc, right arc and a direct dash. After using this move, grant a buff increasing attack speed of the next 3 auto attacks by 80% for 4.5s, increasing movement speed by 30% for 1s, increasing Attack by 10% (capping at 30%), as well as increasing the stage of Hyper Beam. This buff stacks up to 3 times, and the duration is reset to full on reuse. All stacks are removed after a few seconds. Auto attacks reduce the cooldown of this ability by 1s.
