Centers one telekinetic blast each on the user, any guard-swapped enemies, and any Light Screen or Barrier walls created by the user, damaging all enemies caught in the blasts and lowering their Sp. Defense for a short time. If an enemy is hit by multiple overlapping blasts, that enemy is also left unable to act for a short time.

Upgrade (Level 11): Also decreases the movement speed of enemies for a short time.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Mr. Mime pulses energy, dealing damage in an area around themself, any target affected by Power Swap, and any Barriers or Light Screens. After three pulses, a final pulse will damage enemies and stun them for 1s. Enemies hit by the pulses have their SpDef lowered by 5% for 3s with each hit (maximum 8 stacks).

Upgrade (Level 11): Enemies hit by the pulses are additionally slowed by 30%.

moves.name: Light Screen
moves.description: Create a wall of light in the designated area that prevents enemies from passing.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Mr. Mime creates a wall that prevents enemies from passing. If an enemy is near the location where the wall is created, they are shoved and left unable to act for 0.5s.

moves.name: Barrier
moves.description:
Create a translucent wall in the designated location that prevents enemies from passing. A maximum of two uses can be kept in reserve for this move and cannot be used more than once every 2s.

Upgrade (Level 13): Increases the max number of uses that can be kept in reserve.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Mr. Mime creates a wall that prevents enemies from passing. If an enemy is near the location where the wall is created, they are shoved and left unable to act for 0.5s. Holds 2 uses in reserve and cannot be used more than once every 2s.

Upgrade (Level 13): Stores 3 uses in reserve instead.

moves.name: Power Swap
moves.description:
Swaps the user's Defense and Sp. Defense stats with those of another Pokémon for a short time when it hits. Swapping with an enemy deals damage over time and decreases their movement speed while increasing the user's movement speed for a short time. Swapping with an ally increases the movement speed of that ally and the user for a short time.

Upgrade (Level 13): Also continually restores the HP of the user and the ally while this move is in effect.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Creates a link between Mr. Mime and the target this move hits. While the link holds, Mr. Mime's movement speed increases by 10% and their HP is continually restored. The link will continue to hold for as long as the linked target stays in range or until another target is Power Swapped. Damage and healing ticks at a rate of 0.5s.

If the linked target is an ally, this move increases their movement speed by 8%, increases the amount of damage they deal by 15%, and continually restores their HP. If the linked target is an enemy, this move decreases their movement speed by 8%, decreases the amount of damage they deal by 15% and deals damage over time to them. Power Swap can be cleansed.

Upgrade (Level 13): Increases the amount of damage dealt by allies to 20% and decreases the amount of damage dealt by enemies to 20%.

moves.name: Showtime
moves.description: Jump to the designated location and start a pantomime performance, dealing damage over time to enemies in the area of effect and leaving them unable to act for a short time.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Mr. Mime leaps forward and begins a performance; stunning enemies for 0.5s, dealing damage in a large area around him 4 times, and becomes unstoppable for the duration. The final hit deals double damage and stuns enemies for 1s.

passiveAbility.name: Filter
passiveAbility.description: Reduced damage received for a short time after using a move.
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced: Upon casting a Move, Mr. Mime takes 10% less damage for 2s.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack. When this boosted attack hits, it deals damage to nearby enemies and decreases their movement speed for a short time.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack. When this boosted attack hits, it deals damage to nearby enemies and decreases their movement speed for a short time.

moves.name: Powder Snow
moves.description: Attack with a chilly gust of powdery snow, decreasing the movement speed of enemies for a short time when it hits.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Ninetales attacks with a chilly gust of powdery snow; dealing damage to enemies hit and decreasing their movement speed by 50% for 1s.

moves.name: Avalanche
moves.description:
Attack with a gush of chilly ice toward the designated area. The ice forms a wall that cannot be passed through on land. After a short time this wall melts and collapses, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect.

Upgrade (Level 11): Also decreases the movement speed of enemies for a short time when this move hits.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Ninetales attacks with a gust of chilly ice toward the designated direction. The ice damages enemies and forms a wall that can't be walked through. After a short time, this wall melts and collapses; further damaging enemies in a radius around the wall.

Upgrade (Level 11): Also decreases the movement speed of enemies by 50% for 1s when this move hits.

moves.name: Dazzling Gleam
moves.description:
Attack with a powerful cone of blinding light, leaving enemies unable to act when this move hits.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increased damage dealt and stun duration.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Ninetales attacks with a powerful cone of blinding light; damaging and stunning enemies hit for .8s.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increased damage and stun duration to 1s.

moves.name: Icy Wind
moves.description: Attack with a gust of freezing air, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and decreases their movement speed for a short time when it hits.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Attacks with a gust of freezing air; damaging, and slowing Pokémon hit by 20% for 1s. Icy Wind shoves Pokémon hit in the direction of the wind for a short distance unless they are already at the maximum range of the move.

moves.name: Blizzard
moves.description:
Summons a howling blizzard in two blasts in front of the user. The first blast deals damage to enemies in the area of effect and decreases their movement speed for a short time. The second blast deals damage to enemies in the area of effect and shoves them. If the second blast hits an obstacle, it also deals damage to enemies near the point of impact.

Upgrade (Level 13): Increased damage.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Ninetales blasts twice in a line. The first blast penetrates walls and slows enemies. The second blast deals double damage, shoves enemies back, and if it hits a wall it creates a frost area at the impact location for 4s; dealing damage every 0.5s and slowing enemies in the area by 35% for 1s on each tick.

Deals twice the damage of the first hit.

moves.name: Aurora Veil
moves.description:
Create an aurora around the user, reducing damage received by the user and nearby allies in the area of effect. While the user is inside the aurora, its movement speed is increased and its basic attacks become boosted attacks.

Upgrade (Level 13): Further reduces damage allies receive.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Ninetales dashes a short distance and creates an aurora centered on their position for 5s; reducing damage received by Ninetales and allies within the veil by 35%, healing Ninetales with each boosted attack, and increasing Attack Speed by 15%. While Ninetales is inside the aurora, movement speed is increased by 10% and all auto attacks are boosted.

Upgrade (Level 13): Damage reduction increased to 40% and cooldown reduced by 2s.

moves.name: Snow Globe
moves.description: Attacks with a chilly blast of snow and ice, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect when it hits. Deals increased damage to enemies that are frozen.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Attack with a chilly blast of snow and ice; dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect around Ninetales when it hits. Deals increased damage to enemies that are frozen. Ninetales is unstoppable during the cast.

passiveAbility.name: Snow Warning
passiveAbility.description: Causes snow to fall on an enemy, dealing damage to it and decreasing their movement speed by 30% for .75s. Boosted attacks, Snow Warning, and all moves (except Aurora Veil) sling snow; hitting the same target with snow 4 times will freeze them for 1s. This ability has an 8s cooldown.
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced: Causes snow to fall on an enemy, dealing damage to it and decreasing their movement speed by 30% for .75s. This ability has a 4s cooldown. Boosted attacks, Snow Warning, and all moves (except Aurora Veil) sling snow; hitting the same target with snow 4 times will freeze them for 1s.

moves.name: Attack
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, lunging at an opposing Pokémon and dealing increased damage.

moves.name: Nuzzle
moves.description: Has the user nuzzle its electrified cheeks against the designated opposing Pokémon, dealing damage and leaving them paralyzed.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: The user nuzzles their electrified cheeks against the designated opposing Pokémon, dealing damage and leaving them paralyzed. The movement speed of opposing Pokémon paralyzed by this move is decreased by 30% for 2s and their basic attack speed is decreased by 10% for 2s.

moves.name: Thunder Punch
moves.description: Has the user unleash an electrified punch in the designated direction, dealing damage and applying a slowing effect to opposing Pokémon it hit. Fighter Mode: The move has a shorter range and no longer applies a slowing effect, but it deals increased damage.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Unleash an electrified punch in the designated direction, dealing damage, slowing opposing Pokémon hit by 40% and reducing their attack speed by 10% for 2s.

Fighter Mode: This move has a shorter range and no longer applies a slowing effect, but instead deals increased damage.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increases the damage dealt by this move.

moves.name: Supercell Slam
moves.description: Has the user electrify its body and dive toward the designated area, dealing damage and applying a slowing effect to the opposing Pokémon it hits. If this move misses, the user takes damage instead. When this move hits, it can be used again, and the user unleashes a punch in front of itself, dealing damage. Fighter Mode: The first stage of this move no longer applies a slowing effect, but it deals increased damage.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user charges up receiving 30% less damage and becomes unstoppable, then dives toward the designated area after releasing, gaining a shield for 3.5s, dealing damage and slowing opposing Pokémon hit by 30% for 2s. If this move misses, the user takes 3% of their remaining HP as damage instead. When this move hits, the move can be used again; when used a second time, the user unleashes a punch in front of themself, dealing damage and shoving opposing Pokémon hit.

Fighter Mode: The first stage of this move no longer applies a slowing effect and the area of effect is decreased, but this move deals increased damage and no longer has a charge time.

Upgrade (Level 11): Strengthens the slowing effect to 40% for 2s.

moves.name: Scratch
moves.description: Has the user attack a designated opposing Pokémon with its sharp claws, dealing damage.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: The user attacks a designated opposing Pokémon with sharp claws, dealing damage.

moves.name: Volt Switch
moves.description: Has the user cloak itself in electricity and charge into a designated Pokémon from the opposing team, dealing damage and moving behind it. After this move is used, for a short time it can be used again once only Fighter Mode; This move cannot be used repeatedly, but after it's used, the user's movement speed is increased.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user cloaks themself in electricity and dashes at an opposing Pokémon, dealing damage and moving behind them. For a short time after using this move, this move can be used once more.

Fighter Mode: This move cannot be used more than once before going on cooldown, but the user's movement speed is increased by 40% for 3s instead.

Upgrade (Level 13): Reduce this move's cooldown by 1s.

moves.name: Mach Punch
moves.description: Has the user throw a punch at blinding speed, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon, shoving them, and leaving them unable to act. This move's cooldown is reduced every time a basic attack hits. Fighter Mode: This move no longer leaves opposing Pokémon unable to act, but the number of attacks for this move is increased.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Dash at blinding speed towards the designated direction, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon, shoving them, and leaving them unable to act for 0.6s. This move's cooldown is reduced by 0.5s every time a basic attack hits.

Fighter Mode: This move no longer shoves or leaves opposing Pokémon unable to act, but the number of attacks for this move is increased to 3 hits.

Upgrade (Level 13): Increases the length of time opposing Pokémon are left unable to act to 1s.

moves.name: Zip Zap Full-Charge Spark
moves.description: Has the user charge toward the designated Pokémon from the opposing team and discarge electricity sotred in the user's fluffy fur, dealing damage to the Pokémon and nearby opposing Pokémon. After using this Unite Move, the user loses all the electricity stored in its fluffy fur and enters Fighter Mode for a set amount of time. The Unite Move gauge will only charge when the user's basic attacks and moves hit Pokémon from the opposing team. Fighter Mode: Basic atack and move effects change, and the Unite Move gauge does not charge.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Charge toward the designated Pokémon from the opposing team, dealing damage to the target and nearby opposing Pokémon. After using this move, the user enters Fighter Mode for 8s and resets the cooldown of all other moves. The Unite Move gauge will only charge when the user's basic attacks and moves hit opposing Pokémon. Basic Attacks against Pokémon from the opposing team increase Unite Move gauge by 4% and moves increase the gauge by 8%. Basic Attacks against wild Pokémon increase Unite Move gauge by 1% and moves increase the gauge by 2%.

Fighter Mode: Basic attacks and move effects change, and the Unite Move gauge does not charge. Gain 30% omni-vamp while Fighter Mode is active.

passiveAbility.name: Iron Fist
passiveAbility.description: After this Pokémon hits with a move, the next auto attack will be enhanced, dealing increased damage and restoring the user's HP.
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced:
After this Pokémon hits with a move, the next auto attack will be enhanced, dealing increased damage and restoring the user's HP.

Fighter Mode: After this Pokémon hits with a move, the next auto attack will be enhanced. The user lunges towards the target Pokémon, dealing increased damage and increasing the user's attack speed by 30% for 8 seconds. This effect can stack up to 2 times and the duration refreshes when gaining another stack.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage. This boosted attack also paralyzes enemies for a short time when it hits.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage and paralyzing the opposing Pokémon hit.

The movement speed of the opposing Pokémon paralyzed by boosted attacks is decreased by 30% and their basic attack speed is decreased by 10% for 1s.

moves.name: Thunder Shock
moves.description: Release electricity, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect. Also paralyzes enemies for a short time.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Releases electricity at the designated opposing Pokémon, damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of effect and paralyzing them when it hits.

Slows enemies briefly.

The movement speed of opposing Pokémon paralyzed by this move is decreased by 30% and their basic attack speed is decreased by 10% for 2s.

moves.name: Electro Ball
moves.description:
Hurl an electric orb, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and leaving them paralyzed for a short time. This move's damage increases the lower the enemies remaining HP is.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increased damage.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Hurls an electric orb at the designated opposing Pokémon, damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of effect, dealing additional missing HP damage, and paralyzing them when it hits.

6% of enemy missing HP.

The movement speed of opposing Pokémon paralyzed by this move is decreased by 50% and their basic attack speed is decreased by 10% for 2s. Against wild Pokémon: additional missing HP damage is capped at 1200.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increases the damage of this move.

moves.name: Thunder
moves.description:
Drop wicked thunderbolts, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increases the number of times this move attacks.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Drops wicked thunderbolts at the designated area, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon in the area of effect every 0.5s over 2.5s (up to 5 times).

Upgrade (Level 11): Deals damage over time more frequently, hitting opposing Pokémon in the area of effect up to 7 times over 2.5s.

moves.name: Electroweb
moves.description: Attacks and captures enemies using an electric net, leaving them unable to move.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Launches an electric net at the designated opposing Pokémon, damaging the target and immobilizing them for 1.5s when the net captures them.

moves.name: Volt Tackle
moves.description:
Has the user electrify itself and charge ahead, throwing opposing Pokémon.

Upgrade (Level 13): Reduced cooldown.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Becomes unstoppable and dashes at the designated opposing Pokémon, damaging the target 5 times and throwing them in the air for 1.4s; then leaps a set distance back, becoming vulnerable to hindrances and increasing movement speed by 60% for 2s (decaying by 10% every 0.5s; minimum 30% for 0.5s) after the leap.

Upgrade (Level 13): Reduces this move's cooldown by 2s.

moves.name: Thunderbolt
moves.description:
Attack with a strong electric blast, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and leaving them unable to act.

Upgrade (Level 13): Increased damage.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Strikes with a strong electric blast at the designated area, damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of effect and stunning them for 1.25s when it hits.

Upgrade (Level 13): Increases the damage of this move.

moves.name: Thunderstorm
moves.description: Attacks enemies near the user with tremendous bolts of lightning.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Becomes unstoppable and jumps into the air, then casts down bolts of lightning 4 times over 3s in a radius around Pikachu. The first cast targets all Pokémon on the opposing team in range with 1 bolt each; these bolts damage up to 1 target each. The following 3 casts target up to 2 random Pokémon from the opposing team in range; these following bolts deal damage to opposing Pokémon in a small area around them, but targets can only be damaged once for each of the following 3 casts.

Pikachu can act freely once the first bolts of lightning are cast down.

passiveAbility.name: Static
passiveAbility.description: Paralyzes all enemies nearby for a short time when receiving damage. This ability goes on cooldown after it's triggered.
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced:
When damaged, paralyzes nearby opposing Pokémon (30s CD).

The movement speed of opposing Pokémon paralyzed by this Ability is decreased by 30% for 2.5s and their basic attack speed is decreased by 10% for 2s.

moves.name: Attack
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Attacks with a shot of water.

Psyduck has no boosted attack.

moves.name: Confusion
moves.description: Has the user release weak telekinetic force toward opposing Pokémon, dealing damage and leaving them unable to act. While the mysterious power is active, damage dealt to opposing Pokémon is increased.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Releases a weak telekinetic force in the designated direction, damaging opposing Pokémon and stunning them for 1s when it hits.

While the mysterious power is active, deals increased damage.

moves.name: Surf
moves.description: Has the user create a wave in the designated direction, dealing damage and applying a slowing effect to opposing Pokémon it hits. When opposing Pokémon hit by this move already have a slowing effect applied, they are shoved. The user can ride the wave for a short time and use basic attacks and moves while moving. Ally Pokémon who touch the wave have their movement speed increased. If this move is used again, the user stops in place and creates another wave. While the mysterious power is active, the user will create two waves.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Creates a wave in the designated direction, damaging opposing Pokémon and decreasing their movement speed by 30% for 2.5s when it hits; if opposing Pokémon already have their movement speed decreased when this move hits, they are also shoved for 0.5s. Rides the wave for at least 0.6s and until this move is used again or for up to 5s, moving forward and increasing movement speed by 30%; the user can use basic attacks and moves while riding the wave. Ally Pokémon who touch the wave while Psyduck is riding it have their movement speed increased by 70% for 3s (decaying by 10% every 0.5s over 2s; minimum 30%). When this move is used again, stops in place and creates another wave in the designated direction.

While the mysterious power is active, creates two waves in the designated direction each time this move is used.

Upgrade (Level 11): Decreases the damage dealt by opposing Pokémon hit by this move by 25% for 2.5s.

moves.name: Bubble Beam
moves.description: Has the user forcefully eject a spray of bubbles, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits and attaching 3 bubbles. When ally Pokémon deal damage to opposing Pokémon that have bubbles attached, a bubble bursts, dealing damage and applying a slowing effect. When the mysterious power is active, the damage dealt when the bubbles burst is increased.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Forcefully ejects a spray of bubbles in the designated direction, damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of effect and attaching a mark with 3 bubbles to those hit for 5s. When a teammate damages opposing Pokémon with bubbles attached to them with auto attacks, a bubble bursts, damaging the target. When all bubbles on a target burst from auto attack damage, they are stunned for 0.5s and their movement speed is decreased by 30% for 2s.

While the mysterious power is active, strengthens the damage dealt when bubbles burst.

Upgrade (Level 11): Decreases the movement speed of opposing Pokémon hit by the beam by 30% for 2s.

moves.name: Tail Whip
moves.description: Has the user wag its tail, dealing damage, applying a slowing effect, and decreasing the SpDef of the designated opposing Pokémon. While the mysterious power is active, the opposing Pokémon's SpDef is decreased by a greater amount.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Wags their tail at the designated opposing Pokémon, damaging them and decreasing their movement speed by 30% and their Sp. Def by 20% for 2s.

While the mysterious power is active, strengthens the Sp. Def decrease to 30%.

moves.name: Disable
moves.description: Has the user release electricity that limits the designated opposing Pokémon's moves while dealing damage and leaving them unable to act. The electricity spreads to nearby Pokémon 5 times. (The electricity can only spread to the same Pokémon up to 2 times). Opposing Pokémon hit by the electricity will have the cooldown of their last used move increased. If an opposing Pokémon has no move on cooldown, the cooldown of the next move it uses will be increased. When an effect to increase a move's cooldown is applied, a slowing effect is also applied. While the mysterious power is active.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Releases electricity at the designated opposing Pokémon, damaging the target and stunning them for 0.2s. Opposing Pokémon hit by the electricity from this use of the move have a mark applied to them for 5s which has a disabling effect tied to it; the disabling effect increases the cooldown of the last move used by a marked target by 2s, or the next move used if no move is on cooldown (once only). When the disabling effect occurs, the target's movement speed is also decreased by 30% for 2s. The electricity spreads to a nearby opposing Pokémon up to 4 times; the electricity can only spread to the same target up to 2 times.

While the mysterious power is active, the electricity can spread up to 6 times; the electricity can spread to the same target up to 2 times.

Upgrade (Level 13): Strengthens the stun duration to 0.5s.

moves.name: Psychic
moves.description: Has the user release a strong telekinetic force in the designated area, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits and leaving them unable to act. The user continues to release a telekinetic force at the opposing Pokémon that took damage closest to the center of the area of effect. If this move it used again, the user pulls the opposing Pokémon receiving the telekinetic force in the designated direction. While the mysterious power is active, the user leaves the opposing Pokémon unable to act after pulling.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Decreases movement speed by 10% and releases a strong telekinetic force in the designated area, damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of effect and stunning them for 0.6s when it hits. Continues to release a telekinetic force at the Pokémon from the opposing team closest to the center of the area of effect when this move hits, marking them for 2s. If this move is used again or after 2s and the user is in range of the marked target, pulls the target a set distance in the designated direction (pulling them toward the user's location if no direction is designated), stunning them for 0.85s during the pull.

While the mysterious power is active, stuns the target marked by this move for 0.2s after being pulled.

Upgrade (Level 13): Decreases the Sp. Def of opposing Pokémon hit by the area of effect by 25% for 2s.

moves.name: Full-Power Psy-ay-ay!
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Releases three mysterious psychic waves around themself, damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of effect and decreasing the damage dealt by them by 30% for 3s when hit.

After using this Unite Move, increases the headache gauge by 50% as a consequence of Psyduck unleashing their full power.

passiveAbility.name: Swift Swim
passiveAbility.description: When damaged by a Pokémon from the opposing team; increases movement speed by 40% for 2s, decaying by 10% every 0.5s (minimum 25% increased movement speed) (10s CD).
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced:
When damaged by a Pokémon from the opposing team; increases movement speed by 40% for 2s, decaying by 10% every 0.5s (minimum 25% increased movement speed) (10s CD).

This Pokémon's headache gauge increases by 1% for every 0.5% max HP damage received by Psyduck or nearby ally Pokémon from Pokémon on the opposing team. This gauge fills at a rate of 30% per 1s (requiring a total of 3.33s to fully charge). When the headache gauge is full, a mysterious power is triggered, interrupting Psyduck from casting moves, cleansing status conditions on themself, becoming unstoppable and decreasing their movement speed by 30% for 1s; then shoving nearby opposing Pokémon away for 0.8s, and resetting this Pokémon's move cooldowns. The mysterious power stays active for 10s, boosting moves and giving them 20% cooldown reduction. When the mysterious power ends, Psyduck cannot use moves or attacks, or charge their headache gauge for 2.5s.

builds.name: Surf - READ EXPLANATION; Items - HP emphasis

moves.name: Attack - Pikachu
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage and paralyzing the opposing Pokémon hit.

Paralysis from Pikachu's boosted attacks decreases opposing Pokémon movement speed by 30% and reduces auto attack speed by a flat 10% for 2s.

moves.name: Thunder Shock
moves.description: Releases electricity at the designated opposing Pokémon, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon in the area of effect. Also paralyzes opposing Pokémon for a short time.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Releases electricity at the designated opposing Pokémon; damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of effect and paralyzing those hit.

Paralysis from this move decreases opposing Pokémon movement speed by 30% and reduces auto attack speed by a flat 10% for 2s.

moves.name: Stored Power
moves.description: For a short time, increases the user's basic attack speed. The user's next 6 basic attacks also launch a star shaped electric blast that deals additional damage.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Increases auto attack speed by 35% and empowers the next 6 auto attacks for 5s.

Each empowered auto attack also launches a star-shaped electric blast at the target, dealing additional damage. This move goes on cooldown after all 6 electric blasts have been launched or after 5s.

Upgrade (Level 11): The electric blasts also decrease the target's Sp. Def by 10% for 3s (up to 3 times; maximum 30%).

moves.name: Electro Ball
moves.description: Has the user hurl an electric orb to the designated location, where it remains for a short time. When an electric orb and an opposing Pokémon touch, the orb releases its electricity and deals damage to nearby opposing Pokémon. A maximum of 2 uses can be kept in reserve for this move.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Hurls an electric orb toward the designated location, where it remains for up to 30s if it doesn't hit an opposing Pokémon on the way. When an electric orb and an opposing Pokémon touch; the orb releases its electricity and damages nearby opposing Pokémon.

A maximum of 2 uses can be kept in reserve, with a 0.5s cooldown between uses. A maximum of 3 orbs can be on the map at a given time.

Upgrade (Level 11): Deals damage every 0.5s over 3.5s (8 times) to opposing Pokémon hit by this move.

moves.name: Thunder Wave
moves.description: Has the user discharge a weak jolt of electricity in the designated direction, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon and leaving them paralyzed for a short time.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Discharges a weak jolt of electricity in the designated direction; damaging nearby opposing Pokémon and paralyzing those hit.

Paralysis from this move decreases opposing Pokémon movement speed by 30% and reduces auto attack speed by a flat 10% for 2s.

moves.name: Thunderbolt
moves.description: Has the user release a strong electric blast in the designated direction, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits and leaving them paralyzed. If this move hits an electric orb created by Electro Ball, the orb releases its electricty and deals damage to nearby opposing Pokémon.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Channels for 0.5s then releases a strong electric blast in the designated direction, damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of effect, and paralyzing them when it hits. Paralysis from this move decreases opposing Pokémon movement speed by 30% and reduces auto attack speed by a flat 10% for 2s.

If this move hits an electric orb created by Electro Ball; the orb releases its electricity, dealing increased damage to nearby opposing Pokémon.

Upgrade (Level 13): Immobilizes opposing Pokémon hit for 1s instead of paralyzing them.

moves.name: Psychic
moves.description: Has the user release a strong telekinetic force in the designated area, dealing damage and applying a slowing effect to opposing Pokémon it hits. If the user hits opposing Pokémon slowed by this effect with a basic attack, it deals additional damage. If this move hits an electric orb created by Electro Ball, the orb is pulled to the center of this move's area of effect.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Releases a strong telekinetic force in the designated area, damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of effect and applying a debuff which decreases their movement speed by 23% for 3s when it hits. If the user hits debuffed opposing Pokémon with an auto attack, it deals additional damage.

If this move hits an electric orb created by Electro Ball; the orb is pulled to the center of this move's area of effect. This does not extend the duration the electric orb remains.

Upgrade (Level 13): Creates a damage-over-time area of effect, damaging opposing Pokémon inside the area every 0.5s over 2s (up to 5 times).

moves.name: Thunderstorm Aerial
moves.description: Has the user create a star-shaped zone of electricity in the designated area, dealing damage and applying a slowing effect to the opposing Pokémon it hits. The zone remains on the field for a short time, deals damage over time, and applies a slowing effect. If the user hits opposing Pokémon in the zone with a basic attack, the user's next basic attack becomes a boosted attack.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Creates a star-shaped zone of electricity in the designated area for 4s, damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of effect when created, then damaging opposing Pokémon over time (up to 5 times) and decreasing their movement speed by 60% while in the zone.

If the user hits an opposing Pokémon that is in the zone with an auto attack, the next basic attack becomes a boosted attack.

passiveAbility.name: Static
passiveAbility.description: Upon receiving damage: paralyzes all nearby opposing Pokémon (30s CD).
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced:
Upon receiving damage: paralyzes all nearby opposing Pokémon (30s CD).

Paralysis from Static decreases opposing Pokémon movement speed by 30% and reduces auto attack speed by a flat 10% for 2s.

moves.name: Attack
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Shoots energy from their horn, damaging the opposing Pokémon hit.

moves.name: Confusion
moves.description: Has the user release a telekinetic force around itself, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon. If this move hits opposing Pokémon, the user's movement speed is increased for a short time.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: The user releases a telekinetic force around themself, increasing their movement speed by 33% per opposing Pokémon hit for 5.5s (up to 2 times; maximum 66%) before damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of effect when it hits.

moves.name: Dazzling Gleam
moves.description: Has the user emit a powerful flash around itself, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits. If opposing Pokémon are hit by the outer edge of the flash, the user's movement speed is increased for a short time. The increase is based on the number of opposing Pokémon hit. If the outer edge of the flash hits Pokémon on the opposing team, the user's movement speed is increased by a greater amount, and the cooldown of Tackle, Smart Strike, or Agility is reduced.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user emits a powerful flash around themself after a delay, damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of effect when it hits. The user gains 1 stack of 11% increased movement speed per wild Pokémon hit by the outer edge of the flash, or 2 stacks per Pokémon from the opposing team hit for 5.5s (up to 9 stacks; maximum 99% increased movement speed) before damaging them. If the outer edge of the flash hits Pokémon from the opposing team, the cooldown of Tackle, Smart Strike, or Agility is reduced by 30% of its current cooldown, successively with each target hit.

Against wild Pokémon: Dazzling Gleam damage is capped at 2500.

Upgrade (Level 11): Strengthens the cooldown reduction of Smart Strike or Agility to 50% of its current cooldown successively per Pokémon from the opposing team hit by the outer edge.

moves.name: Fairy Wind
moves.description: Has the user jump in the direction it's facing and, when it lands, stir up a fairy wind that deals damage to nearby opposing Pokémon. This move can be used again, up to 2 times total. If it's used 2 times, then on the final time, the user deals increase damage based on its movement speed and throws opposing Pokémon.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user jumps to the designated location then stirs up a fairy wind when they land, damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of effect. This move can be used again, up to 2 times total.

If it's used 2 times, the third attack deals increased damage and throws opposing Pokémon for 0.8s when it hits.

Upgrade (Level 11): Decreases the movement speed of opposing Pokémon hit by 20% for 2s with each use.

moves.name: Tackle
moves.description: Has the user charge, slamming into opposing Pokémon with its whole body while dealing damage and applying a slowinf effect to them.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: The user charges at the designated opposing Pokémon, damaging them and decreasing their movement speed by 20% for 2s when it hits.

moves.name: Smart Strike
moves.description: Has the user stab the designated opposing Pokémon with its sharp horn, dealing damage to it. After that, the user leaps in the designated direction while shoving the opposing Pokémon in the opposite direction.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user charges at the designated opposing Pokémon and stabs them with their sharp horn, dealing damage when it hits. The user then leaps in a chosen direction, shoving the target in the opposite direction and stunning them for 1s.

Upgrade (Level 13): Charges the user's psychic counter by 5 when this move hits.

moves.name: Agility
moves.description: Increases the user's movement speed when used, and for a set amount of time, the user's movement speed continually increases. This move's duration increases if the user moves or hits opposing Pokémon with moves.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user's movement speed increases by 20% when this move is used, increasing by an additional 7.5% every 0.5s over 3s (maximum 80% increased movement speed).

This move's duration increases by 1.5s if the user moves or hits opposing Pokémon with moves (up to 5 times for an additional 7.5s; maximum 10.5s duration).

Upgrade (Level 13): Also restores 2% of the user's missing HP every 0.5s while their movement speed is increased by this move.

moves.name: Triad Blitz
moves.description: Has the user charge in the designated direction, shoving Pokémon from the opposing team. When the charge ends, a mysterious space is created around the first Pokémon from the opposing team that the user hit. That Pokémon cannot leave that space. If this move is used again, the user runs at high speed in the designated direction, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon in its path. If its path goes through the mysterious space, this move can be used an additional time. This move can be used again up to 2 additional times.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user becomes unstoppable and charges at the designated opposing Pokémon, shoving opposing Pokémon in the way and stunning them for 0.8s when hit. When the charge ends, a mysterious triangular space is created around the designated opposing Pokémon if the user hits them. That Pokémon cannot leave that space.

When the mysterious space is created, this move can be used again up to 3 times within 5.5s. With each additional use, the user runs at high speed forward, damaging opposing Pokémon in their path. If the path of a dash starts or ends in the mysterious space, this move can be used again immediately afterward.

passiveAbility.name: Pastel Veil
passiveAbility.description: The Pokémon's psychic counter charges based on the distance they run (up to 10 times). When the counter is full, the Pokémon is granted a shield, becoming hindrance resistant while the shield remains.
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced:
The Pokémon's psychic counter charges based on the distance they run (up to 10 times). When the counter is full, the Pokémon is granted a shield, becoming hindrance resistant while the shield remains.

When the Pokémon reaches an additional movement speed threshold, the damage dealt by moves is increased by 5/20/35/50/60%. The increased damage based on movement speed is calculated before dealing damage with moves.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits and decreasing their movement speed for a short time. If Sableye is in stealth when it hits an opposing Pokémon with a boosted attack, it will deal damage and apply a fear effect. Opposing Pokémon affected by fear will be forced to move away from Sableye. When the user enters stealth, it will charge boosted attack immediately and hold it.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing damage to enemies hit and decreasing their movement speed by 20% for 2s. If Sableye is in stealth when hitting an enemy with a boosted attack, Sableye will deal damage and apply a fear effect for 1s. Enemies affected by fear will be forced to move away from Sableye with 40% reduced movement speed. When Sableye enters stealth, they will ready a boosted attack immediately and hold it.

moves.name: Thief
moves.description: Dashes in the designated direction, dealing damage to any Pokémon it hits and decreasing their movement speed for a short time. If this move hits an enemy Pokémon, it steals a small amount of their Aeos energy. If those Pokémon do not have any Aeos energy, they will be left unable to act for a short time.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Dashes in the designated direction, dealing damage to any Pokémon hit and slowing 20% for 2s. If this move hits an enemy, Sableye receives 5 energy and removes up to 5 energy from the enemies hit. If those enemies did not have any Aeos energy, they will be left unable to act for 0.5s.

moves.name: Knock Off
moves.description:
Dashes in the designated direction and then back again while attacking around itself, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon hit by the attacks and leaving them unable to act for a short time. For a short time afterward, this move can be used again. If it is, the user attacks in front of itself with its claws, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits and throwing them. When either the first or second stage of this move hits opposing Pokémon, those Pokémon will drop some of their collected Aeos energy, and for a short time, they’ll be unable to pick up Aeos energy. When either stage of this move hits opposing Pokémon that do not have Aeos energy, those Pokémon will be left unable to act—and for a longer duration. While using this move, the user receives reduced damage.

Upgrade (Level 10): For a short time after this move is used, the next time the user picks up Aeos energy, the user recovers HP and has its movement speed increased.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
When either activation of this move hits enemies that do not have Aeos energy (or are wild Pokémon), those enemies will be left unable to act for longer periods of time. Sableye dashes in the designated direction and then back again while attacking around themself, dealing damage to enemies hit and leaving them unable to act for 0.4s or 0.6s if they have no Aeos energy. This move can be used again within 6s attacking in front of Sableye with their claws, dealing damage to enemies hit, pushing them away and leaving them unable to act for 0.6s or 1s if they have no Aeos energy. When either the first or second activation of this move hits an enemy, they will drop 5 Aeos energy (total 15: 10 from first activation, 5 from second) and be left unable to pick up Aeos energy for 4s. While using this move, Sableye receives 40% reduced damage.

Upgrade (Level 10): Aeos energy picked up within 5s of using this move recovers 9% Max HP (one time per activation) and increases movement speed by 40% for 2s.

moves.name: Shadow Sneak
moves.description:
For a short time, increases the user’s movement speed and has it enter stealth. While this move is active, the user’s next boosted basic attack deals additional damage. While this move is active, if the user exits stealth and is not immobilized by a hindrance, it will be able to enter stealth again.

Upgrade (Level 10): Increases the duration of this move’s effects. While this move is active and the user is in stealth, it will also gradually recover HP.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Apply a 6.5s duration buff that stealths Sableye after 1.5s increasing Sableye's movement speed by 10%. If the initial stealthing is interrupted by a hindrance, Sableye will not enter stealth. When the buff first stealth's Sableye, Sableye is granted a readied boosted attack that deals additional damage. While the buff is still active, if Sableye exits stealth and is not immobilized or incapacitated by a hindrance, they will enter stealth again after 2s.

Upgrade (Level 10): Increases the duration of this move’s effects to 7.5s. While this move is active and Sableye is in stealth, Sableye will also restore 1% max HP every 0.5s.

moves.name: Astonish
moves.description: Attacks in a cone in front of itself, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon and decreasing their movement speed for a short time. If this move hits opposing Pokémon from behind, it deals increased damage and applies a greater decrease in movement speed.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Sableye attacks in a cone in front of themself, dealing damage to enemies hit and decreasing their movement speed by 30% for 2s. If this move hits enemies from behind, this move deals increased damage and applies a greater decrease in movement speed to 60%.

moves.name: Feint Attack
moves.description:
Has the user throw dummy Aeos energy to a designated location. While dummy Aeos energy remains at a location, that location and the area around it will be visible to the user. Dummy Aeos energy can remain at up to five locations at a time. If an opposing Pokémon picks up dummy Aeos energy, that energy explodes, dealing damage over time to that Pokémon and decreasing its movement speed for a short time. A maximum of three uses can be kept in reserve for this move.

Upgrade (Level 12): If an opposing Pokémon is knocked out while taking damage over time from this move, it will drop more Aeos energy than it normally would.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Throw dummy Aeos energy to a designated location. While dummy Aeos energy remains at a location, that location and the area around it will be visible to the user. Dummy Aeos energy can remain at up to five locations at a time. If an enemy walks on top of dummy Aeos energy, that energy explodes, dealing damage-over-time 9 times over 4s in an area and decreases the movement speed of enemies hit for 4s by 70% decaying by 20% every 0.5s to a minimum of 10%. Holds 3 uses in reserve and cannot be used more than once every 1s.

Note: Placing the dummy energy does not break stealth. Stealth is only broken when an enemy takes damage from the dummy energy.

Upgrade (Level 12): If an enemy is knocked out while affected by this move, they will drop more Aeos energy than they normally would.

moves.name: Confuse Ray
moves.description:
Fires a sinister ray in the designated direction, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits. If this move hits Pokémon from the opposing team, it also leaves them confused. While confused, Pokémon are left unable to act and start continuously attacking nearby Pokémon with basic attacks. Confused Pokémon will target nearby Pokémon in the following order of priority: first, their ally Pokémon; then, wild Pokémon; last, Pokémon on Sableye's team.

Upgrade (Level 12): Also increases the movement speed and basic attack speed of Pokémon from the opposing team while this move has left them confused.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Fires a sinister ray in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies hit. If this move hits enemy players, they are also left confused for 2s. While confused, enemies are  unable to act and continuously attack nearby enemies with basic attacks. Confused enemies will target nearby enemies in the following order of priority: first, their allies; then, wild Pokémon; last, Pokémon on Sableye's team. Knock outs for wild Pokémon will be attributed to Sableye, stealing the effects of the wild Pokémon being knocked out as well as the Aeos energy.

While confused, outgoing damage is decreased for auto attacks and move 1 by 50%. If the confused target knocks out a Wild Pokémon, Sableye receives the KO.

Upgrade (Level 12): Also increases target's movement speed by 30% and attack speed by 50% while confused from this move.

moves.name: Chaos Glower
moves.description: Shoot light from both eyes, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon in an cone in front of itself. Pokémon from the opposing team hit by this move who are facing the user are left unable to act and start preparing to return to base. If they take damage before returning to base, the return effect is cancelled, and they are left unable to act for a short time. Opposing Pokémon hit by this move who are not facing the user have their movement speed decreased for a short time.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Sableye becomes unstoppable for 1.2s and shoots light from both eyes, dealing damage to enemies in a cone in front of themself. Enemy players hit by this move who are facing Sableye are left unable to act for 3s and start preparing to return to base. If they take damage before returning to base, the return effect is cancelled, and they are left unable to act for 1.5s. Enemies hit by this move who are not facing Sableye have their movement speed decreased by 50% for 2s.

passiveAbility.name: Prankster
passiveAbility.description: When Sableye is outside the visual range of Pokémon from the opposing team, it enters stealth and its movement speed increases. When Sableye enters the visual range of a Pokémon from the opposing team, it does not immediately become visible but instead remains in stealth for a short time. This stealth lasts longer when approaching enemy Pokémon from behind. The Pokémon with this Ability exits stealth when it attacks.
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced: When Sableye is outside the visual range of enemy players, Sableye enters stealth and gains 10% increased movement speed. When Sableye enters the visual range of enemy players or enemy goal zones, Sableye does not immediately become visible but instead remains in stealth for 1.7s. Sableye exits stealth when attacking.

moves.name: Attack
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, decreasing enemy movement speed by 30% for 2s when it hits and increasing Scizor's Defense by 40% for 6s. This Defense increase can stack additively up to 3 times and the duration refreshes when gaining another stack.

moves.name: Fury Cutter
moves.description: Has the user slash twice with its scythes in a cone in front of itself, dealing damage to opposing Pok\u00e9mon it hits. The second slash deals more damage than the first.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Slashes twice dealing damage with its scythes in a cone. The second slash deals more damage than the first.

moves.name: Bullet Punch
moves.description: Has the user dash in the designated direction and strike opposing Pokémon with tough punches. If this move hits opposing Pokémon, its cooldown is reduced, and the user recovers a portion of its HP based on the amount of damage dealt. If Bullet Punch is used again within a set amount of time, the number of punches and the amount of damage dealt increase. The number of punches increases from three to a maximum of five. If Scyther learns this move, it will evolve into Scizor.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Dash in the designated direction and strike enemies, reducing this move's cooldown by 40% of its current cooldown if the attack connects and recovering a portion of HP with each hit. If Bullet Punch is used again within 8s, the number of punches increases. The number of punches increases from 3 to a maximum of 5.

30% damage of initial punch.

Upgrade (Level 11): Also grants a shield for 3s if this move hits an enemy.

moves.name: Quick Attack
moves.description: Has the user dash forward, dealing damage to opposing Pok\u00e9mon it makes contact with along the way.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Dashes in designated direction dealing damage to enemies hit along the way.

moves.name: Double Hit
moves.description: Has the user jump in the designated direction, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits during the jump and applying a mark to them. After the user hits opposing Pokémon with this move, it jumps again in the designated direction. When the user lands, its next basic attack becomes a boosted attack and it charges at a nearby opposing Pokémon. If a marked opposing Pokémon is knocked out, all of the user's move cooldowns are reduced.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Jumps in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies during the jump and applying a mark to that enemy until they leave combat. After hitting an enemy, jump again. An enhanced auto attack is prepared on landing that has increased range and charges at the enemy being attacked. This enhanced attack is available for 5s.

If a marked enemy is knocked out, all of the user's move cooldowns are reset. The mark may be cleansed.

Upgrade (Level 13): Reduces cooldown by 1s.

moves.name: Swords Dance
moves.description: Has the user dash a short distance, increasing its Attack for a short time. While the user's Attack is increased, the user's eighth basic attack becomes an area-of-effect attack that pierces through opposing Pokémon in a line.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Dashes a short distance, increasing Attack by 15% for 5s. While Swords Dance's attack buff is active, after basic attacks or abilities make contact 8 times, the user launches an area-of-effect attack that pierces through enemies in a line.

Upgrade (Level 13): Reduces the damage the user receives by 50% while dashing (0.3s).

moves.name: Red Illusion Dive
moves.description: Has the user dash before throwing consecutive punches at a designated Pokémon on the opposing team, decreasing that Pokémon's movement speed. As the last punch is thrown, five illusory copies of the user are created that each dash a set distance from the user. If a copy hits an opposing Pokémon while dashing, it deals damage, decreases that Pokémon's movement speed, then disappears. For a short time, this move can be used again. If this move is used again, the user dashes in the designated direction and deals damage to opposing Pokémon it hits before punching the ground, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon in the area of effect. If the user hits a Pokémon on the opposing team while dashing, the user grabs that Pokémon and continues dashing. If the grabbed Pokémon hits an illusory copy, it will be left incapacitated.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Target an enemy and punch them, dealing an initial hit of damage, decreasing their movement speed by 40% for 3s. Then create 5 copies that dash away from Scizor. If a copy hits a non targetted enemy while dashing out, it deals damage, decreases that enemy's movement speed by 40% for 3s, then disappears. If untouched, the illusory copy will remain on the battlefield for 8 seconds. Enemies that come in contact with an illusary copy will detonate the copy, having damage dealt to them an slowing them for 40% for 3s. For 8s after activation, this move may be used again, dashing in a designated direction dealing damage to enemies hit. The enemies hit are also grabbed and carried while Scizor continues dashing. At the end of the dash, Scizor punches the ground dealing damage in an area-of-effect. If the grabbed enemy hits an illusory copy during the shove, they will be dealt damage and be left incapacitated for 2s.

passiveAbility.name: Technician
passiveAbility.description: After using a move, the next basic attack will change to deal 2 attacks instead. The second attack deals reduced damage.
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced: After this Pokémon uses a move, the next auto attack will deal two consecutive auto attacks instead. The second of these deals decreased damage. Technician lasts 5s and has no internal cooldown.

moves.name: Attack
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, increasing Scyther's movement speed by 40% for 3s.

moves.name: Fury Cutter
moves.description: Has the user slash twice with its scythes in a cone in front of itself, dealing damage to opposing Pok\u00e9mon it hits. The second slash deals more damage than the first.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Slashes twice dealing damage with its scythes in a cone. The second slash deals more damage than the first.

moves.name: Dual Wingbeat
moves.description: Has the user slash in front of itself with both of its scythes, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon in the X-shaped area of effect. If this move deals damage to an opposing Pokémon in the center of the X-shaped area of effect, it restores the user's HP. If this move hits an opposing Pokémon, it can be used again within a set amount of time. If this move is used again, the user dashes in the designated direction, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it makes contact with. The dash deals more damage the lower the opposing Pokémon's HP is. If Scyther learns this move, it will not evolve into Scizor.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Slashes in front with scythes, dealing damage in an X-shaped area-of-effect. If the second slash deals damage to an enemy in the center, restore the user's HP. If this move hits an enemy, it can be activated again within a set amount of time. If this move is used again, the user dashes in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies hit. The dash deals more damage the lower their HP is.

15% of enemy missing HP. Against Wild Pokemon: The total damage is capped at 1200.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increases the damage dealt by this move.

moves.name: Quick Attack
moves.description: Has the user dash forward, dealing damage to opposing Pok\u00e9mon it makes contact with along the way.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Dashes in designated direction dealing damage to enemies hit along the way.

moves.name: Double Hit
moves.description: Has the user jump in the designated direction, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits during the jump and applying a mark to them. After the user hits opposing Pokémon with this move, it jumps again in the designated direction. When the user lands, its next basic attack becomes a boosted attack and it charges at a nearby opposing Pokémon. If a marked opposing Pokémon is knocked out, all of the user's move cooldowns are reduced.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Jumps in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies during the jump and applying a mark to that enemy until they leave combat. After hitting an enemy, jump again. An enhanced auto attack is prepared on landing that has increased range and charges at the enemy being attacked. This enhanced attack is available for 5s.

If a marked enemy is knocked out, all of the user's move cooldowns are reset. The mark may be cleansed.

Upgrade (Level 13): Reduces cooldown by 1s.

moves.name: Swords Dance
moves.description: Has the user dash a short distance, increasing its Attack for a short time. While the user's Attack is increased, the user's eighth basic attack becomes an area-of-effect attack that pierces through opposing Pokémon in a line.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Dashes a short distance, increasing Attack by 15% for 5s. While Swords Dance's attack buff is active, after basic attacks or abilities make contact 8 times, the user launches an area-of-effect attack that pierces through enemies in a line.

Upgrade (Level 13): Reduces the damage the user receives by 50% while dashing (0.3s).

moves.name: Green Illusion Dive
moves.description: Has the user dash and attack a designated Pokémon on the opposing team, then create five illusory copies of itself that each dash a set distance from the user. The copies deal damage to opposing Pokémon they make contact with and apply a mark to them. After a short time, the copies return to the user, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon they make contact with. This move can be used again before the illusory copies return to the user. If it is used again, the user dashes in the designated direction and deals damage to opposing Pokémon it hits. At the end of the dash, the copies dash to the user's location. If a copy makes contact with an opposing Pokémon while dashing, the copy deals damage to that Pokémon and disappears. If a marked opposing Pokémon is knocked out, all of the user's move cooldowns are reduced.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Target an enemy, slashing through them dealing an initial hit of damage and creating 5 copies a set distance away. Copies deal damage to enemies they make contact with and apply a mark to them for 5s. After 5s, the copies return to Scyther, dealing damage to enemies they make contact with and healing Scyther for each hit. This move may be used again within 5s of activating as a dash in a designated direction dealing damage to enemies hit. The copies then dash to the end location of the user's dash. If a copy makes contact with an enemy while returning to Scyther, the copy deals damage to that enemy and disappears. If a marked enemy is knocked out, all of Scyther's move cooldowns are reset. Subsequent copies hitting the same target deal 70% reduced damage.

passiveAbility.name: Technician
passiveAbility.description: After using a move, the next basic attack will change to deal 2 attacks instead. The second attack deals reduced damage.
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced: After this Pokémon uses a move, the next auto attack will deal two consecutive auto attacks instead. The second of these deals decreased damage. Technician lasts 5s and has no internal cooldown.

moves.name: Attack
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user attacks by slashing with a leek.

This Pokémon has no boosted attack.

moves.name: Dual Wingbeat
moves.description: Has the user attack by slashing with its leek. If this move deals damage to at least one opposing Pokémon, the user can perform a follow-up attack, which swings the leek downward.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: The user slashes in the designated direction, if the first hit lands then the user can use this move again within 5s to slam the leek in the designated spot.

moves.name: Fury Cutter
moves.description: Has the user deal swift consecutive jabs with the sharp stalk of its leek. With each jab that hits, the damage dealt increases. The last hit leaves opposing Pokémon unable to act.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user unleashes a flurry of jabs in the designated direction, with the damage increasing by 3% each time the move deals damage up to 2 times (6% max). The final hit stuns opposing Pokémon for 0.75s.

Sirfetch'd can move while unleashing the flurry of jabs. If the move is interrupted, 50% of the remaining cooldown is refunded.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increases the damage of this move.

moves.name: Leaf Blade
moves.description: Has the user jab with the sharp stalk of its leek. If this move hits, the next attack will have the user dash forward and slash horizontally, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon and throwing them.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user jabs in the designated direction, if the first hit lands then the user can use this move again within 10s to dash and slash in a designated direction, throwing opposing Pokémon hit for 0.5s.

If the first hit of this move misses, the cooldown is instead 2s.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increases the damage of this move.

moves.name: Quick Attack
moves.description: Has the user swiftly charge toward opposing Pokémon and receive a shield effect.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: The user dashes towards the designated Pokémon, dealing damage and gaining a shield for 3s.

moves.name: Brutal Swing
moves.description: Has the user throw its tough leek-leaf shield and deal damage to opposing Pokémon it hits. The shield returns in an arc, after which the user gains a shield effect. However, if this move is used again, the user instead springs to retrieve its shield. After retrieving its shield, the user then slams it into the ground, dealing damage and applying a slowing effect to nearby opposing Pokémon. The user also gains a shield effect.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user throws the leek-leaf shield in an arc, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon hit. When the leek-leaf shield returns the user gains a shield for 4s. While the leek-leaf shield is mid-flight it can continuously inflict damage to the same opponent every 0.5s.

Alternatively, this move can be used again within 1.5s while the leek-leaf shield is mid-flight causing the user to leap to where the shield is and slam it into the ground dealing damage in an area, applying a 70% slow for 3s, and granting the user a shield for 4s.

Upgrade (Level 13): Improves the strength of the shield.

moves.name: Detect
moves.description: Has the user ready its tough leek-leaf shield while the move button is held down. When it readies its shield, all attacks are parried and nullified for a short amount of time, and damage received is reduced thereafter. When the move button is released, the user dashes in the designated direction, dealing damage. If the leek-leaf shield blocks an attack, the second stage of this move will be boosted, dealing additional damage, applying a slowing effect and granting the user a shield. If the user successfully parries an attack, the delay for the second stage of this move is reduced.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Has the user ready the leek-leaf shield while the move button is held down, for 0.6s the user is Impervious, negating damage received, afterwards the user instead reduces damage received by 30% for up to 2.4s. When the move button is released the user dashes in the designated direction dealing damage.

If the user blocks an attack, the second stage of the move will apply a 50% slow for 2.5s, and grant a shield for 4s. If an attack is blocked while the user is Impervious, the cooldowns for Fury Cutter and Leaf Blade are reduced by 50% of their max cooldown.

Upgrade (Level 13): Reduces this moves cooldown by 1s.

moves.name: Lunging Leek Nova Blast
moves.description: Has the user ready its leek and then charge in the designated direction, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits and shoving them. The user then causes an explosion, dealing damage to nearby opposing Pokémon.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user becomes Unstoppable,  as well as maxing out the Steadfast gauge, and charges in the designated direction, shoving any opposing Pokémon along the way for up to 1s, dealing damage to them up to 5 times. If this move does damage near the end of the dash an explosion occurs dealing double damage and stunning opponents in the area for 0.4s.

This move can go through walls if there is enough distance left.

passiveAbility.name: Steadfast
passiveAbility.description: Tenacity is increased by 50% while the user has a shield. When the user hits an opposing Pokémon with a basic attack or move, the user's critical-hit rate increases by 5% up to 5 times for a maximum of 25%. This enhanced critical-hit rate remains for up to 8s after the user last dealt damage with a basic attack or move.
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced:
Tenacity is increased by 50% while the user has a shield. When the user hits an opposing Pokémon with a basic attack or move, the user's critical-hit rate increases by 5% up to 5 times for a maximum of 25%. This enhanced critical-hit rate remains for up to 8s after the user last dealt damage with a basic attack or move.

As a Farfetch'd, the user will gain 10 Exp. Points when landing critical hits. This Exp. can trigger evolution. Critical hits deal 160% damage rather than 200%.

moves.name: Attack
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user shoots a small flame at the designated target.

Becomes a boosted attack every third attack, dealing increased damage in a small area.

moves.name: Disarming Voice
moves.description: Has the user let out a charming cry in the designated direction, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits. When this move hits, the user sends an additional sound wave toward opposing Pokémon behind the Pokémon hit, dealing damage.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user lets out a charming cry in the designated direction, dealing damage.

When the move hits, an additional sound wave occurs in a small cone behind the initial target dealing slightly increased damage to opposing Pokémon.

moves.name: Hyper Voice
moves.description: Has the user unleash horribly loud vibrations in the designated direction, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits. When this move hits opposing Pokémon, the vibrations travel farther.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user unleashes horribly loud vibrations in the designated direction, dealing damage.

When the move hits, the vibrations travel further, become slightly wider, and deal slightly increased damage.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increases the damage of this move.

moves.name: Roar
moves.description: Has the user let out a mighty roar, dealing damage and applying a fear effect to oppsing Pokémon. When this move hits opposing Pokémon, the roar travels farther.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user lets out a mighty roar in the designated direction dealing damage and applying a fear effect for 1s. Pokémon under the fear effect walk towards the center edge of the cone.

When this move hits, the range is extended.

moves.name: Snarl
moves.description: Has the user snarl incessantly, dealing damage and applying a fear effect to nearby opposing Pokémon. For a short time, opposing Pokémon hit by this move deal less damage to the user. When this move hits Pokémon from the opposing team, the snarl travels farther.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user snarls incessantly, dealing damage and applying a fear effect for 0.5s. Pokémon under the fear effect walk in the direction the user snarled toward. For 2.5s opposing Pokémon hit by this move deal 20% less damage to the user.

When this move hits, the range is extended.

Upgrade (Level 13): Increases the damage debuff to 30%.

moves.name: Rousing Symphony
moves.description: Has the user vitalize nearby ally Pokémon with its gallant singing, increasing the damage ally Pokémon deal to Pokémon from the opposing team for a short time. Afterward, the user unleashes a fiery bird in the designated direction, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user vitalizes nearby allies and themself, increasing their damage by 15% for 6s. Afterward, the user unleashes a fiery bird in the designated direction, the range of which stretches across the whole arena.

This move can be aimed for up to 10s before it needs to be reselected. While aiming the field of view is increased greatly.

passiveAbility.name: Blaze
passiveAbility.description: The user's next move is granted 35% SpDef Pierce (20s CD).
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced: The user's next move is granted 35% SpDef Pierce (20s CD).

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack. When this boosted attack hits, deal damage to nearby opposing Pokémon and decrease their movement speed.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack. When this boosted attack hits, deal damage to nearby enemies and decrease their movement speed by 30% for 1s.

moves.name: Water Gun
moves.description: Slowbro channels a fierce stream of water which deals damage and lowers movement speed. Increase the area of effect and damage the longer this move is channeled.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Slowbro fires a stream of water, damaging and slowing enemies hit by 35% for 1s. This move can be channeled to increase its range and damage. Slowbro's movement speed is reduced by 30% while channeling. Restore 10% of Slowbro's Oblivious health (blue HP) once, after hitting an enemy.

moves.name: Scald
moves.description:
Deal damage to opposing Pokémon and create steam when it hits. Opposing Pokémon inside the steam's area are left burned and have their movement speed decreased.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increased area of effect.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Slowbro fires a stream of boiling water; damaging enemies hit, slowing them by 80% for 0.5s and creating a cloud of steam centered on the first enemy hit, which slows by 30% for 3s and applies a burn to all enemies inside. This burn reduces Attack by 60% for 3s. Restore 10% of Slowbro's Oblivious health (blue HP) once per stream instance after hitting an enemy (maximum 3 times).

Upgrade (Level 11): Increases the size of the steam cloud.

moves.name: Surf
moves.description:
Charge forward on a wave, dealing damage in an area and knock opponents back. This is followed by two more waves that deal damage and decrease enemy movement speed.

Upgrade (Level 11): The second and third waves become larger and also knock enemies back like the first wave.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Slowbro rides on a wave, damaging, knocking enemies back, and throwing them in the air for .4s. Two more waves follow after the first, damaging and slowing enemies by 30% for 1s. Restore 10% of Slowbro's Oblivious health (blue HP) per wave, when hitting at least one enemy (maximum 3 times).

Upgrade (Level 11): The second and third waves will now also throw enemies in the air for .75s, and the second wave will knock them back.

moves.name: Slack Off
moves.description: Lay down and take a rest, continuously regaining health. Damage taken will reduce the recovery effect.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Slowbro begins channeling a nap and gains a heal over time, healing 2% max HP every 0.5s for 3s. While Slowbro remains channeling its nap, all self-healing is doubled (including Slack Off healing). Slowbro can be manually or forcibly woken up from their nap.

moves.name: Amnesia
moves.description:
Nullify some damage before it takes effect. For a short time after using this move, become immune to hindrances and gain increased defense. Also increase the damage dealt by the next use of Scald or Surf.

Upgrade (Level 13): Increases Sp. Attack.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Slowbro briefly becomes unstoppable, gaining +250 Defense for 4s and restoring 17.5% of Slowbro's Oblivious health (blue HP) every second for 4s.

Upgrade (Level 13): Also increases Slowbro's Sp. Defense by 125.

moves.name: Telekinesis
moves.description:
Make opposing Pokémon float with psychic power. If used again, pull the opposing Pokémon toward the user.

Upgrade (Level 13): Increased range and firing speed.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Slowbro shoots a beam, causing the first enemy hit to float in the air for 2.3s, restoring 15% of Slowbro's Oblivious health (blue HP) every second for 5s. Slowbro can reactivate the ability to pull the enemy to themself, but otherwise cannot act for the duration.

Upgrade (Level 13): Increases the range and speed of the beam.

moves.name: Slowbeam
moves.description: Stare at an enemy and attack continually, dealing damage and rooting them. Grants a shield and makes the user immune to hindrances while using this move.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Stare at an enemy and attack continually, dealing damage every .5 seconds for 3s and applying 'Bound' to them. This ability counters Unstoppable. Grants a shield (10% max HP) and makes Slowbro unstoppable while using this move.

passiveAbility.name: Oblivious
passiveAbility.description: When Slowbro receives damage, the HP loss is gradual. When damaging an opponent with a move, restore some of the remaining gradual HP loss and decrease the target's Sp. Defense.
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced: Slowbro stores up lost HP for a short time (blue HP). Slowbro's Oblivious health remains for 6s and then decreases by 3% max HP every second. When dealing damage to an enemy with Water Gun, Scald, Surf, or Slowbeam - decrease their Sp. Def by 4% for 5s, stacking up to 5 times.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack. When this boosted attack hits, it deals damage to nearby enemies and decreases their movement speed for a short time.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, belly flopping forward to deal increased damage to opposing Pokémon and decrease their movement speed by 20% for 1s when it hits.

moves.name: Tackle
moves.description: Charge forward belly first, dealing damage when it hits and shoving the first enemy it comes in contact with. After this move, the user's next basic attack becomes a boosted attack.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: The user readies a boosted attack and dashes belly first forward, damaging opposing Pokémon and shoving the first opposing Pokémon hit for 1s. The boosted attack from this move remains readied until used.

moves.name: Heavy Slam
moves.description:
Has the user slam its heavy body down, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and throwing them.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increased damage.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user jumps up and slams down at the designated location, damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of effect and throwing them for 1s.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increases the damage of this move.

moves.name: Flail
moves.description:
Has the user flail about, increasing the user's basic attack damage the lower the user's HP is.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increased damage. If the user has low HP while using this move, its basic attacks that hit enemies will restore the user's HP.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user increases their movement speed by 80% for 3s (decaying by 10% every 0.5s over 2s; minimum 40% for 1s before this buff ends) and decreases the movement speed of nearby opposing Pokémon by 50% for 1.5s, and starts flailing about for 5s.

While flailing about, auto attacks deal increased damage, with damage strengthening for every 20% max HP the user is missing. Basic attacks used while flailing about also decrease the movement speed of opposing Pokémon hit by 20% for 1s; boosted attacks decrease movement speed by 50% for 1s.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increases the damage dealt by auto attacks used while flailing about.

moves.name: Rest
moves.description: Has the user fall asleep on the spot and restores its HP. Blocks the movement of all enemies while this move is in effect.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user becomes unstoppable and falls asleep on the spot for 3s, restoring 8% max HP every 1s over 3s (maximum 24% max HP). While using this move, opposing Pokémon cannot pass through Snorlax.

This move cannot be used within an opposing Miraidon's Electric Terrain.

moves.name: Block
moves.description:
Has the user spread its arms wide to create a wall and grants it a shield. Prevents enemies from passing through the wall and shoves them if they run into it.

Upgrade (Level 13): Reduces the damage the user receives while this move is in effect.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user gains a shield for 3.5s; becomes unstoppable, decreases their movement speed by 30% and creates a wall with their arms spread wide in the designated direction for up to 4s. Opposing Pokémon cannot pass through the wall from behind, and those that contact the wall from the front are shoved and stunned for 0.45s; targets cannot be shoved more than once every 1s (maximum 4 times).

17.4% max HP + 1560

The user can use this move again to drop the wall early, becoming vulnerable to hindrances and returning to normal movement speed. This move's cooldown begins when the wall ends.

Upgrade (Level 13): Increases the user's Defense and Sp. Def by 35% while holding up the wall. Shoves opposing Pokémon contacting the wall from the front not more than once every 0.5s (maximum 8 times).

moves.name: Yawn
moves.description:
Has the user let loose a huge yawn that lulls enemies into a sleepy haze, putting enemies hit by this move to sleep.

Upgrade (Level 13): Decrease the movement speed of enemies for a short time when this move hits.
