moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user lets out a huge yawn in the designated direction, putting opposing Pokémon in the area of effect to a deep sleep for up to 2.5s.

Targets that are hit after their deep sleep is halfway through wake up immediately.

Upgrade (Level 13): Decreases the movement speed of opposing Pokémon waking up from a full deep sleep by 35% for 3s.

moves.name: Power Nap
moves.description: Go to sleep and begin snoring, dealing damage over time to enemies in the area of effect and throw them. While sleeping, become immune to hindrances and continually restore HP.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user becomes unstoppable and slams onto their back fast asleep, damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of effect and throwing them for 1s; then continues to sleep for up to 4s afterward. The user starts snoring for the remainder of the Unite Move, restoring 10% max HP over time while fast asleep (up to 9 times; maximum 90%), damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of effect with a huge snore every 1.5s and decreasing their movement speed by 30% for 1s when hit. This Unite Move can be used again before the user snores a second time to flip over in the designated sideways direction and slam the ground, dealing an extra instance of snore damage in the area of effect and throwing opposing Pokémon hit for 1s. While the user is fast asleep, opposing Pokémon cannot pass through Snorlax.

Deals 50% of the initial damage, 3 times.

After the user flips over or snores a second time, the user can use this Unite Move again to stop sleeping early, becoming vulnerable to hindrances and returning to normal.

passiveAbility.name: Gluttony
passiveAbility.description: Increases the effects gained from eating Berries.
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced:
When facing nearby Berries or food, increases movement speed by 25%.

Doubles the HP restored from eating Sitrus Berries. Restores an additional 1% max HP + 0 x (Lv. - 1) + 23 HP from eating Oran Berries (from Greedent Cheek Pouch). Alcremie's Recover heals 10% more HP than usual.

moves.name: Attack
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
When the crystal gauge is full, readies a boosted attack for 5s as the crystal gauge decays to 0; increasing the crystal gauge refills it to full.

Boosted attacks shoot water forward, damaging opposing Pokémon every 0.25s over 1s (up to 4 times), dealing bonus damage to frozen opposing Pokémon with each hit.

moves.name: Water Pulse
moves.description: Has the user fire a pulse of water in the designated direction, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits and shoving them. Also marks the opposing Pokémon by leaving them drenched.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Fires a pulse of water in the designated direction, damaging opposing Pokémon and shoving them for 0.5s when it hits.

Marks targets as drenched for 3s when it hits.

moves.name: Whirlpool
moves.description: Has the user generate a vortex of water at the designated location, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon, puilling them toward its center, and leaving them drenched. If this move is used again, the vortex is moved in the designated dirction, flooding the area it passes through.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Generates a vortex of water at the designated area, damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of effect every 1s over 4s (up to 4 times), pulling them toward the center with each hit, and slowing enemies by 20% for 0.5s (refreshing on each hit). If used again within 4s, moves the vortex in the designated direction, flooding the area it passes through.

Marks targets as drenched for 3s when hit.

Upgrade (Level 11): Reduces this move's cooldown by 1s.

moves.name: Surf
moves.description: Has the user create a big wave in the designated direction, dealing damage to and shoving opposing Pokémon it hits and leaving them drenched. The area the wave passes through becomes flooded. If the wave hits a pillar of ice created by Icy Wind, the pillar breaks, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Prepares an area for a big wave to pass through, then creates the wave and sends it in the designated direction after 0.75s, damaging opposing Pokémon hit by the wave and shoving them. The prepared area becomes flooded after the wave passes through it.

Marks targets hit by the wave as drenched for 3s. Hitting a pillar of ice created by Icy Wind with the wave shatters it, damaging opposing Pokémon hit.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increases the damage of this move.

moves.name: Avalanche
moves.description: Has the user make snow continuously fall at the designated location, dealing damage and applying a slowing effect to the opposing Pokémon it hits.At the end of the move, the user drops a clump of snow, leaving flooded areas frozen. Also, if opposing Pokémon are drenched when hit, they are left frozen.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Creates snow to fall at the designated area for 1.5s, damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of effect (up to 3 times) and decreasing their movement speed by 30% for 2s when hit. After 1.5s, drops a clump of snow at the designated area, damaging opposing Pokémon again.

The clump of snow freezes drenched targets for 1s when it hits; freezes flooded areas it drops on after 1s.

moves.name: Ice Beam
moves.description: Has the user fire an icy-cold beam of energy in the designated direction, dealing damage and applying a slowing effect to opposing Pokémon it hits. If the opposing Pokémon are drenched when hit, they are left frozen. If this move hits a flooded area, that area becomes frozen. A maximum of 2 uses can be kept in reserve for this move.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Fires an icy-cold beam of energy in the designated direction, damaging opposing Pokémon and decreasing their movement speed by 20% for 2s when it hits.

This move freezes drenched targets for 1s when it hits; freezes flooded areas it hits after 1s. A maximum of 2 uses can be kept in reserve, with a 0.5s cooldown between uses.

Upgrade (Level 13): Strengthens the movement speed decrease to 30%.

moves.name: Icy Wind
moves.description: Has the user blow a gust of freezing air at the designated location, applying a slowing effect to opposing Pokémon it hits Once the freezing air builds up, it creates a pillar of ice, dealing damage and applying a slowing effect to opposing Pokémon it hits. After a short time, the pillar of ice breaks, dealing damage to nearby opposing Pokémon. If a pillar of ice is created in a flooded area, that area becomes frozen. A maximum of 2 uses can be kept in reserve for this move.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Builds up a gust of freezing air at the designated area for 0.5s, decreasing the movement speed of opposing Pokémon in the area of effect by 30% for 3s; then forms a pillar of ice, damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of effect and decreasing their movement speed by 30% for 3s once fully formed. The pillar of ice shatters after 4s, damaging opposing Pokémon again.

This move freezes drenched targets for 1s when the pillar of ice forms or when it shatters. Forming a pillar of ice on a flooded area freezes that area after 1s. A maximum of 2 uses can be kept in reserve, with a 0.5s cooldown between uses.

Upgrade (Level 13): Reduces this move's cooldown by 1s.

moves.name: Endless Ice Spikes
moves.description: This move can be used while the user is unable to act, and when it is, all status conditions on the user are removed. Has the user create ice spikes in the designated direction, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon they hit and leaving them frozen. After a short time, the spikes explode, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon they hit.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Cleanses the user of status condition; then creates ice spikes in the designated direction, damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of effect and freezing those hit for 2s. After 2s, the ice spikes explode, damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of effect again. This Unite Move does not directly interact with drench marks, nor does it freeze flooded areas.

Suicune can be stunned after cleansing themself and before creating the ice spikes, canceling the Unite Move and refunding 90% of the Unite Move gauge.

passiveAbility.name: Pressure
passiveAbility.description: Damaging a Pokémon from the opposing team below 10% max HP and frozen by Suicune deals an additional 15% max HP as true damage to the target (sufficient damage reduction can prevent the target from being knocked out). Using a move grants a shield for 5s (up to 2 times); separately increases the crystal gauge by 1 for 5s (becoming full when increased 2 times).
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced:
Damaging a Pokémon from the opposing team below 10% max HP and frozen by Suicune deals an additional 15% max HP as true damage to the target (sufficient damage reduction can prevent the target from being knocked out). Using a move grants a shield for 5s (up to 2 times); separately increases the crystal gauge by 1 for 5s (becoming full when increased 2 times).

Flooded areas created by Whirlpool or Surf remain for 5s; opposing Pokémon in a flooded area are marked as drenched for 3s. Freezing a flooded area with a regular move (not Unite Move) also freezes opposing Pokémon in that flooded area for 1s. Freezing an opposing Pokémon marked as drenched removes the mark; targets frozen by a regular move or by a frozen area cannot be marked as drenched for 3s afterward. Deals bonus damage when freezing opposing Pokémon with a regular move or by being in a frozen area.

moves.name: Attack - Eevee
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage.

moves.name: Swift
moves.description: Shoots star-shaped rays at enemies, dealing damage to them.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Shoots 4 star-shaped rays at enemies, dealing damage to them.

moves.name: Mystical Fire
moves.description: Upgrade (Level 10): Increases the number of flames by one.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Create four small flames while leaping in the designated direction. These flames shoot towards enemies one by one, dealing damage and decreasing their Sp. Attack by 15% for 1s, stacking up to 4 times. Each time a flame hits, reduce the cooldown of this move by 12% of the current cooldown. After the first flame hits, subsequent flames on the same target deal 28% damage. Wild Pokémon will only be prioritized if no enemy players are in range.

Upgrade (Level 10): Increases the number of flames by one.

moves.name: Hyper Voice
moves.description:
Unleashes an attack of multiple sound waves that deal damage when they hit. The damage dealt increases the farther the target is from Sylveon. Every time a sound wave hits, enemy Sp. Defense is reduced by 50 and the next sound wave's damage increases.

Upgrade (Level 10): Increases the number of sound waves by one.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Unleashes an attack of multiple sound waves that deal damage when they hit. The damage dealt increases the farther the target is from Sylveon. Every sound wave reduces enemy Sp. Defense by 20% for 1.5s (capping at 80%).

Upgrade (Level 10): Pokémon hit are slowed by 30%

moves.name: Baby-Doll Eyes
moves.description: Stare at an enemy with baby-doll eyes, dealing damage and decreasing their Attack and movement speed for a short time when this move hits.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Stare at an enemy with baby-doll eyes, dealing damage and decreasing their Attack by 15% for 1s and decreasing their movement speed by 60% for 1s for a short time when this move hits.

moves.name: Draining Kiss
moves.description:
Blow a kiss at an enemy that goes back and forth between Sylveon and the target multiple times. When the kiss touches Sylveon, restore  HP. When it hits the enemy, deal damage and decrease their movement speed for a short time. If Sylveon and the enemy move too far away from each other, the kiss will disappear faster than normal.

Upgrade (Level 12): Increases the amount of HP this move restores.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Blow a kiss at an enemy that goes back and forth between Sylveon and the target multiple times. When the kiss touches Sylveon, restore HP. When it hits the enemy, deal damage and decrease their movement speed by 50% for 1s on each kiss hit. This movement speed decrease decays by 15% after 0.5s If Sylveon and the enemy move too far away from each other, the kiss will disappear. The closer Sylveon and the target is, the faster the damage and healing occur.

Upgrade (Level 12): Increased healing.

moves.name: Calm Mind
moves.description:
Sylveon quietly focuses their mind and calms their spirit, increasing movement speed, Sp. Attack by 40% and Sp. Defense by 10% for a short time.

Upgrade (Level 12): One time only while using this move, if Sylveon is hit by an Enemy's move, the damage is completely nulliffied and Sylveon is granted a shield.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Sylveon quietly focuses their mind and calms their spirit, increasing movement speed by 30%, Sp. Attack by 40% and Sp. Defense by 10%. All buffs last for 3s.

Upgrade (Level 12): For up to 3s after using Calm Mind+ Sylveon can block one move (auto attacks will not be blocked), negating the first instance of damage and granting a shield for 3s. Hinderances and status effects will still be applied.

moves.name: Fairy Frolic
moves.description: Jump into the air and become briefly invincible. The moment Sylveon lands, deal damage to enemies in the area of effect and restore Sylveon's HP. For 10s afterward, 50% of damage dealt by Sylveon is converted into HP (basic attacks are excluded).
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Jump into the air, removing most statuses and becoming invincible. The moment Sylveon lands, lose invincibility and immediately gain Fairy Frolic buff, while dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and healing for 60% of the damage dealt. Fairy Frolic buff: for 10s, 50% of the damage dealt by Sylveon is converted into HP. No HP is recovered if the damage is dealt to shields.

Against Wild Pokémon: Damage is capped at 2000.

passiveAbility.name: Adaptability
passiveAbility.description: Every time Eevee deals or receives damage, increase Sp. Attack by 5% for 1.5s, stacking up to 4 times.
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced: Every time Eevee deals or receives damage, increase Sp. Attack by 5% for 1.5s, stacking up to 4 times.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack every third attack, creating a fiery whirlwind that deals damage to enemies in the area of effect. This boosted attack remains readied even after leaving combat for a prolonged period of time.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, creating a fiery whirlwind around the user and damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of effect. This boosted attack remains readied until used.

Basic and boosted attacks lunge at the target opposing Pokémon.

moves.name: Peck
moves.description: Fly toward an enemy and attack 3 times.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: The user dashes at the designated opposing Pokémon then pecks three times, damaging opposing Pokémon hit.

moves.name: Flame Charge
moves.description:
Fly in the designated direction while cloaked in flame, attacking enemies in the path. This also increases the movement speed for a short time.

Upgrade (Level 11): For a short time after this move hits, Talonflame's abilities and basic attacks partially ignore the enemies defense.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user dashes forward cloaked in flame, damaging opposing Pokémon in their path and increasing the user's movement speed by 30% for 2.5s if it hits.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increases the user's Defense penetration for 3s and reduces the movement speed of opposing Pokémon in the user's path by 30% for 5s if this move hits.

moves.name: Aerial Ace
moves.description:
Fly at the designated enemy, dealing damage. Also makes the next basic attack a boosted attack.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increased damage.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user readies a boosted attack and dashes through the designated opposing Pokémon with a swift attack, damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of effect around the user and restoring the user's HP when it hits.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increases the damage of this move.

moves.name: Acrobatics
moves.description: Fly toward the designated area and attack multiple times. Escape in a direction of your choice after using this move.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user dashes toward the designated location then attacks the area around them three times, damaging nearby opposing Pokémon.

The user can choose to dash in the direction of movement afterward.

moves.name: Fly
moves.description:
Fly up into the sky. Using this move again will cause you to dive to the designated area and attack, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect. Your next basic attack becomes a boosted attack. This move's cooldown is reduced by 40% if it hits an enemy.

Upgrade (Level 13): Also throws enemies when this move hits.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user readies a boosted attack and flies up into the sky for up to 3s, becoming untargetable and increasing their movement speed by 65%. When this move is used again, or after 3s, the user dives at the designated location, damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of effect.

If this move hits a Pokémon from the opposing team, the current cooldown of this move is reduced by 40%.

Upgrade (Level 13): Throws opposing Pokémon hit for 0.4s.

moves.name: Brave Bird
moves.description:
Dive to the designated location while cloaked in flame, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect. Also deals recoil damage to the user when it hits. Performing a boosted attack within a set amount of time after this move hits will reset the cooldown of Flame Charge or Aerial Ace.

Upgrade (Level 13): Deals less recoil damage when this move hits.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user becomes unstoppable and dives at the designated location, damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of effect when they land and receiving 5% remaining HP recoil damage if it hits.

Opposing Pokémon hit by this move are marked for 4s. If the user hits a marked target with a boosted attack, the cooldown of Flame Charge or Aerial Ace is reset and the mark on the first target hit is removed.

Upgrade (Level 13): Reduces damage received by 25% per opposing Pokémon hit for 5s (up to 3 times; maximum 75%).

moves.name: Flame Sweep
moves.description: Perform an aerial somersault before charging forawrd, dealing damage to enemies in this move's path and shoving them.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: The user performs an aerial somersault and sweeps forward, becoming unstoppable, receiving 50% reduced damage, damaging opposing Pokémon in their path and shoving them toward the end of the sweep, then damaging opposing Pokémon again. This Unite Move cannot go through walls.

passiveAbility.name: Gale Wings
passiveAbility.description: While at high HP, movement speed is increased.
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced: While at 85% max HP or above, this Pokémon's movement speed is increased by 15%.

moves.name: Attack
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Becomes a boosted attack after 12s, swinging the user's hammer in a circle around them, dealing increased damage and restoring 24% of the user's missing HP when it hits. This boosted attack remains readied until used. The time until the next boosted attack is readied is reduced faster when hit by opposing Pokémon's auto attacks.

The hammer's size and basic attack range increase upon evolving into Tinkatuff and into Tinkaton.

moves.name: Rock Smash
moves.description: Has the user swing down its hammer with rock-crushing force, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon in the area of effect and leaving them unable to act. The stronger the hammer, the larger this move's area of effect.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user swings down their hammer with rock-crushing force, damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of effect and stunning them for 0.15s when hit.

The stronger the hammer, the larger this move's area of effect.

moves.name: Gigaton Hammer
moves.description: Has the user charge power before swinging down its hammer, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon in the area of effect and throwing them. The longer power is charged, the more damage this move deals, and the longer opposing Pokémon are thrown. The stronger the hammer, the larger this move's area of effect.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user becomes unstoppable and decreases their movement speed by 50% as they charge power for up to 1.95s, becoming fully charged after 1s, before swinging down their hammer in the designated direction, damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of effect and throwing them when hit. This move deals more damage and the throw duration is strengthened the longer it is charged.

Throw duration: 1s

Throw duration: 1.5s

The stronger the hammer, the larger this move's area of effect.

Upgrade (Level 13): Reduces this move's cooldown by 1s.

moves.name: Smack Down
moves.description: Has the user charge power, then use its hammer to send a rock flying to the designated location, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon at the rock's point of impact and applying a slowing effect to them. The longer power is charged, the farther the rock can fly. The stronger the hammer, the farther the rock can fly.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user decreases their movement speed by 30% as they charge power for up to 2.4s, becoming fully charged after 0.8s, then uses their hammer to hit nearby enemies in front of the user and send a rock flying to the designated area, damaging opposing Pokémon at the rock's point of impact and decreasing the movement speed of those hit by 50% for 3s (decaying by 10% every 0.5s). The longer this move is charged, the farther the rock can fly. This move deals increased damage at maximum charge. If this move is canceled, it goes on a 2s cooldown.

The stronger the hammer, the larger this move's maximum range.

Upgrade (Level 13): Reduces this move's cooldown by 1s.

moves.name: Fairy Wind
moves.description: Has the user stir up a fairy wind in the designated direction dealing damage and applying a slowing effect to opposing Pokémon it hits.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: The user stirs up a fairy wind in the designated direction, damaging opposing Pokémon hit and decreasing their movement speed by 20% for 1s.

moves.name: Ice Hammer
moves.description: Has the user leap in the designated direction and swing down ites freezing hammer, dealing damage, applying a slowing effect to opposing Pokémon in the area of effect and decreasing their Attack and Sp. Atk for a short time.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user leaps in the designated direction and swings down their freezing hammer at the designated location, damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of effect, decreasing the movement speed of those hit for 2.5s by 70% decaying by 10% every 0.5s to a minimum of 40%, as well as their Attack by 30%, and their Sp. Atk by 15% for 2.5s.

Upgrade (Level 11): Strengthens the Attack decrease of opposing Pokémon hit to 50% and the Sp. Atk decrease to 30%.

moves.name: Thief
moves.description: Increases the user's movement speed for a short time. When the user is moving toward an opposing Pokémon affected by hindrances, its movement speed is further increased. Also, when the user deals damage to opposing Pokémon with its next Basic Attack, the user steals and uses a portion of the Pokémon's Defense and Sp. Def for a short time.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Increases the user's movement speed by 20% for 3s, strengthened to 40% for 5s when moving toward an opposing Pokémon affected by hindrances; and empowers the user's next basic attack for 5s, swinging their hammer in front of them and dealing boosted attack damage to opposing Pokémon hit. If this Thief empowered basic attack hits a Pokémon from the opposing team, the user gains a Thief buff for 5s, increasing their Defense and Sp. Def by 10% per target hit (up to 5 times; maximum 50%). While the user has the Thief buff, the movement speed increases remain in effect; the user readies boosted attacks after 2s, and the time until the next boosted attack is reduced significantly when hit by opposing Pokémon's auto attacks.

Pokémon from the opposing team hit with Thief empowered basic attacks have a separate Thief debuff applied to them for 5s, decreasing their Defense and Sp. Def by 10%. The duration of the Thief debuff on targets hit refreshes when hit by subsequent Thief empowered attacks, and the duration of the Thief buff on the user is refreshed when a Pokémon from the opposing team is hit with the empowered attack.

Upgrade (Level 11): Strengthens the Defense and Sp. Def decrease on targets hit by the empowered auto attack to 25%; strengthens the Defense and Sp. Def increases on the user to 25% per target hit (maximum 125%).

moves.name: Kiss Bliss Kaboom
moves.description: Has the user blow cute kisses at the designated Pokémon from the opposing team and others near it, leaving them unable to act for a short time. If the move is used again, the user slams its hammer down on the designated location, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user first blows cute kisses at the designated Pokémon from the opposing team and their nearby allies, damaging and stunning them for 0.7s when Kiss Bliss hits a target. The user can then use the Unite Move again, leaping up forward and slamming their hammer down at the designated location, damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of effect of Kaboom.

Unite Move buffs apply when Kiss Bliss hits a target.

passiveAbility.name: Mold Breaker
passiveAbility.description: When damaging an opposing Pokémon with an active shield effect, 30% of the damage dealt to the shield is dealt as additional damage to the target's HP.
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced:
When damaging an opposing Pokémon with an active shield effect, 30% of the damage dealt to the shield is dealt as additional damage to the target's HP.

This Pokémon's hammer strengthens every time they hit Pokémon from the opposing team with boosted attacks or moves, increasing this Pokémon's Attack by 0.5% per target hit (up to 60 times; maximum 30% Attack). After the hammer is strengthened 20, 40, and 60 times; Rock Smash, Gigaton Hammer, and Smack Down gain increased range.

moves.name: Attack
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage to enemies and heal for 5% max HP when this boosted attack hits.

moves.name: Will-o-Wisp
moves.description: Shoots sinister flames in the designated direction, dealing damage to any opposing Pokémon hit and leaving them burned for a short time.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Shoot 3 sinister flames in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies hit and leaving them burned for 3s. This burn reduces enemy Attack by 10% and Sp. Attack by 5% for 3s. The first wisp to hit a target deals full damage, and subsequent flame hits deal 50% damage.

moves.name: Wood Hammer
moves.description: Has the user pull back its arms and attack, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon in the area of effect, pulling them in front of the user, and leaving them unable to act for a short time. If this attack deals damage to at least one opposing Pokémon, a follow-up attack will be available for a short time. This follow-up attack has the user slam down a giant wooden hammer in front of itself, dealing damage to any Pokémon it hits and leaving them unable to act for a short time. The lower the user's HP, the longer the opposing Pokémon will be left unable to act. Every time this move is used, it consumes a set amount of the user's HP.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Trevenant pulls back its arms and attacks, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and pulls them in front of Trevenant, leaving them unable to act for 0.5s. If this attack deals damage to at least one enemy, a follow-up attack will be available for 5s. This follow-up attack slams down a giant wooden hammer in front of Trevenant, dealing damage to any enemy it hits, and leaving them unable to act. The lower Trevenant's HP, the longer the enemy will be left unable to act. Every time this move is used, it consumes 5% of Trevenant's current HP.

1.1s Stun

1.3s Stun

1.5s Stun

Upgrade (Level 11): If an enemy is hit by the second hammer, the damage they deal is reduced by 20% for 3s.

moves.name: Curse
moves.description: Has the user create a cursed zone in exchange for some of its HP, dealing damage over time to opposing Pokémon in the area of effect and decreasing their movement speed. The lower the user's HP is, the greater the decrease in movement speed. While using this move, the user builds up curse power every time it deals or receives damage. Releasing this built-up power will deal additional damage to opposing Pokémon in the area of effect. If the curse power is at maximum when it's released, the cooldowns of Branch Poke, Horn Leech, and Pain Split are reset.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Trevenant creates a cursed zone in exchange for 2% max HP per second for 6s, dealing damage over time to enemies in the area of effect every 0.5s for 6s and decreasing their movement speed for 1s, refreshing with each tick. The lower Trevenant's HP is, the greater the decrease in movement speed. While using this move, Trevenant builds up Curse gauge every time it deals or receives damage. Curse will deal additional damage to enemies in the area of effect when the Curse releases at the end of 6s or by manually detonating the Curse. If the Curse gauge is at maximum when it’s released, the cooldowns of Branch Poke, Horn Leech, and Pain Split are reset and opponents hit are unable to act for 0.6s.

12% Slow

17% Slow

22% Slow

Upgrade (Level 11): Increased radius.

moves.name: Branch Poke
moves.description: Has the user jab in the designated direction, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon and decreasing their movement speed for a short time when it hits. At the same time, the user's HP begins to gradually recover for a short time.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Trevenant jabs in the designated direction; dealing damage, decreasing their movement speed by 40% for 2s, and healing Trevenant for 9% max HP (over 3 ticks as 1 tick per second) when hitting an enemy.

9% max HP.

moves.name: Horn Leech
moves.description: Has the user charge forward, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon in its path and shoving them as it charges. Colliding with an opposing Pokémon while charging recovers the user's HP, and the lower the user's remaining HP, the more HP is recovered. At the end of the charge, the opposing Pokémon that were shoved are dealt additional damage and then thrown. After this move hits an opposing Pokémon, the mechanics of the user's next three basic attacks change. These changed basic attacks deal increased damage and reduce this move's cooldown when they hit.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Charge forward, becoming unstoppable, dealing damage to enemies and shoving them while dashing in the designated direction for the duration of the dash. At the end of the charge, enemies that were shoved are dealt additional damage and then thrown for 0.75s. Colliding with an enemy while charging recovers Trevenant's HP 3 times, and the lower Trevenant's remaining HP the more HP that is recovered. After this move hits an enemy, Trevenant's next three auto attacks deal more damage and reduce this move’s cooldown by 0.5s when they hit.

15% Max HP

18% Max HP

21% Max HP

Upgrade (Level 13): After using this move, Trevenant's movement speed is increased by 30% for 1.5s.

moves.name: Pain Split
moves.description: Creates a link between the user and a designated opposing Pokémon. While the link holds, the user redirects a portion of the damage it receives to the linked Pokémon. The lower the user's remaining HP, the greater the percentage of damage that is redirected. Additionally, if the user's percentage of remaining HP is lower than the linked Pokémon's, this move continuously recovers the user's HP and deals damage over time to the linked Pokémon. If the user and the linked opposing Pokémon are too far apart, the link will disappear. Using this move increases the user's movement speed for a short time.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Creates a link between Trevenant and a designated enemy for 6s. While the link holds, a percentage of damage that Trevenant would take is mitigated and instead redirected to the linked enemy as True damage. The lower Trevenant's remaining HP, the greater the percentage of damage that is redirected. If Trevenant's percentage of remaining HP is lower than the linked enemy, this move continuously deals damage and recovers Trevenant's HP every 0.5s. If Trevenant and the linked enemy are too far apart, the link will disappear. Using this move increases Trevenant's movement speed by 35% for 2s decaying by 7.5% per half second.

30% incoming

40% incoming

50% incoming

Trevenant heals for 134.4% of damage dealt on each tick.

Upgrade (Level 13): Duration increased to 8.5s.

moves.name: Phantom Forest
moves.description: Creates a cursed forest, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon in the area of effect, throwing them, and decreasing their movement speed for a short time. For a short time afterward, the basic attacks of all allied Pokémon deal increased damage to opposing Pokémon that were hit by this Unite Move. The user is also granted a shield when this Unite Move hits an opposing Pokémon, with the shield effect becoming stronger the more opposing Pokémon are hit. While the user is shielded, HP recovery effects applied to the user are strengthened.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Briefly becomes unstoppable and creates a cursed forest, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and marking them, throwing them, and decreasing their movement speed by 50% for 2s. Trevenant and allies deal increased basic (and boosted) attack damage to enemies that were marked by this move (0.5s cd for each attacker). The mark lasts for 6s. Trevenant is also granted a shield for 6s when this move hits an enemy with the shield being strengthened for each enemy hit, up to 5 times. While Trevenant is shielded by this shield, HP recovery effects applied to Trevenant are increased by 50%.

passiveAbility.name: Natural Cure
passiveAbility.description: When Trevenant deals or receives damage while at or below 35% max HP, a continuous HP recovery effect is triggered every 0.5s for 4s. This effect also reduces the cooldowns of Trevenant's moves by 1s every 1s. When this HP recovery effect ends, there is a 100s cooldown. However, this cooldown is reduced by 1s each time one of Trevenant's moves damage an enemy. This cooldown reduction cannot be triggered more than once every 0.5s.
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced: When Trevenant deals or receives damage while at or below 35% max HP, a continuous HP recovery effect is triggered every 0.5s for 4s. This effect also reduces the cooldowns of Trevenant's moves by 1s every 1s. When this HP recovery effect ends, there is a 100s cooldown. However, this cooldown is reduced by 1s each time one of Trevenant's moves damage an enemy. This cooldown reduction cannot be triggered more than once every 0.5s.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, lunging at an opposing Pokémon, damage nearby opposing Pokémon and lowering the Defense of those hit by 20% for 1s.

moves.name: Razor Leaf
moves.description: Pelts leaves in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies hit. The critical-hit rate of this move is higher than that of basic attacks.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: The user pelts sharp-edged leaves in the designated direction, damaging opposing Pokémon hit up to 3 times. The critical-hit rate of this move is increased by 15%.

moves.name: Triple Axel
moves.description:
Tsareena spin-kicks 3 times in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies. The damage dealt increases each time a kick hits, and basic attack speed is increased for a short time after this move ends by an amount based on the number of landed kicks. Queenly Majesty Effect: Restores HP each time a kick hits.

Upgrade (Level 10): Increased damage.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user dashes forward with 3 spinning kicks, hitting opposing Pokémon in the area of effect of each kick; increasing the user's auto attack speed for 5s per opposing Pokémon hit (up to 3 times), and increasing the damage of the user's auto attacks and Triple Axel by 8% per opposing Pokémon hit before dealing damage (up to 6 times).

4% + (1.5% x (Level -1))

Queenly Majesty Effect: Restores HP per opposing Pokémon hit with each kick.

Upgrade (Level 10): Increased damage.

moves.name: Stomp
moves.description:
Tsareena jumps up high and attacks enemies their feet. When this move hits, deal damage to enemies and leave them unable to act for a short time. Queenly Majesty effect: Restores HP when this move hits.

Upgrade (Level 10): Increased damage.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user jumps up high and stomps the ground, damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of effect when they land and stunning them for 0.2s.

Queenly Majesty Effect: Restores HP per opposing Pokémon hit.

Upgrade (Level 10): Increases the damage of this move.

moves.name: Rapid Spin
moves.description: Tsareena spins in the designated direction, dealing damage to any enemy hit. When this move hits, increase Tsareena's movement speed for a short time.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: The user dashes forward and spins, damaging opposing Pokémon in their path and increasing the user's movement speed by 30% for 1.5s when it hits.

moves.name: Trop Kick
moves.description:
Perform a flying kick in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies hit and decrease their Attack for a short time. Enemies that make contact with the flying kick's wake receive damage and have their movement speed decreased for a short time. Queenly Majesty effect: Grants Tsareena a shield when this move is used.

Upgrade (Level 12): Increased damage.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user dashes forward with a flying kick of tropical origins, damaging opposing Pokémon in the path of the kick and decreasing their Attack by 25% for 1s when it hits. At the same time, a muddy wake is left in the path of the kick, damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of the wake (up to 7 times) and decreasing their movement speed by 35% for 1s.

Queenly Majesty Effect: Grants the user a shield for 3s when this move is used.

Upgrade (Level 12): Increases the damage of this move.

moves.name: Grassy Glide
moves.description:
Tsareena slides in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies hit and decreases their movement speed for a short time. This is followed by an attack in the opposite direction, dealing damage and shoving enemies hit. Queenly Majesty effect: Grants Tsareena a shield when this move is used.

Upgrade (Level 12): Increased damage.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user dashes forward with a gliding kick, damaging opposing Pokémon hit. The user then immediately kicks back in the opposite direction, damaging and shoving opposing Pokémon hit backward.

Queenly Majesty Effect: Grants the user a shield for 3s when this move is used.

Upgrade (Level 12): Increases the damage of this move.

moves.name: Queen Ascendant
moves.description: Tsareena leaps toward an enemy from the opposing team and kicks it high into the air before showering it with a series of kicks while airborne, dealing damage to them. The moment Tsareena lands on the ground, recover HP. While airborne, the enemy that is being kicked and Tsareena are not affected by other moves.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Tsareena leaps toward an enemy player and kicks it high into the air before showering it with a series of kicks while airborne, dealing damage to them. The moment Tsareena lands on the ground, recover HP. While airborne, the enemy that is being kicked and Tsareena are not affected by other moves.

passiveAbility.name: Oblivious
passiveAbility.description: When a hindrance is inflicted on Bounsweet, Steenee; decrease the duration of the effect.
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced: Reduces the duration of hindrances inflicted on the user by an increased amount.

moves.name: Attack
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user shoots a small flame at the designated target. Becomes a boosted attack every third attack, breathing fire and dealing damage in an area.

Basic attacks increase rage by 1, boosted attacks increase rage by 2.

moves.name: Ember
moves.description: Has the user attack by shooting small flames at up to 2 opposing Pokémon. When the user is at peak rage, this move will target up to 3 opposing Pokémon and leave them burned when it hits.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user shoots a small flame at up to 2 opposing Pokémon in an area around the user. Increases rage by 2 per hit.

At peak rage, this move will target up to 3 opposing Pokémon and inflicts a burn for 2s, dealing damage once per second up to 3 times.

moves.name: Eruption
moves.description: Has the user launch flames skyward 3 times in an explosive fury. The flames then rain down on nearby opposing Pokémon, dealing damage. When the user is at peak rage, the number of flames increases by 1.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user launches 3 flames skyward, over the next 2 seconds these flames crash down on opposing Pokémon in the area. Subsequent hits on the same target deal 20% less damage for the second hit, and 40% less damage for the third hit and beyond. Increases rage by 2 per hit.

At peak rage, 4 flames are launched skyward.

Upgrade (Level 13): Increases the damage of this move.

moves.name: Tackle
moves.description: Has the user charge, slamming into the designated opposing Pokémn with its whole body, dealing damage and applying a slowing effect to them, and granting the user a shield effect. After this move is used, the user's basic attack becomes a boosted attack. When the user is at peak rage, opposing Pokémon it hits are left unable to act.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user charges in the designated direction, slamming into opposing Pokémon, slowing them by 30% for 1s, and granting the user a shield for 2s. Afterwards the user readies a boosted attack. Increases rage by 2 when it hits.

At peak rage, this move instead stuns opposing Pokémon for 0.5s.

moves.name: Flame Wheel
moves.description: Has the user cloak itself in fire and charge forward, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits and leaving them unable to act. The user is also granted a shield efffect, and the next basic attack becomes a boosted attack. If the user hits an opposing Pokémon, the user jumps and crashes down, dealing damage and applying a slowing effect to nearby opposing Pokémon. When the user is at peak rage, opposing Pokémon it hits upon landing are thrown.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user cloaks themselves in fire becoming Unstoppable, and charges in the designated direction dealing damage to opposing Pokémon hit, stunning them for 0.45s, and granting the user a shield for 3s. If an opposing Pokémon or wall was hit, the user jumps into the air and can move around, after a short delay the user crashes down dealing damage in an area, slowing opposing Pokémon by 50% for 1s. Afterwards the user readies a boosted attack. Increases rage by 2 for each hit.

At peak rage, this move instead throws opposing Pokémon for 0.5s when crashing down.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increases the strength of the shield.

moves.name: Explosive Heat Haze
moves.description: Has the user create a shockwave by rubbing its blazing fur together, dealing damage to nearby opposing Pokémon and shoving them. The surrounding area is then engulfed in searing flames, dealing damage over time to opposing Pokémon. The user also blends into the searing flames and bcomes hard to see, and opposing Pokémon outside the flames are unable to target it.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user momentarily becomes Unstoppable and creates a shockwave, dealing damage 4 times simultaneously, and shoving opposing Pokémon away to the edge of the move's range. Afterwards an area around the user is engulfed in flames for 4.5s, dealing damage every 0.5s up to 10 times. Increases rage by 14.

The user becomes camouflaged while the flames are raging, opposing Pokémon outside of the flames are unable to target the user.

passiveAbility.name: Blaze
passiveAbility.description: The user builds up rage when attacking with basic attacks or moves. Once 14 rage has been reached, the user gains 15% SpAtk for 8s, reduces move cooldowns by 65% of their current cooldown, and empowers move effects for 8s. Afterwards the ability goes on cooldown for 10s.
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced:
The user builds up rage when attacking with basic attacks or moves. Once 14 rage has been reached, the user gains 15% SpAtk for 8s, reduces move cooldowns by 65% of their current cooldown, and empowers move effects for 8s. Afterwards the ability goes on cooldown for 10s.

If no rage is gained for 5s, it will begin to deplete at a rate of 1 every 0.5s.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage when it hits.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage when it hits.

After evolving to Pupitar basic and boosted attacks (and basic attacks during Tyrannical Rampage) have an additional 5% lifesteal that is also active when doing true damage.

moves.name: Bite
moves.description: Deals damage to opposing Pokémon in front of the user. If the opposing Pokémon's HP is below a set percentage or falls below that percentage as a result of this move they become unable to move for a short time.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Deals damage to enemies in front of the user. If the enemy HP is below 50%—or falls below that percentage as a result of this move—they become immobilized for 0.6s.

moves.name: Dark Pulse
moves.description: Has the user exhale a mist of darkness in a horizontal sweeping motion, dealing damage to any opposing Pokémon it hit's. If the remaining HP of an opposing Pokémon hit by this move falls below a set percentage, that Pokémon becomes unable to move for a short time. If this move hit's an opposing Pokémon again within a set amount of time, it deals additional damage. If this move is used while the users piercing strength has been increased by Ancient Power, the user can ignore opposing Pokémon's Defense and shield effects for a longer duration.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Exhale a mist of darkness in a horizontal sweeping motion, dealing damage to any enemy hit. If the remaining HP of an enemy hit by this move falls below 50%, they become immobilized for 0.6s. If this move hits the same enemy again within 8s, it deals additional damage.

If this move deals damage while Tyranitar's piercing strength is activated by Ancient Power, the 8s duration of piercing damage is refreshed.

Upgrade (Level 11): Reduces this move's cooldown by 1s.

moves.name: Stone Edge
moves.description: Deals damage to opposing Pokémon in the area of effect, dealing more damage the closer the opposing Pokémon are to the user. This move can be used up to 3 time(s) within a set amount of time, with the area of effect widening each time it's used.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Deals damage to enemies in a 90 degree cone, dealing more damage the closer the enemies are to the user. This move can be used up to 3 times with the cone widening to 135 and 180 degrees.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increased damage.

moves.name: Rock Polish
moves.description: Has the user charge ahead in the designated direction, dealing damage to any opposing Pokémon it hit's. If this move hit's any opposing Pokémon, the users Attack is increased for a short time.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Charge ahead in the designated direction, dealing damage to any enemies hit. If this move hits any enemy, all damage is increased by 15% for 3s.

moves.name: Ancient Power
moves.description: Charges power before releasing a shock wave. The shock wave deals damage to nearby opposing Pokémon and leaves them unable to act for a short time. While charging power, the users movement speed increases, it gains a shield, and it becomes resistant to hindrances. If any opposing Pokémon are hit by the shock wave, the users piercing strength increases, allowing it to ignore opposing Pokémon's Defense and shield effects for a set time. If this move hit's an opposing Pokémon, the user can release a second shock wave in front of it'self, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon and decreasing their movement speed for a short time. If this second shock wave hit's successfully, the user is granted another shield. The strength of this shield is proportional to the number of opposing Pokémon hit by the second shock wave, reaching maximum shield strength if 3 Pokémon are hit.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Charge power before releasing a shock wave. The shock wave deals damage to nearby enemies and leaves them stunned for 1s. While charging power: Tyranitar becomes resistant to hindrances for 4s, movement speed is increased by 20% for 3s (stacking 3 times), and Tyranitar gains a shield (stacking 3 times and lasting up to 5s). If any enemies are hit by the shock wave, Tyranitar is granted piercing strength allowing damage dealt to ignore enemy Defense and shield effects for 8s.

If this move hits an enemy, a second shock wave can be released in front of Tyranitar; dealing damage to enemies and decreasing their movement speed by 30% for 2s. If this second shock wave hits successfully, Tyranitar is granted another shield. The strength of this shield increases for each enemy hit, capping at 3 stacks.

Upgrade (Level 13): Strengthens the effect of the shields granted by this move.

moves.name: Sand Tomb
moves.description: Has the user move in the designated direction in a single bound, dealing damage to any opposing Pokémon it hit's while leaping and leaving them unable to act for a short time. When the user lands, the shock from landing creates a cloud of dust at the point of impact that deals damage over time and decreases the movement speed of opposing Pokémon within the area of effect. If this move is used again while the user in the cloud of dust, opposing Pokémon in front of the user will be pulled closer to it. Furthermore, while the user is in the cloud of dust, it takes reduced damage and can ignore the Defense and shield effects of opposing Pokémon.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Leap in a designated direction; dealing damage to any enemies hit and leaving them unable to act for 1.5s. When Tyranitar lands, the shock from landing creates a cloud of dust at the point of impact for 6s; dealing damage-over-time every 0.5s and decreasing movement speed of enemies hit by 35% for 1s every second.

If this move is used again while Tyranitar is in the cloud of dust, enemies in front of Tyranitar will be pulled closer to it. Furthermore, while the user is in the cloud of dust, they take 15% reduced damage and can ignore the Defense and shield effects of enemies.

Upgrade (Level 13): Increases the length of time the cloud of dust remains at the point of impact to 8s.

moves.name: Tyrannical Rampage
moves.description: Has the user explode with anger and go on a rampage, increasing it's movement speed for a short time. If the user is affected by a hindrance, it will return to normal faster than usual. While the user is rampaging, it's basic attack pattern changes and the attacks deal increased damage. If the HP of an opposing Pokémon hit by these basic attacks is below a set percentage, it is immediately knocked out.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Briefly becomes unstoppable and explodes with anger, then goes on a rampage for 10s, gaining 50% tenacity for the duration. While rampaging, changes the auto attack pattern, dealing increased damage.

Damaging a Pokémon from the opposing team below 20% max HP with these auto attacks deals 40% max HP as true damage to the target (sufficient damage reduction effects can prevent the target from being knocked out).

passiveAbility.name: Guts
passiveAbility.description: When Larvitar receives damage equal to at least 10% of max HP, Attack is increased by 30% for 3s. This Ability goes on cooldown after it’s triggered (40s cd).

moves.name: Attack
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Becomes a boosted attack every third attack, lunging at a Pokémon  and dealing damage. This boosted attack also heals the user's HP. The lower the user's remaining HP, the more HP is restored.

moves.name: Swift
moves.description: Has the user shoot star-shaped rays, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon and applying a mark to them. The user's movement speed is increased when it is near marked opposing Pokémon. When the user deals damage to marked opposing Pokémon, its next basic attack becomes a boosted attack.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Shoot 1 large and 3 small star-shaped rays, dealing damage to Pokémon and applying a mark to them after the fourth star hits that lasts 4s. When near a marked Pokémon, Eevee receives a 15% movement speed increase. When Eevee deals damage to a marked Pokémon, its next basic attack becomes a boosted attack.

moves.name: Mean Look
moves.description: Has the user pin an opposing Pokémon with a dark, arresting look. For a short time, the opposing Pokémon becomes surrounded by a black zone, which it cannot leave. While the user is in the black zone, its basic attacks become boosted attacks, and it deals increased damage.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Pins an enemy Pokémon with a dark, arresting look, slowing them by 30% for 2s. After a 0.5s delay, the enemy is surrounded by a black zone they cannot leave for 3s. While inside the black zone, Umbreon’s basic attacks become boosted and deal increased damage. The black zone is removed if the target enemy is knocked out.

Mean Look is cleansable if the cleanse is used when the laser connects and before the area appears on the ground.

Upgrade (Level 10): Increases the duration of the black zone to 3.5s.

moves.name: Foul Play
moves.description: Has the user charge, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits and decreasing their movement speed. If the charge hits an opposing Pokémon, this move can be used again. If this move is used again, the user sweeps in front of itself with its tail, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits, decreasing their movement speed, and shoving them. The second stage of this move deals increased damage based on the Attack of the opposing Pokémon hit in the first stage. The higher their Attack, the higher the damage.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Charges in a direction, dealing damage to Pokémon hit and slowing them by 15% for 2.5s. If the charge hits a Pokémon, this move can be used again within 6s and it will note the highest Attack stat of all enemies hit. If this move is used again, Umbreon sweeps in front of itself with its tail, dealing damage to Pokémon hit, slowing them by 30% for 2.5s and shoving them for 0.6s. If the highest enemy Attack was greater than Umbreon's Attack when the first stage hit, the second stage deals damage using the noted Attack. Otherwise it uses Umbreon's current Attack.

237.6% Attack of Target

Upgrade (Level 10): Umbreon's next basic attack after using this move becomes a boosted attack.

moves.name: Fake Tears
moves.description: Has the user feign crying, dealing damage to nearby opposing Pokémon and decreasing their Defense and Sp. Def. Also grants the user a shield.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Feigns crying, dealing damage to nearby Pokémon  and decreases their Defense and Sp. Def by 20% for 2s. Also grants a shield for 4s.

12% Max HP

moves.name: Wish
moves.description: Has the user make a wish for an ally Pokémon. For a set amount of time, that ally Pokémon receives reduced damage, then afterward, the wish comes true and restores HP to that Pokémon. If the targeted ally Pokémon is knocked out before the wish comes true, a different ally Pokémon near it takes the wish instead.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Wishes for an ally Pokémon or Umbreon. For 2s, that Pokémon receives 15% reduced damage, then afterward, the wish comes true and heals them. If the targeted Pokémon is knocked out before the wish comes true, a different ally Pokémon near them takes the wish instead.

Upgrade (Level 12): Increases the damage reduction to 25% and amount of healing when the wish comes true.

moves.name: Snarl
moves.description: Has the user yell as if ranting about something, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon in the area around it and decreasing their Attack, Sp. Atk, and movement speed. Also grants the user a shield. The user continues to yell for a set amount of time, then it lets loose a final shout, leaving opposing Pokémon in the area around it unable to act and further decreasing their Attack and Sp. Atk. The Attack and Sp. Atk decreases can stack.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Becomes hindrance resistant and begin snarling for 1.5s, dealing damage to enemy Pokémon in the area around Umbreon and decreasing the affected Pokémon's Attack and Sp. Atk stat by 3% for 1.5s and movement speed by 15% for 2s. Also grants the user a shield for 2s. Umbreon is slowed by 30% while snarling. The final shout leaves enemy Pokémon stunned for 0.7s and further decreases their Attack and Sp. Atk by 15% for 3s. The small shout Attack and Sp. Atk decreases can stack up to 6 times and stack with the big shout's Attack and Sp. Atk decreases.

15% Max HP Shield

Upgrade (Level 12): Increases the stun duration of the final shout to 1s.

moves.name: Moonlight Prance
moves.description: Has the user continually recover HP when it is not in combat. Also has the user leap up and absorb the shields of opposing Pokémon in the area around it, taking them for itself. Then, the user lands, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon in the area of effect and leaving them unable to act. For a short time afterward, when an opposing Pokémon in the area of effect is granted a shield, the user absorbs a portion of it and takes it for itself.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Umbreon briefly becomes unstoppable, leaping up and absorbing 50% of the shields from enemy Pokémon in an area around Umbreon, taking them for the user. Umbreon then lands, dealing damage to Pokémon in an area-of-effect, and stuns them for 1s. For 5s, enemy Pokémon in the area around Umbreon are slowed by 30%, and if an enemy Pokémon in that area is granted a shield, Umbreon absorbs 50% of the shield for themself. Additionally, after learning this move and while not in combat, Umbreon continually recovers 1% Max HP every second.

Note: Umbreon cannot steal shields granted by Rayquaza or Assault Vest.

passiveAbility.name: Anticipation
passiveAbility.description: When Eevee would be shoved, thrown or left unabled to act, that effect is negated. This effect goes on a 40s cooldown after being triggered and is reset after respawning.

moves.name: Attack - Kubfu
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with increased range every third attack, lunging at an opposing Pokémon and dealing increased damage.

moves.name: Rock Smash
moves.description: Charges power before punching in the designated direction, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon. The longer power is charged, the more damage this move deals. The user receives reduced damage while charging.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: The user receives 20% reduced damage as they charge power for up to 2s, increasing power levels until reaching maximum charge after 1s; then punches in the designated direction when released, damaging opposing Pokémon hit. If this move is canceled or not released after 2s, it goes on a 0.9s cooldown.

moves.name: Wicked Blow
moves.description: Charges power before striking in the designated direction with a fierce blow. The user's next basic attack after hitting an opposing Pokémon with this move becomes a boosted attack. While the user is charging, its movement speed is decreased, but it receives reduced damage and becomes immune to hindrances. If the user charges power for a set amount of time or longer before striking, it deals damage to opposing Pokémon in an area of effect. The lower the opposing Pokémon's remaining HP is, the more damage is dealt. Opposing Pokémon in the center of the area of effect receive a critical hit and are shoved. If the user does not charge power for that set amount of time, it deals damage to opposing Pokémon in an area of effect, decreasing their movement speed, and this move's cooldown is reduced.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user becomes unstoppable, receives 20% reduced damage and decreases their movement speed by 30% as they charge power for up to 2.5s, becoming charged after 1s; then strikes in the designated direction with a fierce blow when released, readying a boosted attack if it hits. When uncharged, the cooldown of this move is reduced by 50%; and the user strikes in a small line area of effect, damaging opposing Pokémon and decreasing their movement speed when it hits.

Damage is always a critical and deals additional damage equal to 14% of the enemies missing HP. Against Wild Pokemon: This additional damage is capped at 1200.

Deals additional damage equal to 7% of the enemies' missing HP. Against Wild Pokemon: This additional damage is capped at 600.

When charged, the user strikes in a larger cone area of effect, dealing increased damage to opposing Pokémon and dealing additional missing HP damage to those hit. Opposing Pokémon in the center line area of effect receive a critical hit and are shoved. If this move is canceled or not released after 2.5s, it goes on a 2.1s cooldown.

Upgrade (Level 11): Strengthens damage reduction while charging this move to 40%. If this move is charged when released, opposing Pokémon in the center line area of effect are also stunned with the shove.

moves.name: Surging Strikes
moves.description: Has the user dash in the designated direction and strike with a flowing motion, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits. This move can be used an additional two times, and the third time it is used, any hits are always critical hits, and it throws opposing Pokémon. The user's next basic attack after using this move becomes a boosted attack, and if the boosted attack hits, it restores the user's HP.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user dashes forward and strikes with a flowing motion, damaging opposing Pokémon hit. This move can be used up to two more times within 4s of the previous use. Opposing Pokémon hit by the third use receive a critical hit and are thrown.

2% max HP

Each time this move is used, the user readies an enhanced boosted attack which restores the user's HP per hit.

Upgrade (Level 11): Receives 30% reduced damage while using this move.

moves.name: Headbutt
moves.description: Has the user charge in the designated direction, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits and leaving them unable to act for a short time.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: The user dashes forward with a headbutt, damaging opposing Pokémon and shoving them when it hits.

moves.name: Throat Chop
moves.description: Dash in the designated direction and strike with a flowing motion, dealing damage to enemies hit. This move can be used an additional two times and the third time it is used, any hits are always critical hits and the enemy is thrown. Urshifu's next basic attack after using this move becomes a boosted attack and if the boosted attack hits, Urshifu's HP is restored.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user readies a boosted attack and dashes forward, damaging opposing Pokémon in their path and stunning them for 0.7s when it hits.

Upgrade (Level 13): Reduces this move's cooldown by 40% of its remaining cooldown when Wicked Blow hits.

moves.name: Liquidation
moves.description:
Deal damage to and decrease the defense of enemies in the area around Urshifu by 30% for 2s. When this move hits, Urshifu is granted a shield whose strength is based on the number of enemies hit.

Upgrade (Level 13): Reduces this move's cooldown by 1s.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user stomps the ground, damaging nearby opposing Pokémon and decreasing their Defense by 30% for 3s; and granting the user a shield for 3s if it hits, strengthening per opposing Pokémon hit (up to 3 times).

Upgrade (Level 13): Reduces this move's cooldown by 1s.

moves.name: Ebon Fist
moves.description: Has the user dash at the designated opposing Pokémon. Then, if the user designates a direction, it deals damage to the opposing Pokémon and shoves it in that direction. The shoved Pokémon then also deals damage to and throws other opposing Pokémon it hits. But if the user does not designate a direction, it instead deals damage to the opposing Pokémon and throws it, leaving it unable to act when it lands. Using this move will reset Wicked Blow's cooldown.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user becomes unstoppable and the cooldown of Wicked Blow is reset when this Unite Move is used. The user dashes at the designated Pokémon from the opposing team, stunning them, then chooses whether to designate a direction to move or not. If no direction is chosen, the user pushes them slightly and delivers an uppercut, damaging the target, throwing them and stunning them when they land.

If the user chooses a direction, the user instead delivers a more powerful blow to the target, dealing increased damage and shoving them in the designated direction. The shoved target also deals reduced damage to opposing Pokémon they collide with and throws those hit.

moves.name: Flowing Fists
moves.description: Has the user deal damage to opposing Pokémon in the area of effect and shove them. The user's movement speed is increased for a short time, and all of the user's move cooldowns are reduced. If this move is used again, the user unleashes five consecutive blows upon the designated opposing Pokémon, dealing damage and shoving it. In the time between activating this move and activating the follow-up attack, every three times the user deals damage to opposing Pokémon, the number of consecutive blows the follow-up attack will deal is increased by one, up to 10 times maximum. While dealing the consecutive blows, the user receives reduced damage and becomes immune to hindrances. After the consecutive blows have finished, the user deals damage and shoves opposing Pokémon in an area of effect in front of itself.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user activates the Flowing Fists buff for up to 10s, and briefly becomes unstoppable and damages nearby opposing Pokémon, shoving them away. If this Unite Move is used again, the user becomes unstoppable and receives 30% reduced damage as they unleash a minimum of 5 consecutive blows upon the designated Pokémon from the opposing team, dealing damage to the target and shoving them with each hit. After the consecutive blows have finished, the user delivers a final kick, damaging opposing Pokémon in front of themself and shoving them when it hits.

When the Flowing Fists buff is active, until the follow-up attack is used, every 2 times the user hits a Pokémon from the opposing team, the number of consecutive blows for the follow-up attack increases by 1 (up to 10 hits for an additional 5 blows; maximum 10 consecutive blows).

passiveAbility.name: Inner Focus
passiveAbility.description: Reduces the duration of hindrances inflicted on Kubfu by 15%.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage.

moves.name: Swift
moves.description: Has the user shoot star-shaped rays in the designated direction, dealing damage and applying a slowing effect to opposing Pokémon.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Has the user shoots 6 star-shaped rays in the designated direction, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon hit and reducing their movement speed by 35% for 0.3s. The user is slowed by 30% while casting this move.

The slow duration is extended by 0.3s for each star that hits the same Pokémon.

moves.name: Hydro Pump
moves.description: Has the user continuously launch a huge volume of pressurized water in the designated direction, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits and pushing them. The move ends by unleashing a powerful blast of water, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits and shoving them.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Has the user continuously launch a huge volume of pressurized water in the designated direction, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon hit and shoves them for 0.1s. The move ends by unleashing a powerful blast of water, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon hit and shoves them for 1s. The user is slowed by 30% while casting this move.

This move slows opposing Pokémon hit by 50% for 0.3s, further extended with each hit.

Upgrade (Level 10): Reduces this move's cooldown by 1s.

moves.name: Muddy Water
moves.description: Has the user splash muddy water around itself, dealing damage, applying a slowing effect, and throwing opposing Pokémon.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Has the user splash muddy water around itself, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon, slowing them by 30% for 1s, and throwing them for 0.6s.

Upgrade (Level 10): Increases the duration of the slow by 1s.

moves.name: Tackle
moves.description: Has the user charge in the designated direction, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits and shoving them.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Has the user charge in the designated direction, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon hit and shoves them for 0.25s.

The distance this move travels is cut short when colliding into opposing Pokémon.

moves.name: Aqua Ring
moves.description: Has the user jump in the designated direction, creating a continuous wave centered on itself. Ally Pokémon who come in contact with the wave are enveloped by a veil of water that continually restores HP.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Vaporeon jumps in a designated direction, creating continuous waves centered around herself for 2.25s. Vaporeon and any ally Pokémon that come in contact with a wave gains a buff that lasts 1.5s, healing once every 0.5s. This buff on an ally can be refreshed every time they come in contact with a wave, healing up to a maximum of 7 times.

Upgrade (Level 12): Increases the amount of HP restored.

moves.name: Flip Turn
moves.description: Has the user cloak itself in water, reducing damage received and increasing movement speed. The user then charges in the designated dirrection, dealing damage and shoving opposing Pokémon before jumping back in the opposite direction.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Has the user cloak itself in water for up to 3s, reducing damage received by 15% and increasing movement speed by 40%, ramping up by 5% every 0.25s up to 60%. This move can be used again within 3s to charge in a designated direction, dealing damage and shoving opposing Pokémon for 0.6s before jumping back in the opposite direction and gaining a shield.

Vaporeon cannot auto attack or cast other moves whiile cloaked in water.

Upgrade (Level 12): Increases the damage reduction to 30%.

moves.name: Aquamarine Splash
moves.description: Has the user jump up high and dive underwater, creating a current that pulls in opposing Pokémon. Afterward, the user leaps out of the water, dealing damage to nearby opposing Pokémon and throwing them when it lands.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Has the user jump up high and dive underwater, creating a current that pulls in nearby opposing Pokémon for 0.3s. Afterward, the user leaps out of the water, dealing damage to nearby opposing Pokémon and throws them for 1s.

passiveAbility.name: Run Away
passiveAbility.description: Restores the Pokémon's HP and nullifies damage from Pokémon from the opposing team. This Ability goes on a 30s cooldown after it's triggered.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage. This boosted attack also pulls enemies inward between the vines.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, becoming a vine whip that strikes twice, pulls enemies between both vines, and stuns them for 0.4s, then applies a 20% slow for 1.5s.

moves.name: Seed Bomb
moves.description: Hurl a large seed at the designated area, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Venusaur hurls a large seed to the designated location, damaging all enemies in the radius.

moves.name: Sludge Bomb
moves.description:
Hurl unsanitary sludge to the designated area, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect, leaving them poisoned and decreasing their movement speed and Sp. Defense for a short time

Upgrade (Level 11): Increased area of effect.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Venusaur hurls toxic sludge to the designated location, damaging, slowing movement speed by 50% for 2s (stacking with the radius slow), and poisoning all enemies in the radius when it lands. The sludge lingers; damaging enemies every 0.5s for 5s in the radius, slowing them by 50%, and reducing their Sp. Defense by 50% for 2s (refreshes every tick).

Upgrade (Level 11): Increased radius.

moves.name: Giga Drain
moves.description:
Drain HP from enemies in the area of effect, dealing damage to them and restoring HP when this hits. Also reduces damage received for a short time.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increases amount of HP restored.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Venusaur emits a cone-shaped blast in the designated direction, damaging enemies and restoring health when it hits. Venusaur also takes 40% reduced damage for 2.5s.

This move's healing is not increased by Venusaur's passive.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increased healing.

moves.name: Razor Leaf
moves.description: Launch many sharp-edged leaves in a quick succession of attacks, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Venusaur launches a barrage of sharp-edged leaves in the designated direction, damaging enemies 10 times over 0.75s.

moves.name: Solar Beam
moves.description:
Blast a bundled beam of light, dealing damage to enemies in a line.

Upgrade (Level 13): Reduced cooldown.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Venusaur charges for 0.7s before firing a beam of light in the designated direction, damaging enemies five times over 0.3s.

2.5% Enemy Max HP

Against Wild Pokémon: Each tick is capped at 450 damage and the total damage is capped at 2250.

Upgrade (Level 13): Reduced cast time to 0.6s and base cooldown is reduced by 2s.

moves.name: Petal Dance
moves.description:
Scatter petals around the user, increasing movement speed for a short time and dealing damage over time to enemies in the area of effect.

Upgrade (Level 13): Increased area of effect.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Venusaur scatters petals around themself for 4.8s, increasing movement speed by 80% and damaging enemies every 0.3s in the radius (for a total of 16 damage ticks). This movement speed increase slowly decays during the duration of this move by 9% every 0.5s to a minimum of 17%. Petal Dance reduces the cooldown of Sludge Bomb or Giga Drain by 30% of the current remaining cooldown, per tick of damage that hit an enemy player (hitting multiple enemies reduces the cooldown more).

Upgrade (Level 13): Increased radius.

moves.name: Verdant Anger
moves.description: Launches a giant seed toward the designated area. The seed then splits apart, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and decreasing their movement speed for a short time.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Venusaur becomes unstoppable to hurl a massive seed to the designated location, damaging all enemies in the radius and slowing them by 35% for 1s. The seed then splits apart into 4 smaller seeds, each damaging all enemies in their radius.

passiveAbility.name: Overgrow
passiveAbility.description: When HP is low, increases all damage dealt.
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced: When HP is 30% or less; increase all damage dealt by 20%.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing damage to enemies and spinning them around when it hits.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing damage to enemies and stunning them for 0.5s when it hits.

moves.name: Pound
moves.description: Perform a combo attack in front, dealing damage to enemies and decreasing their movement speed for a short time when the attack hits.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Wigglytuff slaps the area in front of them twice (.3s apart), damaging enemies in a cone and slowing them by 40% for 0.5s.

moves.name: Double Slap
moves.description:
Perform a combo attack in front, dealing damage to enemies and decreasing their movement speed for a short time when the attack hits.

Upgrade (Level 10): Increased number of attacks.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Wigglytuff unleashes a barrage of slaps, damaging enemies in a cone 3-5 times and slowing them by 45% for 1.5s.

Upgrade (Level 10): Slaps 4-6 times instead.

moves.name: Dazzling Gleam
moves.description:
Emit a powerful flash in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect twice.

Upgrade (Level 10): Also decreases the movement speed of enemies for a short time when the first hit of this move deals damage to them.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Wigglytuff emits a flash of fairy energy, dealing a small amount of damage in a cone after 0.6s followed by a large amount of damage.

Upgrade (Level 10): Slows enemies hit by the first flash by 40% for 1s.

moves.name: Defense Curl
moves.description: Perform a quick roll, granting the user a shield and throwing any enemies hit by the roll. Hitting an obstacle while rolling will change the direction the user is moving and reset the cooldown of Pound, Double Slap, or Dazzling Gleam.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Wigglytuff gains a 25% max HP shield for 0.5s and rolls forward a short distance, throwing enemies hit in the air for 0.5s. Hitting an obstacle while rolling will change the direction Wigglytuff is moving and reset the cooldown of Pound, Double Slap, or Dazzling Gleam.

moves.name: Rollout
moves.description:
Perform a quick roll, granting the user a shield. Also deals damage to enemies hit by the roll and throws them. Hitting an obstacle while rolling will change the direction the user is moving and reset the cooldown of Pound, Double Slap, or Dazzling Gleam.

Upgrade (Level 12): Increases the length of time enemies are thrown.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Wigglytuff gains a 25% max HP shield for 2.5s and rolls forwards. Wigglytuff becomes unstoppable for the duration of the roll, damaging and throwing Pokémon hit in the air for 0.5s. Hitting an obstacle while rolling will change the direction Wigglytuff is moving up to 5 times and reset the cooldown of Pound, Double Slap, and Dazzling Gleam. Also, the shield refreshes duration each time an obstacle is hit.

Upgrade (Level 12): Increases the amount of time enemies are thrown in the air to 0.7s.

moves.name: Sing
moves.description:
Wigglytuff begins singing, slowing enemies around them by 15% for 2s per "Note" and increasing Wigglytuff's movement speed by 30% for 2.5s. Enemies that stay inside the song's effect will be put to sleep (when reaching 4 Notes) for 1.5s, and have their Defense and Special Defense reduced by 25% for 1.5s.

Upgrade (Level 12): Increases the amount of time enemies are asleep to 1.75s and the duration of Defense and Sp. Defense reduction to 1.75s.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Wigglytuff begins singing, slowing enemies around them by 15% for 2s per 'Note' and increasing Wigglytuff's movement speed by 30% for 2.5s. Enemies that stay inside the song's effect will be put to sleep (when reaching 4 Notes) for 1.5s, and have their Defense and Special Defense reduced by 25% for 1.5s.

Upgrade (Level 12): Increases the amount of time enemies are asleep to 1.75s and the duration of Defense and Sp. Defense reduction to 1.75s.

moves.name: Starlight Recital
