moves.description: Begin performing a recital, granting the user and nearby allies a shield as well as removing all status conditions from the affected allies and make them immune to hindrances for a short time.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Begin performing a recital and become unstoppable for 3s, granting Wigglytuff and nearby allies a shield for 3.5s as well as removing all status conditions from Wigglytuff and the affected allies and granting them immunity to hindrances for as long as the shield is active. When the shield expires, allies are healed for 50% of the remaining shield value.

passiveAbility.name: Cute Charm
passiveAbility.description: When hit by an enemies attack at close range, make that enemy infatuated for a short time. Infatuated enemies become enthralled and approach Wigglytuff against their will. The effects of this ability have a cooldown and cannot trigger on the same enemy in quick succession.
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced: When hit by an enemy attack at close range, make that enemy infatuated for a short time (10s CD). Infatuated enemies become enthralled and approach Wigglytuff against their will.

moves.name: Attack
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
When basic attacks are performed consecutively within 2s, additional effects are applied depending on the stage of the consecutive attack. If a Move is used, Intrepid Sword is activated, or Intrepid Sword expires, the time to perform the next consecutive attack is extended.

Applies 15% Slow for 1s

Heals 5% max hp

Dashes towards the target, reducing all Move cooldowns by 15% of their current cooldown.

Boosted attacks have an increased area of effect and deal additional damage proportional to the opposing Pokémon’s HP.

moves.name: Slash
moves.description: Has the user deal damage to an opposing Pokémon and deal a small amount of damage to nearby opposing Pokémon. When this move is boosted with Aeos energy, its area of effect is increased, it deals increased damage, and it also decreases opposing Pokémon's movement speed for a short time.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Slashes target Pokémon and deals a small amount of damage to nearby Pokémon. When this move is boosted with Aeos energy, its area of effect is increased, deals increased damage and also slows of Pokémon hit by 60% for 0.5s.

moves.name: Metal Claw
moves.description: as the user release a shock wave in the designated direction, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits and decreasing their movement speed. As the shock wave moves forward, it negates projectile attacks from opposing Pokémon it hits. After releasing the shock wave, the user also charges and deals damage to opposing Pokémon. If this charge hits an opposing Pokémon, the user's basic attack speed is increased for a short time. When this move is boosted with Aeos energy, the shock wave's size and travel distance are increased. Also, the movement speed of opposing Pokémon hit by the shock wave is further decreased.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Releases a shock wave in the designated direction, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon hit and decreasing their movement speed by 30% for 3s. As the shock wave moves forward, projectiles from non-allied Pokémon it hits are negated. After releasing the shock wave,  Zacian charges in that direction and deals damage to opposing Pokémon, stopping at the first opposing Pokémon hit. If the charge hits an enemy, Zacian's attack speed is increased by 80% for 4s or 6 attacks, whichever comes first. When this move is boosted with Aeos energy, the shock wave's size and travel distance are increased and the intensity of the slow is increased to 45% for 3s.

Upgrade (Level 11): Reduces this move's cooldown by 1s.

moves.name: Sacred Sword
moves.description: Has the user slash around itself as if drawing a circle with the tip of its sword, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon in the area of effect and decreasing their movement speed. The user then unleashes a slashing attack inside the circle, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits and leaving them unable to act. After this move hits an opposing Pokémon, the user's Attack is increased for a short time, and damage dealt by the user's moves and basic attacks partially ignores the opposing Pokémon's Defense. When this move is boosted with Aeos energy, its area of effect is increased, and the time until the slashing attack is unleashed is reduced.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Has the user slash around itself as if drawing a circle with the tip of its sword, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon in the area of effect and slowing them by 20% for 3s. During this slash, Zacian briefly becomes unstoppable and reduces damage taken by 30%. After 1.5s the user then unleashes a slashing attack inside the circle, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon it hits and leaving them unable to act for 0.35s. After a flurry attack hits an opposing Pokémon, the user’s Attack is increased by 20% for 3s, and damage dealt by the user’s moves and basic attacks ignores 10% of the opposing Pokémon’s Defense. When this move is boosted with Aeos energy, its area of effect is increased, and the time until the slashing attack is unleashed is reduced to 1s.

Upgrade (Level 11): Reduce the time until the flurry of slashes is unleashed to 1.2s for the base Sacred Sword+ and 0.45s for Boosted Sacred Sword+

moves.name: Quick Attack
moves.description: Has the user charge in the designated direction, stop in place when it hits an opposing Pokémon, and deal damage to it. When this move is boosted with Aeos energy, it also leaves opposing Pokémon unable to act for a short time.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Zacian charges in the designated direction, stopping at the first Pokémon it hits and dealing damage. When this move is boosted with Aeos energy, it also leaves opposing Pokémon unable to act for 1s.

moves.name: Agility
moves.description: Removes any hindrances applied to the user and greatly increases the user's movement speed. After a short time, the movement speed increase weakens and stays that way for a set amount of time. The effect duration is increased if the user is in combat with Pokémon from the opposing team. When this move is boosted with Aeos energy, the user's movement speed is further increased, and the user is also granted a shield.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Dashes in the designated direction and increases the user’s movement speed by 30% decaying every 1s by 10% down to a minimum of 7.5% for 3s. Dealing or taking any damage extends this duration by 1 second per attack up to 6 seconds and bypasses the movement speed decay. When this move is boosted with Aeos energy, the user is granted a shield.

Upgrade (Level 13): Further increases movement speed gain to 40% on use.

moves.name: Play Rough
moves.description: Has the user leap in the designated direction, dealing damage to an opposing Pokémon it hits and leaving them unable to act. The user lands near the opposing Pokémon it hit and deals damage to nearby opposing Pokémon. Damage taken by the user is reduced for a short time after landing. When this move is boosted with Aeos energy, the user leaps further and will no longer stop in place when hitting an opposing Pokémon, and all opposing Pokémon hit along the leap's path will receive damage and be left unable to act.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Leaps in the designated direction stopping at the first Pokémon hit and lands on the opposite side of them. The Pokémon hit is dealt damage and is stunned for 0.25s. Zacian deals damage to nearby Pokémon stunning them as well. If Play Rough connects, Zacian receives 25% reduced damage from the enemies hit for 3s after landing. When this move is boosted with Aeos energy, Zacian leaps further and through all Pokémon hit along the leap’s path. Pokémon hit will receive damage and be left stunned for the same amount as the base stun duration.

Upgrade (Level 13): Increases the stun duration to 0.75s.

moves.name: Sovereign Sword
moves.description: Has the user ready its giant sword, charge the sword with Aeos energy, and then slash in front of itself. The user becomes immune to hindrances while the Unite Move button is held down and the user is in its ready stance. The longer the user is in this stance, the more Aeos energy is charged into the sword, and the more damage this move deals. If a set amount of Aeos energy or more is charged into the sword, the Unite Move becomes boosted, and the slash's area of effect increases. This boosted Unite Move deals increased damage to opposing Pokémon it hits who have been buffed by their own Unite Move.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Has the user ready its giant sword, charge the sword with Aeos energy, and then unleashes an Unstoppable slash in front of itself. The user becomes Hindrance Resistant, applying a 10% self slow while the Unite Move button is held down and the user is in its ready stance. The longer the user is in this stance, the more Aeos energy is charged into the sword, and the more damage this move deals. If a set amount of Aeos energy or more is charged into the sword, the Unite Move becomes boosted, and the slash’s area of effect increases. This boosted Unite Move deals increased damage to opposing Pokémon it hits who have been buffed by their own Unite Move.

This move deals 15% decreased damage per additional target hit, capping at 30% less damage from hitting 3 targets.

passiveAbility.name: Intrepid Sword
passiveAbility.description: If the goal scoring button is held down, Zacian charges its sword  with Aeos energy. For a short time, its basic attacks become boosted attacks. In addition, during this time, Zacian can use a boosted version of one of its moves once (this use does not share the same cooldown as the base move). The longer the goal scoring button is held down, the more Aeos energy is charged into the sword, lengthening the duration of the boost effect on basic attacks and moves. This Ability goes on an 8s cooldown after it’s triggered.
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced:
If the goal scoring button is held down, Zacian charges its sword  with Aeos energy. For a short time, its basic attacks become boosted attacks. In addition, during this time, Zacian can use a boosted version of one of its moves once (this use does not share the same cooldown as the base move). The longer the goal scoring button is held down, the more Aeos energy is charged into the sword, lengthening the duration of the boost effect on basic attacks and moves. This Ability goes on an 8s cooldown after it’s triggered.

Minimum 5 energy is required to charge with a maximum of 10 (except for Unite Move). Duration for buff window is 3s for 5 energy, 6s for 8 energy, 10s for 10 energy. Charging occurs at a rate of 1 energy per 0.1s.

moves.name: Attack
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Gains a Boosted Attack every 8s, launching a powerful electric orb and dealing damage to opposing Pokémon. If any move hits Pokémon from the opposing team, the user's boosted attack cooldown is reduced by 1s.

moves.name: Thunder Shock
moves.description: Has the user attack with a jolt of electricity. If this move hits an opposing Pokémon, it also zaps a nearby opposing Pokémon, dealing damage to it.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Attack with a jolt of electricity. If this move hits an opposing Pokémon, it also zaps a nearby opposing Pokémon, dealing damage to them.

moves.name: Thunderbolt
moves.description: Has the user unleash a strong electric blast to the designated area, dealing damage and paralyzing opposing Pokémon. An electric field is left in the move's area of effect.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Unleash a strong electric blast to the designated area, dealing damage and paralyzing opposing Pokémon.

The movement speed of opposing Pokémon paralyzed by this Ability is decreased by 30% and their basic attack speed is decreased by 10% for 2.5s.

Upgrade (Level 11): Reduces this move's cooldown by 6% of the current cooldown for each Pokémon hit.

moves.name: Discharge
moves.description: Has the user let loose a flare of electricity from its feathers, dealing damage to nearby opposing Pokémon and leaving them paralyzed. If there is an electric field within this move's area of effect, the electric field is absorbed, increasing this move's area of effect and duration.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Has the user let loose 2 waves of electricity from their feathers, dealing damage to nearby opposing Pokémon and leaving them paralyzed. If there is an electric field within this move's area of effect, the electric field is absorbed, increasing this move's area of effect and releasing a third wave of electricity. The second and third waves deal a stacking 15% increased damage to Pokémon hit by the preceeding waves.

The movement speed of opposing Pokémon paralyzed by this Ability is decreased by 30% and their basic attack speed is decreased by 10% for 2.5s.

moves.name: Zap Cannon
moves.description: Has the user fire an electric cannon-like blast that explodes on contact, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon caught in the explosion's area of effect. When the electric orb passes through an electric field, it absorbs the electric field, increasing its size, travel distance, and damage dealt to opposing Pokémon. Opposing Pokémon caught in the explosion are also left unable to act.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Fire an electric cannon-like blast that explodes on contact, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon caught in the explosion's area of effect. When the electric orb passes through an electric field, it absorbs the field, increasing its size, travel distance, and damage dealt. Opposing Pokémon caught in the explosion are also left unable to act for 0.3s. A maximum of 2 uses can be kept in reserve for this move, and there is a 1s cooldown between uses.

Upgrade (Level 13): When the electric orb passes through an electric field, the orb's size increases, along with the duration opposing Pokémon are left unable to act.

moves.name: High-Voltage Siege
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Has the user continuously drop lightning bolts in the designated area every 1s. If the user moves a certain distance from the area,  it will be dragged towards the user's position. Electric fields are created where the lightning strikes. The lightning bolts paralyze and deal damage to opposing Pokémon they hit. If lightning bolts hit the same Pokémon 3 consecutive times, that Pokémon will be left unable to act. If lightning bolts hit one of the opposing team's goal zones 5 times, that goal zone will become defenseless (scoring is instant) for 5s or until a goal is scored.

The movement speed of opposing Pokémon paralyzed by this Ability is decreased by 30% and their basic attack speed is decreased by 10% for 2.5s.

passiveAbility.name: Static
passiveAbility.description: When the user receives damage from nearby Pokémon from the opposing team, the damaging Pokémon becomes paralyzed. This Ability goes on a 15s cooldown when triggered. When the user hits with a boosted attack, Thunder Shock, or Thunderbolt, they create an electric field. This field will remain for 3s, dealing damage and slowing opposing Pokémon in it by 30%.
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced:
When the user receives damage from nearby Pokémon from the opposing team, the damaging Pokémon becomes paralyzed. This Ability goes on a 15s cooldown when triggered. When the user hits with a boosted attack, Thunder Shock, or Thunderbolt, they create an electric field. This field will remain for 3s, dealing damage and slowing opposing Pokémon in it by 30%.

The movement speed of opposing Pokémon paralyzed by this Ability is decreased by 30% and their basic attack speed is decreased by 10% for 2.5s.

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage and paralyzing the enemy while restoring some of Zeraora's HP.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage and paralyzing opposing Pokémon hit, and restoring 10% missing HP per target hit.

The movement speed of paralyzed targets is decreased by 15% for 2.5s and their auto attack speed is decreased by 25% for 1s.

moves.name: Agility
moves.description: Perform a quick dash and increase basic attack speed for a short time afterward.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Quickly dashes forward, and increases auto attack speed by 45% for 3s.

moves.name: Volt Switch
moves.description:
Perform a high-speed dash, dealing damage to enemies hit and increase basic attack speed for a short time. Using this move again within a set period of time will allow the user to immediately dash back to the original position.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increased damage and basic attack speed buff duration.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Dashes forward at high speed, damaging opposing Pokémon in their path; and increasing auto attack speed by 45% for 3s. Also marks the starting location of this dash for 3s.

This move can be used again within 3s to dash back to the starting location, dealing increased damage to opposing Pokémon in their path; and refreshing the auto attack speed buff duration.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increases the damage of both dashes. Strengthens the auto attack speed increase to 60% for 3s.

moves.name: Spark
moves.description:
Leap at an enemy dealing damage to them. If using your basic attack before reaching the targeted enemy, instead leap at the closest enemy and deal damage to it. This move can be used 3 times before going on cooldown.

Upgrade (Level 11): Also restore HP if performing a basic attack before reaching the targeted enemy.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Becomes unstoppable for 0.2s and dashes forward with an electrically charged leap, damaging opposing Pokémon in their path. If an auto attack is used before the leap ends; leaps to an opposing Pokémon, dealing increased damage to the target.

If an auto attack is used before the leap ends, deal 110% Atk as damage instead.

This move can be used again within 4s of the last use, repeating the effects of the first use (up to 3 total uses).

Upgrade (Level 11): Restores 15% missing HP if leaping to an opposing Pokémon with an auto attack before reaching them with the dash.

moves.name: Slash
moves.description: Pounce at an enemy and attack with sharp claws. This move's final attack throws enemies.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Pounces toward the designated opposing Pokémon's location and attacks with 3 sharp claw swipes, damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of effect and throwing those hit by the last swipe for 0.5s.

moves.name: Discharge
moves.description:
Release an electrical discharge, dealing damage to nearby enemies and grant the user a shield when it hits. If this move hits enemies that are paralyzed, it pulls them in toward the user once the move ends, dealing damage to them once again and leaving them unable to act.

Upgrade (Level 13): Decreases movement speed of enemies for a short time when this move hits.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Discharges electricity around themself for 1.5s, damaging opposing Pokémon in the area of effect every 0.3s (up to 6 times), followed by a final discharge after 0.4s; granting a shield for 3s when this move hits.

Pulls opposing Pokémon paralyzed by the user hit by the final discharge in toward Zeraora's position over 1s, stunning them for 1s during the pull; and dealing extra damage to them.

Upgrade (Level 13): Decreases the movement speed of opposing Pokémon by 25% for 1s when hit.

moves.name: Wild Charge
moves.description:
Charge in the designated direction. If this move hits an enemy, unleash a combo attack that also deals a set amount of damage to itself. If the user hit an enemy with Volt Switch, Spark, or a boosted attack before using this move, the number of attacks in the combo is increased.

Upgrade (Level 13): Also deals damage to nearby enemies when this hits.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Dashes forward. If this move hits an opposing Pokémon; latches onto the target, and becomes untargetable to unleash a combo of at least 3 attacks, damaging the target with each attack (switching to the closest opposing Pokémon if the target is out of range or unable to be attacked for the next attack). Receives 1% remaining HP recoil damage per attack; the initial hit deals 2 instances of recoil damage. Opposing Pokémon hit by one of these attacks receive 50% reduced damage from subsequent attacks from Wild Charge for 5s.

Deals half damage.

Hitting an opposing Pokémon with boosted attacks, Volt Switch, or Spark applies 1 stack of a Wild Charge buff for 5s (up to 3 stacks); each stack of the buff adds 1 additional attack to the next use of Wild Charge (for up to 6 total hits). Zeraora is untargetable while attacking; for 1.2s at 0 stacks, 1.5s at 1 stack, 1.8s at 2 stacks and 2s at 3 stacks from this buff.

Upgrade (Level 13): Deals 50% reduced damage to other nearby opposing Pokémon with each attack.

moves.name: Plasma Gale
moves.description: Unleash a blast of lightning, dealing damage to enemies in the area of effect and throw them. This also creates a zone of plasma that increases the user's basic attack range and damage dealt while inside this zone.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Becomes unstoppable for 0.5s and launches a bolt of lightning toward the designated target; damaging opposing Pokémon in its path toward the target and throwing them for 0.5s. Once the bolt reaches the target; damages opposing Pokémon in an area of effect and throws them once again.

Creates a circular zone of plasma centered on the target's location for 5s when it hits; paralyzing opposing Pokémon inside it for 3s. While in the zone, also increases the user's auto attack range, and auto attack damage by 20%.

passiveAbility.name: Volt Absorb
passiveAbility.description: Gain an electric charge when receiving damage, converting a portion of that damage into additional Attack.
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced: Gains 8% of damage received as bonus Attack for 4s (maximum 200 bonus Attack from 2,500 damage received).

builds.name: Discharge Switch
builds.emblemName: Charging Charm (Less Critical Rate, Slight higher bulk)

moves.name: Attack
moves.description: Becomes a boosted attack with every third attack, dealing increased damage.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Becomes a boosted with every third attack, dealing increased damage.

moves.name: Slash
moves.description: Dashes in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies hit.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Dashes forward, damaging opposing Pokémon hit.

moves.name: Shadow Claw
moves.description:
Dash in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies hit and leaving them unable to act for a short time. If this move hits an enemy near the end point of the dash, they will be thrown instead of being left unable to act.

Upgrade (Level 13): Increases the length of time enemies are thrown.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Dashes forward, damaging opposing Pokémon in the path and stunning them for 0.05s when it hits; if hit at the endpoint of the dash, throw them for 0.4s instead.

Upgrade (Level 13): Strengthens the duration of the throw at the endpoint to 0.5s.

moves.name: Cut
moves.description:
Dashes in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies, and restoring the Zoroark's HP.

Upgrade (Level 13): Increases the amount of HP this move restores.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Dashes forward, damaging opposing Pokémon; restoring HP when it hits.

Upgrade (Level 13): Strengthened amount of HP restored.

moves.name: Fury Swipes
moves.description: Dashes in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies. If this move hits an enemy, for a short time afterwards, this move can be activated again.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Dashes forward, damaging opposing Pokémon hit. If this move hits, this move can be used again within 4s.

moves.name: Night Slash
moves.description:
For a short time, change the user’s normal movement to dash attacks. After performing a dash attack, the user’s next auto attack changes to a special auto attack. During this move’s effect duration, whenever Zoroark hits an enemy with other moves or special auto attacks, this move’s effect duration increases and the user is able to use Night Slash again. This move’s effect duration ends if the user moves when it’s unable to use Night Slash. During this move’s effect duration, if Zoroark hits enemies with a total of six moves and/or special auto attacks, Zoroark will jump into the air and then while landing, slash a set area-of-effect, dealing damage to enemies. Zoroark recovers HP if they hit enemies with this slashing attack. While jumping, the user is able to use Shadow Claw or Cut to move a set distance.

Upgrade (Level 11): Reduces this move's cooldown by 1s.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Gains the Night Slash buff for 2.5s, changing the next movement to a dash attack, damaging opposing Pokémon in the path. If the dash attack hits: changes the next auto attack to a unique boosted attack with increased range. If Zoroark hits opposing Pokémon with Slash, Shadow Claw, Cut, or unique boosted attacks: resets the Night Slash buff duration to 2.5s, repeating this chain of attacks. This move ends if the user moves when they're unable to use the Night Slash dash attack.

Deals an additional 10% missing HP damage. Against wild Pokémon: total damage is capped at 1000.

If Zoroark hits opposing Pokémon with a total of 6 valid attacks: cleanses status conditions and becomes invincible for 1.4s,  jumping into the air then landing after 1.2s. When the user lands: slashes a cross-shaped area of effect, damaging opposing Pokémon with two diagonal slashes, and dealing additional missing HP damage when it hits; restores HP once for each of the two diagonal areas of the cross slash that hits an opposing Pokémon (up to 2 times if both slashes hit).  This cross-shaped attack deals move damage if triggered by a final move hit, or auto attack damage if triggered by a final unique boosted attack. While jumping, the user is able to use Slash, Shadow Claw, or Cut to move a set distance.

Upgrade (Level 11): Reduces this move's cooldown by 1s.

moves.name: Feint Attack
moves.description:
Dashes in the designated direction, dealing damage to enemies and reducing all of the user’s move cooldowns. If this move hits an enemy, for a short time, the location where the dash started is marked, and the user is able to use this move again; returning to the marked location and dealing damage to enemies. A new mark is left where the dash started. As long as there is a mark, if the user uses another move, the mark will move to where the move was used. If the user hits enemies four times with either Feint Attack or other moves without interrupting the chain of marking, the next use of Feint Attack changes. If this changed form of Feint Attack is used, Zoroark leaps at the designated enemy and deals damage to them before landing in the designated direction.

Upgrade (Level 11): Reduces this move's cooldown by 1s.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
Dashes forward, damaging opposing Pokémon in the path and resetting move cooldowns when it hits. If this move hits, the location where the dash started is marked for 3s, and this move can be used again to return to the marked location with the same effects as the first dash. As long as there is a mark, using Slash, Shadow Claw, or Cut moves the mark to where that move started.

Deals an additional 15% missing HP damage. Against wild Pokémon: total damage is capped at 1200.

If Zoroark hits opposing Pokémon 4 times with either Feint Attack or other normal moves without interrupting the chain of marking: changes the next use of Feint Attack for 3s. When used again: becomes unstoppable for 0.5s and leaps at the designated opposing Pokémon; then bounces in the designated direction forward off the target to perform a slashing attack, damaging the target and opposing Pokémon in the path, dealing additional missing HP damage to those hit.

Upgrade (Level 11): Reduces this move's cooldown by 1s.

moves.name: Nightfall Daze
moves.description: Release dark shockwaves, dealing damage to enemies hit. Three shockwaves are released, and each one has an increasingly larger area-of-effect. Zoroark is immune to hindrances while releasing shockwaves.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: Becomes unstoppable for 1.33s, and releases dark shockwaves with increasing areas of effect around themself 3 times over the first 1s, damaging opposing Pokémon hit with each shockwave.

passiveAbility.name: Illusion
passiveAbility.description: The user takes the form of a random wild Pokémon or Pokémon from the opposing team. The user returns to their original form when taking damage or using an auto attack or move (15s cd).
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced:
When this Ability is used: cleanses status conditions and becomes unstoppable for 0.33s (15s CD); and takes the form of the nearest opposing Pokémon for up to 15s, prioritizing Pokémon from the opposing team. Returns to their original form earlier when damaged, using an auto attack or move, attempting to score, or returning to base.

The target of the illusion does not need to be in vision to take their form.

moves.name: Attack
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user kicks at opposing Pokémon dealing damage. Becomes a boosted attack every third attack, with the user stepping in for a kick with increased damage.

Spinning Edge deals damage 3 times in an area around the user over time, before rapidly dealing damage 3 more times. If Low Sweep was used preceding Spinning Edge, then it will do increased damage. If Liquidation was used preceding Spinning Edge, then it will grant a shield on use. If Carnival Splash was used preceding Spinning Edge, it will gain both effects.

moves.name: Pound
moves.description: Has the user deal damage and decrease opposing Pokémon's movement speed.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: The user pounds the area, dealing damage and slowing opposing Pokémon by 30% for 2s.

moves.name: Low Sweep
moves.description:
Has the user unleash three swift kicks in the designated direction, dealing damage and decreasing opposing Pokémon's movement speed.

When this move causes vibes to reach max, Spinning Edge deals increased damage.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increases the damage dealt by this move and further increases the damage dealt by Spinning Edge when boosted.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user unleashes three swift kicks in the designated direction, dealing damage and slowing opposing Pokémon by 60% for 1s, decaying by 15% every 0.25s. The third kick can be aimed, launching the user in that direction before unleashing the kick.

Upgrade (Level 11): Increases the damage of this move, and Spinning Edge when this move precedes it.

moves.name: Wing Attack
moves.description:
Has the user lunge in the designated direction, dealing damage to opposing Pokémon in the area of effect.

When this move deals damage to opposing Pokémon, the user receives a shield effect.
moves.descriptionAdvanced: The user lunges in the designated direction dealing damage, and gaining a shield for 3s on hit.

moves.name: Liquidation
moves.description:
Has the user charge in the designated direction, dealing damage and decreasing the Defense of opposing Pokémon it hits, and restoring the user's HP.

A maximum of 2 uses can be kept in reserve for this move.

When this move causes vibes to reach max, Spinning Edge grants the user a shield effect.

Upgrade (Level 13): Increases the amount of HP restored by this move and strengthens the shield effect granted by Spinning Edge when boosted.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user charges in the designated direction, dealing damage, lowering the defense of opposing Pokémon by 30% for 3s, and restoring the user's HP.

8% of Max HP

Two uses can be kept in reserve, with a 0.5s cooldown between uses.

Upgrade (Level 13): Increases the amount of health this move restores, and increases Spinning Edge's shield when this move precedes it.

moves.name: Carnival Splash
moves.description:
Has the user dance in place, pulling in opposing Pokémon, dealing damage, and leaving them unable to act.

This move grants the user a shield effect. With each opposing Pokémon this move hits, vibes and this shield effect will increase.

When this move causes vibes to reach max, Spinning Edge deals increased damage and grants the user a shield effect.
moves.descriptionAdvanced:
The user becomes Unstoppable while dancing in place, gaining a shield and dealing damage to opposing Pokémon up to 3 times. The third hit will pull in opposing Pokémon towards the user, stunning them for 1s. Each opposing Pokémon pulled in grants the user a shield, up to 3 times.

The third hit of this move will not affect wild Pokémon.

passiveAbility.name: Moxie
passiveAbility.description:
When the user's basic attacks and moves hit opposing Pokémon, vibes increase, which increases Attack.

Vibes can increase to a maximum of 3, and they lower over time.

When vibes reach max, the next basic attack becomes Spinning Edge. Each time Spinning Edge hits opposing Pokémon, the user's movement speed increases.
passiveAbility.descriptionAdvanced:
When the user deals damage with auto attacks or moves, vibes increase, which increase Attack by 5% per stack up to 3. If no vibes are gained within 3s, they are lost, along with the user's boosted gauge.

After evolving into Quaquaval, the next auto attack when vibes are maxed becomes Spinning Edge. Each time Spinning Edge hits opposing Pokémon, the user's movement speed is increased by 15% for 3s, stacking up to 3 times.

heldItems.description: Upon making an assist, or knocking out a Pokémon from the opposing team: increases Attack by 0.3/0.45/0.6% until the end of battle (up to 20 stacks; maximum 6/9/12%). Assists add 1 stack; KOs add 2 stacks.
Upon scoring a goal: increases max HP by 100/150/200 until the end of battle (up to 6 times; maximum 600/900/1200 bonus max HP).
Gain 60/80/100% more Aeos Energy for defeating wild Pokémon (16s cd). Goal-scoring speed is passively increased by 10%.

When not receiving special damage for 15s: grants a 10/15/20% max HP shield effect that nullifies Sp. Attack-based damage until it is destroyed. This shield can be refreshed even if its not fully depleted.
Upon scoring a goal: increases Attack by 6/9/12 until the end of battle (up to 6 times; maximum 36/54/72 bonus Attack).
Improves HP recovery by 10/15/20% from self healing.

When using their Unite Move: grants the holder and 1 nearby ally with the lowest current HP a shield equal to 15/20/25% of the holder's max HP for 5s (30s CD). Additional Buddy Barrier shields do not stack, but instead refresh the duration of the remaining shield effect.

Charges energy through movement (+1 per distance unit traveled) and auto attacks (+9 per auto attack damage instance dealt), up to 100 energy. When energy is full: damaging an opposing Pokémon deals 20/30/40 + 50/60/70% Attack as additional damage to the first target hit, consuming the charged energy.
One of the variety of mysterious Mega Stones. Have Mega Charizard X hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle.
One of the variety of mysterious Mega Stones. Have Mega Charizard Y hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle.

Dealing auto attack damage to a Pokémon from the opposing team adds 1 stack of a hidden buff for 2s, up to 3 stacks. Taking non movement, non auto attack actions will reset the stack count to 0. After the 3rd stack: increases movement speed by 30/35/40% for 3s (8s CD).
When damaging an opposing Pokémon with a move: deals 40/50/60 + 30/35/40% Sp. Attack as additional damage to the first target hit (8s CD).
Attack-based damage dealt to opposing Pokémon weakens their HP recovery effect by 20/25/30% for 1.5 seconds.
Sp. Attack-based damage dealt to opposing Pokémon weakens their HP recovery effect by 20/25/30% for 1.5 seconds.
Attack-based auto attacks restore HP equal to 9%/12%/15% of damage dealt directly to an opposing Pokémon's HP.

Upon making an assist, or knocking out a Pokémon from the opposing team: increases Sp. Attack by 0.3/0.45/0.6% until the end of battle (up to 20 stacks; maximum 6/9/12%). Assists add 1 stack; KOs add 2 stacks.
When using their Unite Move: increases damage dealt by 7/14/21% for 4s (15s CD). Note: certain Unite Moves have unique interactions with this held item.
While having the fewest Exp. Points on the team: gains an additional 3/4/5 Exp. Points every 1s.
When not in combat for 5s: increases movement speed by 10/15/20%.
When below 25% HP: recovers 6/9/12% missing HP 3 times over 3s, once every 1s (100/90/80s CD).
One of the variety of mysterious Mega Stones. Have Gyarados hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle.
When not in combat for 5s: recovers 2/3/4% max HP every 1s.
One of the variety of mysterious Mega Stones. Have Lucario hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle.
One of a variety of mysterious Mega Stones. Have Mewtwo hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle.
One of a variety of mysterious Mega Stones. Have Mewtwo hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle.
Auto attacks deal 1/2/3% of opposing Pokémon's remaining HP as additional Attack-based damage (against Pokémon from the opposing team: additional damage is capped at 120/240/360).
Dealing auto attack damage to an opposing Pokémon adds 1 stack of a hidden buff for 3s, up to 3 stacks. After the 3rd stack: increases auto attack speed by 15/20/25% for 5s (10s CD).

For 3s after using a move: the next auto attack to damage an opposing Pokémon deals 10/15/20 + 40/45/50% Attack as additional damage to the first target hit; if held by a Melee Pokémon: also decreases the movement speed of the target by 30% for 1s (1.5s CD).
Increases HP recovery and shield effects granted to ally Pokémon by 11/14/17%.

When damaging a Pokémon from the opposing team: grants the holder and 1 nearby ally with the lowest current HP a shield for 60/80/100 + 4%/5%/6% of the holder's max HP for 3s (10s CD). Additional Resonant Guard shields do not stack, but instead refresh the duration of the remaining shield effect.
Upon receiving damage equal to 3% max HP or more from an opposing Pokémon in a single hit: deals 1.2/1.5/1.8% of the holder's max HP as Attack-based damage to nearby opposing Pokémon (0.6s CD).
It is said that a hero used this sword to halt a terrible disaster in ancient times. But it's grown rusty and worn.
Upon dealing a critical hit with an auto attack: deals an additional hit of damage equal to 45/60/75% Attack to 1 target (1s CD).

While attempting to score a goal: grants a score shield that prevents scoring from being interrupted until it is destroyed or the goal is scored (20s CD). This shield will be destroyed before other shields. Shield value uses the holder's HP and current level: 15/22/30 + 5/7.5/10% max HP + 15/22/30 × (Lv. - 1).
When hitting an opposing Pokémon with a move: recovers HP equal to 50/65/80 + 40/50/60% Sp. Attack (8s CD).
Sp. Attack-based damage dealt ignores 9/12/15% of opposing Pokémon's Sp. Def.
Upon scoring a goal: increases Sp. Attack by 8/12/16 until the end of battle (up to 6 times; maximum 48/72/96 bonus Sp. Attack).
When a hindrance is inflicted on the Pokémon, the Pokémon's Defense and Sp. Def are increased by 12/20/28% for 3 seconds.
When a hindrance is inflicted on a Pokémon from the opposing team, the holder's HP is restored by 6/8/10% max HP (5s CD).
Upon receiving damage: increases Attack by 1.5/2/2.5% for 3s (up to 4 times; maximum 6/8/10%).
Further increases Sp. Atk by 3/5/7%.

battleItems.description: Applies a debuff to the designated wild Pokémon for 3s; disabling the target's attacks. When damaging the debuffed target: deals 100 + 100% Atk + 60% SpAtk + 10 × (Lv. - 1) as additional damage (0.5s CD).
Cleanses status conditions, and becomes unstoppable for 1.5s.

Tampers with 1 goal zone in range for 4s. If used on an ally goal zone: doubles any shield provided by the goal zone, and strengthens the goal zone's HP restoration rate (restoring HP every 0.5s) for the duration of the effect. If used on an opposing goal zone: disables shield effects and HP restoration from that goal zone for the duration of the effect. Additional applications on an affected goal zone overrides the previous effects and refreshes the duration.
Restores HP equal to 160 + 20% max HP.
Creates a cloud of smoke in an area of effect around the user for 3.5s; decreasing the movement speed of opposing Pokémon in the area of effect by 80%, and their basic attack speed by 50%.
Increases Attack and Sp. Attack by 20%, and basic attack speed by 25% for 6.5s.
Increases movement speed by 45%, and prevents movement speed from being decreased for 6s.
Makes the user impervious to damage, immune to status conditions, and unable to act for 2s.
